authors_text: Amir Valizadeh
title: Position-wise optimizer: A nature-inspired optimization algorithm
title_zh: 位置优化器：一种受自然启发的优化算法
abstract: The human nervous system utilizes synaptic plasticity to solve optimization problems. Previous studies have tried to add the plasticity factor to the training process of artificial neural networks, but most of those models require complex external control over the network or complex novel rules. In this manuscript, a novel nature-inspired optimization algorithm is introduced that imitates biological neural plasticity. Furthermore, the model is tested on three datasets and the results are compared with gradient descent optimization.
summary: The human nervous system utilizes synaptic plasticity to solve optimization problems. Previous studies have tried to add the plasticity factor to the training process of artificial neural networks, but most of those models require complex external control over the network or complex novel rules. In this manuscript, a novel nature-inspired optimization algorithm is introduced that imitates biological neural plasticity. Furthermore, the model is tested on three datasets and the results are compared with gradient descent optimization.
abstract_zh: 人类神经系统利用突触可塑性来解决优化问题。先前的研究试图将可塑性因素添加到人工神经网络的训练过程中，但大多数模型需要对网络进行复杂的外部控制或复杂的新颖规则。在这份手稿中，介绍了一种模仿生物神经可塑性的新颖的受自然启发的优化算法。此外，该模型在三个数据集上进行了测试，并将结果与​​梯度下降优化进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物神经可塑性启发的新型优化算法，并在三个数据集上测试其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络优化方法依赖复杂外部控制或规则，而生物神经系统通过突触可塑性高效解决优化问题，因此需开发更自然的优化算法。
AI.method: 设计模仿生物神经可塑性的优化算法，无需复杂外部干预，直接整合到网络训练过程中。
AI.result: 算法在三个数据集上的表现与梯度下降法进行对比，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为优化问题提供了新颖的生物启发式解决方案，可能在简化控制复杂度方面具有优势。

authors_text: Kelvin C. K. Chan,Shangchen Zhou,Xiangyu Xu,Chen Change Loy
title: On the Generalization of BasicVSR++ to Video Deblurring and Denoising
title_zh: BasicVSR++对视频去模糊和去噪的推广
abstract: The exploitation of long-term information has been a long-standing problem in video restoration. The recent BasicVSR and BasicVSR++ have shown remarkable performance in video super-resolution through long-term propagation and effective alignment. Their success has led to a question of whether they can be transferred to different video restoration tasks. In this work, we extend BasicVSR++ to a generic framework for video restoration tasks. In tasks where inputs and outputs possess identical spatial size, the input resolution is reduced by strided convolutions to maintain efficiency. With only minimal changes from BasicVSR++, the proposed framework achieves compelling performance with great efficiency in various video restoration tasks including video deblurring and denoising. Notably, BasicVSR++ achieves comparable performance to Transformer-based approaches with up to 79% of parameter reduction and 44x speedup. The promising results demonstrate the importance of propagation and alignment in video restoration tasks beyond just video super-resolution. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ckkelvinchan/BasicVSR_PlusPlus.
summary: The exploitation of long-term information has been a long-standing problem in video restoration. The recent BasicVSR and BasicVSR++ have shown remarkable performance in video super-resolution through long-term propagation and effective alignment. Their success has led to a question of whether they can be transferred to different video restoration tasks. In this work, we extend BasicVSR++ to a generic framework for video restoration tasks. In tasks where inputs and outputs possess identical spatial size, the input resolution is reduced by strided convolutions to maintain efficiency. With only minimal changes from BasicVSR++, the proposed framework achieves compelling performance with great efficiency in various video restoration tasks including video deblurring and denoising. Notably, BasicVSR++ achieves comparable performance to Transformer-based approaches with up to 79% of parameter reduction and 44x speedup. The promising results demonstrate the importance of propagation and alignment in video restoration tasks beyond just video super-resolution. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ckkelvinchan/BasicVSR_PlusPlus.
abstract_zh: 长期信息的利用一直是视频修复中长期存在的问题。最近的BasicVSR和BasicVSR++通过长期传播和有效对齐在视频超分辨率方面表现出了卓越的性能。他们的成功引发了一个问题：他们是否可以转移到不同的视频修复任务。在这项工作中，我们将 BasicVSR++ 扩展为视频恢复任务的通用框架。在输入和输出具有相同空间大小的任务中，通过跨步卷积降低输入分辨率以保持效率。只需对 BasicVSR++ 进行最小的更改，所提出的框架就可以在各种视频恢复任务（包括视频去模糊和去噪）中以极高的效率实现引人注目的性能。值得注意的是，BasicVSR++ 的性能与基于 Transformer 的方法相当，参数减少高达 79%，加速达到 44 倍。这些令人鼓舞的结果证明了传播和对齐在视频恢复任务中的重要性，而不仅仅是视频超分辨率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ckkelvinchan/BasicVSR_PlusPlus 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文将BasicVSR++框架扩展至视频去模糊和去噪任务，验证其在视频修复领域的通用性。
AI.motivation: 尽管BasicVSR++在视频超分辨率中表现优异，但其在其他视频修复任务（如去模糊、去噪）中的适用性尚未被验证，需探索其通用性。
AI.method: 通过引入步长卷积降低输入分辨率以保持效率，并对BasicVSR++进行最小化修改，构建通用视频修复框架。
AI.result: 在视频去模糊和去噪任务中，BasicVSR++相较Transformer方法参数量减少79%，速度提升44倍，性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 传播与对齐机制在视频修复任务中具有普适性，不仅限于超分辨率，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Jingkang Yang,Kaiyang Zhou,Ziwei Liu
title: Full-Spectrum Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 全频谱分布不均检测
comment: Code and benchmarks are integrated in OpenOOD: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD, a unified codebase for OOD detection
comments: Code and benchmarks are integrated in OpenOOD: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD, a unified codebase for OOD detection
abstract: Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detection literature clearly defines semantic shift as a sign of OOD but does not have a consensus over covariate shift. Samples experiencing covariate shift but not semantic shift are either excluded from the test set or treated as OOD, which contradicts the primary goal in machine learning -- being able to generalize beyond the training distribution. In this paper, we take into account both shift types and introduce full-spectrum OOD (FS-OOD) detection, a more realistic problem setting that considers both detecting semantic shift and being tolerant to covariate shift; and designs three benchmarks. These new benchmarks have a more fine-grained categorization of distributions (i.e., training ID, covariate-shifted ID, near-OOD, and far-OOD) for the purpose of more comprehensively evaluating the pros and cons of algorithms. To address the FS-OOD detection problem, we propose SEM, a simple feature-based semantics score function. SEM is mainly composed of two probability measures: one is based on high-level features containing both semantic and non-semantic information, while the other is based on low-level feature statistics only capturing non-semantic image styles. With a simple combination, the non-semantic part is cancelled out, which leaves only semantic information in SEM that can better handle FS-OOD detection. Extensive experiments on the three new benchmarks show that SEM significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. Our code and benchmarks are released in https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD.
summary: Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detection literature clearly defines semantic shift as a sign of OOD but does not have a consensus over covariate shift. Samples experiencing covariate shift but not semantic shift are either excluded from the test set or treated as OOD, which contradicts the primary goal in machine learning -- being able to generalize beyond the training distribution. In this paper, we take into account both shift types and introduce full-spectrum OOD (FS-OOD) detection, a more realistic problem setting that considers both detecting semantic shift and being tolerant to covariate shift; and designs three benchmarks. These new benchmarks have a more fine-grained categorization of distributions (i.e., training ID, covariate-shifted ID, near-OOD, and far-OOD) for the purpose of more comprehensively evaluating the pros and cons of algorithms. To address the FS-OOD detection problem, we propose SEM, a simple feature-based semantics score function. SEM is mainly composed of two probability measures: one is based on high-level features containing both semantic and non-semantic information, while the other is based on low-level feature statistics only capturing non-semantic image styles. With a simple combination, the non-semantic part is cancelled out, which leaves only semantic information in SEM that can better handle FS-OOD detection. Extensive experiments on the three new benchmarks show that SEM significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. Our code and benchmarks are released in https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD.
abstract_zh: 现有的分布外（OOD）检测文献明确地将语义转移定义为 OOD 的标志，但对协变量转移没有达成共识。经历协变量转变但未经历语义转变的样本要么被排除在测试集中，要么被视为 OOD，这与机器学习的主要目标（能够泛化到训练分布之外）相矛盾。在本文中，我们考虑了两种转变类型，并引入了全谱 OOD（FS-OOD）检测，这是一种更现实的问题设置，既考虑了检测语义转变，又考虑了协变量转变的容忍度；并设计了三个基准。这些新基准对分布进行了更细粒度的分类（即训练 ID、协变量移位 ID、近 OOD 和远 OOD），以便更全面地评估算法的优缺点。为了解决 FS-OOD 检测问题，我们提出了 SEM，一种简单的基于特征的语义评分函数。 SEM主要由两种概率度量组成：一种是基于包含语义和非语义信息的高级特征，另一种是基于仅捕获非语义图像风格的低级特征统计。通过简单的组合，取消了非语义部分，使得SEM中仅留下能够更好地处理FS-OOD检测的语义信息。对三个新基准的大量实验表明，SEM 显着优于当前最先进的方法。我们的代码和基准测试发布在 https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的全光谱分布外检测（FS-OOD）方法，旨在同时检测语义偏移并容忍协变量偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有的分布外检测研究对语义偏移有明确的定义，但对于协变量偏移没有共识，导致一些样本被错误处理，无法实现机器学习的泛化目标。
AI.method: 本文提出了SEM方法，通过结合高层特征和低层特征统计，消除非语义信息，从而保留语义信息以更好地处理FS-OOD检测。
AI.result: 在三个新的基准数据集上，SEM方法显著优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了FS-OOD检测的新框架和SEM方法，为更全面的分布外检测提供了新的思路和工具。

search_text: Full-Spectrum Out-of-Distribution Detection 全频谱分布不均检测 Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detection literature clearly defines semantic shift as a sign of OOD but does not have a consensus over covariate shift. Samples experiencing covariate shift but not semantic shift are either excluded from the test set or treated as OOD, which contradicts the primary goal in machine learning -- being able to generalize beyond the training distribution. In this paper, we take into account both shift types and introduce full-spectrum OOD (FS-OOD) detection, a more realistic problem setting that considers both detecting semantic shift and being tolerant to covariate shift; and designs three benchmarks. These new benchmarks have a more fine-grained categorization of distributions (i.e., training ID, covariate-shifted ID, near-OOD, and far-OOD) for the purpose of more comprehensively evaluating the pros and cons of algorithms. To address the FS-OOD detection problem, we propose SEM, a simple feature-based semantics score function. SEM is mainly composed of two probability measures: one is based on high-level features containing both semantic and non-semantic information, while the other is based on low-level feature statistics only capturing non-semantic image styles. With a simple combination, the non-semantic part is cancelled out, which leaves only semantic information in SEM that can better handle FS-OOD detection. Extensive experiments on the three new benchmarks show that SEM significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. Our code and benchmarks are released in https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD. 现有的分布外（OOD）检测文献明确地将语义转移定义为 OOD 的标志，但对协变量转移没有达成共识。经历协变量转变但未经历语义转变的样本要么被排除在测试集中，要么被视为 OOD，这与机器学习的主要目标（能够泛化到训练分布之外）相矛盾。在本文中，我们考虑了两种转变类型，并引入了全谱 OOD（FS-OOD）检测，这是一种更现实的问题设置，既考虑了检测语义转变，又考虑了协变量转变的容忍度；并设计了三个基准。这些新基准对分布进行了更细粒度的分类（即训练 ID、协变量移位 ID、近 OOD 和远 OOD），以便更全面地评估算法的优缺点。为了解决 FS-OOD 检测问题，我们提出了 SEM，一种简单的基于特征的语义评分函数。 SEM主要由两种概率度量组成：一种是基于包含语义和非语义信息的高级特征，另一种是基于仅捕获非语义图像风格的低级特征统计。通过简单的组合，取消了非语义部分，使得SEM中仅留下能够更好地处理FS-OOD检测的语义信息。对三个新基准的大量实验表明，SEM 显着优于当前最先进的方法。我们的代码和基准测试发布在 https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD。 本文提出了一种新的全光谱分布外检测（FS-OOD）方法，旨在同时检测语义偏移并容忍协变量偏移。 Jingkang Yang,Kaiyang Zhou,Ziwei Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Varun Sundar,Sizhuo Ma,Aswin C. Sankaranarayanan,Mohit Gupta
title: Single-Photon Structured Light
title_zh: 单光子结构光
abstract: We present a novel structured light technique that uses Single Photon Avalanche Diode (SPAD) arrays to enable 3D scanning at high-frame rates and low-light levels. This technique, called "Single-Photon Structured Light", works by sensing binary images that indicates the presence or absence of photon arrivals during each exposure; the SPAD array is used in conjunction with a high-speed binary projector, with both devices operated at speeds as high as 20~kHz. The binary images that we acquire are heavily influenced by photon noise and are easily corrupted by ambient sources of light. To address this, we develop novel temporal sequences using error correction codes that are designed to be robust to short-range effects like projector and camera defocus as well as resolution mismatch between the two devices. Our lab prototype is capable of 3D imaging in challenging scenarios involving objects with extremely low albedo or undergoing fast motion, as well as scenes under strong ambient illumination.
summary: We present a novel structured light technique that uses Single Photon Avalanche Diode (SPAD) arrays to enable 3D scanning at high-frame rates and low-light levels. This technique, called "Single-Photon Structured Light", works by sensing binary images that indicates the presence or absence of photon arrivals during each exposure; the SPAD array is used in conjunction with a high-speed binary projector, with both devices operated at speeds as high as 20~kHz. The binary images that we acquire are heavily influenced by photon noise and are easily corrupted by ambient sources of light. To address this, we develop novel temporal sequences using error correction codes that are designed to be robust to short-range effects like projector and camera defocus as well as resolution mismatch between the two devices. Our lab prototype is capable of 3D imaging in challenging scenarios involving objects with extremely low albedo or undergoing fast motion, as well as scenes under strong ambient illumination.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的结构光技术，该技术使用单光子雪崩二极管 (SPAD) 阵列来实现高帧速率和低光水平下的 3D 扫描。这种技术被称为“单光子结构光”，其工作原理是感测二进制图像，该图像指示每次曝光期间是否存在光子到达； SPAD阵列与高速二进制投影仪结合使用，这两种设备都以高达20kHz的速度运行。我们获取的二值图像深受光子噪声的影响，并且很容易被环境光源破坏。为了解决这个问题，我们使用纠错码开发了新颖的时间序列，这些序列旨在对投影仪和相机散焦等短程效应以及两个设备之间的分辨率不匹配具有鲁棒性。我们的实验室原型能够在具有挑战性的场景中进行 3D 成像，这些场景涉及反照率极低或快速运动的物体，以及强环境照明下的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单光子雪崩二极管（SPAD）阵列的新型结构光技术，实现高帧率和低光条件下的3D扫描。
AI.motivation: 传统结构光技术在低光照、强环境光或快速运动场景下存在成像质量下降的问题，需开发更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合SPAD阵列与高速二进制投影仪（20kHz），通过设计抗噪声的时间序列及纠错码，解决光子噪声、环境光干扰及设备分辨率不匹配问题。
AI.result: 实验室原型成功实现低反照率物体、高速运动场景及强环境光下的高质量3D成像。
AI.conclusion: 该技术验证了单光子结构光在复杂环境下的可行性，为低光3D成像提供了新方法。

authors_text: Vibashan VS,Poojan Oza,Vishal M. Patel
title: Towards Online Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 迈向在线域自适应目标检测
abstract: Existing object detection models assume both the training and test data are sampled from the same source domain. This assumption does not hold true when these detectors are deployed in real-world applications, where they encounter new visual domain. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods are generally employed to mitigate the adverse effects caused by domain shift. Existing UDA methods operate in an offline manner where the model is first adapted towards the target domain and then deployed in real-world applications. However, this offline adaptation strategy is not suitable for real-world applications as the model frequently encounters new domain shifts. Hence, it becomes critical to develop a feasible UDA method that generalizes to these domain shifts encountered during deployment time in a continuous online manner. To this end, we propose a novel unified adaptation framework that adapts and improves generalization on the target domain in online settings. In particular, we introduce MemXformer - a cross-attention transformer-based memory module where items in the memory take advantage of domain shifts and record prototypical patterns of the target distribution. Further, MemXformer produces strong positive and negative pairs to guide a novel contrastive loss, which enhances target specific representation learning. Experiments on diverse detection benchmarks show that the proposed strategy can produce state-of-the-art performance in both online and offline settings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to address online and offline adaptation settings for object detection. Code at https://github.com/Vibashan/memXformer-online-da
summary: Existing object detection models assume both the training and test data are sampled from the same source domain. This assumption does not hold true when these detectors are deployed in real-world applications, where they encounter new visual domain. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods are generally employed to mitigate the adverse effects caused by domain shift. Existing UDA methods operate in an offline manner where the model is first adapted towards the target domain and then deployed in real-world applications. However, this offline adaptation strategy is not suitable for real-world applications as the model frequently encounters new domain shifts. Hence, it becomes critical to develop a feasible UDA method that generalizes to these domain shifts encountered during deployment time in a continuous online manner. To this end, we propose a novel unified adaptation framework that adapts and improves generalization on the target domain in online settings. In particular, we introduce MemXformer - a cross-attention transformer-based memory module where items in the memory take advantage of domain shifts and record prototypical patterns of the target distribution. Further, MemXformer produces strong positive and negative pairs to guide a novel contrastive loss, which enhances target specific representation learning. Experiments on diverse detection benchmarks show that the proposed strategy can produce state-of-the-art performance in both online and offline settings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to address online and offline adaptation settings for object detection. Code at https://github.com/Vibashan/memXformer-online-da
abstract_zh: 现有的对象检测模型假设训练数据和测试数据都是从同一源域采样的。当这些检测器部署在现实世界的应用中并遇到新的视觉领域时，这种假设并不成立。通常采用无监督域适应（UDA）方法来减轻域转移造成的不利影响。现有的 UDA 方法以离线方式运行，其中模型首先针对目标领域进行调整，然后部署到实际应用程序中。然而，这种离线适应策略并不适合现实世界的应用，因为模型经常遇到新的领域转移。因此，开发一种可行的 UDA 方法变得至关重要，该方法能够以连续在线方式推广到部署期间遇到的这些域转移。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的统一适应框架，该框架可以适应和改进在线设置中目标域的泛化。特别是，我们引入了 MemXformer - 一种基于交叉注意力变压器的内存模块，其中内存中的项目利用域转移并记录目标分布的原型模式。此外，MemXformer 生成强大的正负对来指导新颖的对比损失，从而增强目标特定表示学习。对不同检测基准的实验表明，所提出的策略可以在在线和离线设置中产生最先进的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个解决对象检测在线和离线适应设置的工作。代码位于 https://github.com/Vibashan/memXformer-online-da

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线领域自适应目标检测方法，以应对实际应用中持续出现的领域变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测模型假设训练和测试数据来自同一领域，但实际应用中常遇到新视觉领域，且传统离线自适应方法无法处理部署时的连续领域偏移。
AI.method: 提出MemXformer模块，基于交叉注意力机制的Transformer记忆模块，通过记录目标领域原型模式并生成正负样本对，优化对比损失以增强目标特定表征学习。
AI.result: 在多个检测基准测试中，该方法在在线和离线设置下均达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 首次同时解决目标检测的在线与离线自适应问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Tzofi Klinghoffer,Kushagra Tiwary,Arkadiusz Balata,Vivek Sharma,Ramesh Raskar
title: Physically Disentangled Representations
title_zh: 物理解缠结表示
abstract: State-of-the-art methods in generative representation learning yield semantic disentanglement, but typically do not consider physical scene parameters, such as geometry, albedo, lighting, or camera. We posit that inverse rendering, a way to reverse the rendering process to recover scene parameters from an image, can also be used to learn physically disentangled representations of scenes without supervision. In this paper, we show the utility of inverse rendering in learning representations that yield improved accuracy on downstream clustering, linear classification, and segmentation tasks with the help of our novel Leave-One-Out, Cycle Contrastive loss (LOOCC), which improves disentanglement of scene parameters and robustness to out-of-distribution lighting and viewpoints. We perform a comparison of our method with other generative representation learning methods across a variety of downstream tasks, including face attribute classification, emotion recognition, identification, face segmentation, and car classification. Our physically disentangled representations yield higher accuracy than semantically disentangled alternatives across all tasks and by as much as 18%. We hope that this work will motivate future research in applying advances in inverse rendering and 3D understanding to representation learning.
summary: State-of-the-art methods in generative representation learning yield semantic disentanglement, but typically do not consider physical scene parameters, such as geometry, albedo, lighting, or camera. We posit that inverse rendering, a way to reverse the rendering process to recover scene parameters from an image, can also be used to learn physically disentangled representations of scenes without supervision. In this paper, we show the utility of inverse rendering in learning representations that yield improved accuracy on downstream clustering, linear classification, and segmentation tasks with the help of our novel Leave-One-Out, Cycle Contrastive loss (LOOCC), which improves disentanglement of scene parameters and robustness to out-of-distribution lighting and viewpoints. We perform a comparison of our method with other generative representation learning methods across a variety of downstream tasks, including face attribute classification, emotion recognition, identification, face segmentation, and car classification. Our physically disentangled representations yield higher accuracy than semantically disentangled alternatives across all tasks and by as much as 18%. We hope that this work will motivate future research in applying advances in inverse rendering and 3D understanding to representation learning.
abstract_zh: 生成表示学习中最先进的方法可以实现语义解缠，但通常不考虑物理场景参数，例如几何、反照率、照明或相机。我们认为逆向渲染是一种反转渲染过程以从图像中恢复场景参数的方法，也可以用于在没有监督的情况下学习场景的物理解缠表示。在本文中，我们展示了逆向渲染在学习表示中的实用性，借助我们新颖的留一循环对比损失（LOOCC），可以提高下游聚类、线性分类和分割任务的准确性，从而改善场景参数的解缠结以及对分布外照明和视点的鲁棒性。我们在各种下游任务中将我们的方法与其他生成表示学习方法进行比较，包括面部属性分类、情感识别、身份识别、面部分割和汽车分类。在所有任务中，我们的物理解缠表示比语义解缠替代方案的准确率高出 18%。我们希望这项工作能够推动未来的研究，将逆向渲染和 3D 理解的进步应用于表示学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过逆渲染学习物理场景参数解耦表示的方法，无需监督即可提升下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成表示学习方法主要关注语义解耦，但忽视了几何、光照等物理场景参数，导致在复杂场景下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 利用逆渲染技术从图像中恢复物理参数，并设计新型LOOCC损失函数，通过留一法循环对比学习提升参数解耦与分布外适应性。
AI.result: 在人脸属性分类、情绪识别等任务中，物理解耦表示较语义解耦方法最高提升18%准确率，且对光照和视角变化更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为逆渲染与三维理解技术在表示学习中的应用提供了新方向，有望推动物理感知表征的研究进展。

authors_text: Kenneth Rapko,Wanlin Xie,Andrew Walsh
title: MONCE Tracking Metrics: a comprehensive quantitative performance evaluation methodology for object tracking
title_zh: MONCE Tracking Metrics：对象跟踪的综合定量性能评估方法
abstract: Evaluating tracking model performance is a complicated task, particularly for non-contiguous, multi-object trackers that are crucial in defense applications. While there are various excellent tracking benchmarks available, this work expands them to quantify the performance of long-term, non-contiguous, multi-object and detection model assisted trackers. We propose a suite of MONCE (Multi-Object Non-Contiguous Entities) image tracking metrics that provide both objective tracking model performance benchmarks as well as diagnostic insight for driving tracking model development in the form of Expected Average Overlap, Short/Long Term Re-Identification, Tracking Recall, Tracking Precision, Longevity, Localization and Absence Prediction.
summary: Evaluating tracking model performance is a complicated task, particularly for non-contiguous, multi-object trackers that are crucial in defense applications. While there are various excellent tracking benchmarks available, this work expands them to quantify the performance of long-term, non-contiguous, multi-object and detection model assisted trackers. We propose a suite of MONCE (Multi-Object Non-Contiguous Entities) image tracking metrics that provide both objective tracking model performance benchmarks as well as diagnostic insight for driving tracking model development in the form of Expected Average Overlap, Short/Long Term Re-Identification, Tracking Recall, Tracking Precision, Longevity, Localization and Absence Prediction.
abstract_zh: 评估跟踪模型性能是一项复杂的任务，特别是对于在国防应用中至关重要的非连续多目标跟踪器。虽然有各种优秀的跟踪基准可用，但这项工作将它们扩展为量化长期、非连续、多对象和检测模型辅助跟踪器的性能。我们提出了一套 MONCE（多对象非连续实体）图像跟踪指标，既提供客观跟踪模型性能基准，又以预期平均重叠、短期/长期重新识别、跟踪召回、跟踪精度、寿命、本地化和缺席预测的形式提供驱动跟踪模型开发的诊断见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套名为MONCE的多目标非连续实体跟踪评估指标体系，用于量化长期、非连续多目标跟踪器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪评估基准难以有效衡量非连续多目标跟踪器在国防等关键场景中的性能，需扩展量化指标以支持模型开发。
AI.method: 设计包含预期平均重叠、时序重识别、跟踪召回/精确率、持久性、定位误差及缺失预测等指标的MONCE评估框架。
AI.result: 该方法为跟踪模型提供了客观性能基准与诊断分析工具，可指导模型优化方向。
AI.conclusion: MONCE指标体系填补了现有跟踪评估空白，为复杂场景下的多目标跟踪技术发展提供了量化支撑。

authors_text: Ekaterina Kondrateva,Polina Druzhinina,Alexandra Dalechina,Svetlana Zolotova,Andrey Golanov,Boris Shirokikh,Mikhail Belyaev,Anvar Kurmukov
title: Negligible effect of brain MRI data preprocessing for tumor segmentation
title_zh: 脑 MRI 数据预处理对肿瘤分割的影响可以忽略不计
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data is heterogeneous due to differences in device manufacturers, scanning protocols, and inter-subject variability. A conventional way to mitigate MR image heterogeneity is to apply preprocessing transformations such as anatomy alignment, voxel resampling, signal intensity equalization, image denoising, and localization of regions of interest. Although a preprocessing pipeline standardizes image appearance, its influence on the quality of image segmentation and on other downstream tasks in deep neural networks has never been rigorously studied. We conduct experiments on three publicly available datasets and evaluate the effect of different preprocessing steps in intra- and inter-dataset training scenarios. Our results demonstrate that most popular standardization steps add no value to the network performance; moreover, preprocessing can hamper model performance. We suggest that image intensity normalization approaches do not contribute to model accuracy because of the reduction of signal variance with image standardization. Finally, we show that the contribution of skull-stripping in data preprocessing is almost negligible if measured in terms of estimated tumor volume. We show that the only essential transformation for accurate deep learning analysis is the unification of voxel spacing across the dataset. In contrast, inter-subjects anatomy alignment in the form of non-rigid atlas registration is not necessary and intensity equalization steps (denoising, bias-field correction and histogram matching) do not improve models' performance. The study code is accessible online https://github.com/MedImAIR/brain-mri-processing-pipeline
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data is heterogeneous due to differences in device manufacturers, scanning protocols, and inter-subject variability. A conventional way to mitigate MR image heterogeneity is to apply preprocessing transformations such as anatomy alignment, voxel resampling, signal intensity equalization, image denoising, and localization of regions of interest. Although a preprocessing pipeline standardizes image appearance, its influence on the quality of image segmentation and on other downstream tasks in deep neural networks has never been rigorously studied. We conduct experiments on three publicly available datasets and evaluate the effect of different preprocessing steps in intra- and inter-dataset training scenarios. Our results demonstrate that most popular standardization steps add no value to the network performance; moreover, preprocessing can hamper model performance. We suggest that image intensity normalization approaches do not contribute to model accuracy because of the reduction of signal variance with image standardization. Finally, we show that the contribution of skull-stripping in data preprocessing is almost negligible if measured in terms of estimated tumor volume. We show that the only essential transformation for accurate deep learning analysis is the unification of voxel spacing across the dataset. In contrast, inter-subjects anatomy alignment in the form of non-rigid atlas registration is not necessary and intensity equalization steps (denoising, bias-field correction and histogram matching) do not improve models' performance. The study code is accessible online https://github.com/MedImAIR/brain-mri-processing-pipeline
abstract_zh: 由于设备制造商、扫描协议和受试者间差异的差异，磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据是异构的。减轻 MR 图像异质性的传统方法是应用预处理变换，例如解剖对齐、体素重采样、信号强度均衡、图像去噪和感兴趣区域定位。尽管预处理管道标准化了图像外观，但其对图像分割质量和深度神经网络中其他下游任务的影响从未得到严格研究。我们对三个公开可用的数据集进行实验，并评估不同预处理步骤在数据集内和数据集间训练场景中的效果。我们的结果表明，最流行的标准化步骤对网络性能没有增加任何价值；此外，预处理会影响模型性能。我们认为图像强度归一化方法对模型精度没有贡献，因为图像标准化会减少信号方差。最后，我们表明，如果按照估计的肿瘤体积来衡量，颅骨剥离在数据预处理中的贡献几乎可以忽略不计。我们表明，准确的深度学习分析的唯一重要转换是数据集中体素间距的统一。相比之下，非刚性图谱配准形式的受试者间解剖对齐是不必要的，并且强度均衡步骤（去噪、偏置场校正和直方图匹配）不会提高模型的性能。该研究代码可在线访问 https://github.com/MedImAIR/brain-mri-processing-pipeline

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了脑部MRI数据预处理步骤对肿瘤分割任务的影响，发现大多数标准化步骤对深度学习模型性能无显著提升。
AI.motivation: MRI数据因设备、协议和个体差异存在异质性，传统预处理方法（如配准、去噪等）被广泛使用，但其对分割任务的实际效果缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 在三个公开数据集上进行实验，对比不同预处理步骤在同数据集和跨数据集训练场景下的效果，分析其对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 多数预处理步骤（如强度归一化、去噪、偏场校正）未提升模型性能，甚至可能降低表现；仅体素间距统一具有显著作用，而颅骨剥离对肿瘤体积估计影响可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习分析中，仅需统一体素间距即可，其他预处理步骤非必要，建议简化流程以提高效率。

ai_content_json.method: 在三个公开数据集上进行实验，对比不同预处理步骤在同数据集和跨数据集训练场景下的效果，分析其对模型性能的影响。
ai_content_json.result: 多数预处理步骤（如强度归一化、去噪、偏场校正）未提升模型性能，甚至可能降低表现；仅体素间距统一具有显著作用，而颅骨剥离对肿瘤体积估计影响可忽略。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 深度学习分析中，仅需统一体素间距即可，其他预处理步骤非必要，建议简化流程以提高效率。

search_text: Negligible effect of brain MRI data preprocessing for tumor segmentation 脑 MRI 数据预处理对肿瘤分割的影响可以忽略不计 Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data is heterogeneous due to differences in device manufacturers, scanning protocols, and inter-subject variability. A conventional way to mitigate MR image heterogeneity is to apply preprocessing transformations such as anatomy alignment, voxel resampling, signal intensity equalization, image denoising, and localization of regions of interest. Although a preprocessing pipeline standardizes image appearance, its influence on the quality of image segmentation and on other downstream tasks in deep neural networks has never been rigorously studied. We conduct experiments on three publicly available datasets and evaluate the effect of different preprocessing steps in intra- and inter-dataset training scenarios. Our results demonstrate that most popular standardization steps add no value to the network performance; moreover, preprocessing can hamper model performance. We suggest that image intensity normalization approaches do not contribute to model accuracy because of the reduction of signal variance with image standardization. Finally, we show that the contribution of skull-stripping in data preprocessing is almost negligible if measured in terms of estimated tumor volume. We show that the only essential transformation for accurate deep learning analysis is the unification of voxel spacing across the dataset. In contrast, inter-subjects anatomy alignment in the form of non-rigid atlas registration is not necessary and intensity equalization steps (denoising, bias-field correction and histogram matching) do not improve models' performance. The study code is accessible online https://github.com/MedImAIR/brain-mri-processing-pipeline 由于设备制造商、扫描协议和受试者间差异的差异，磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据是异构的。减轻 MR 图像异质性的传统方法是应用预处理变换，例如解剖对齐、体素重采样、信号强度均衡、图像去噪和感兴趣区域定位。尽管预处理管道标准化了图像外观，但其对图像分割质量和深度神经网络中其他下游任务的影响从未得到严格研究。我们对三个公开可用的数据集进行实验，并评估不同预处理步骤在数据集内和数据集间训练场景中的效果。我们的结果表明，最流行的标准化步骤对网络性能没有增加任何价值；此外，预处理会影响模型性能。我们认为图像强度归一化方法对模型精度没有贡献，因为图像标准化会减少信号方差。最后，我们表明，如果按照估计的肿瘤体积来衡量，颅骨剥离在数据预处理中的贡献几乎可以忽略不计。我们表明，准确的深度学习分析的唯一重要转换是数据集中体素间距的统一。相比之下，非刚性图谱配准形式的受试者间解剖对齐是不必要的，并且强度均衡步骤（去噪、偏置场校正和直方图匹配）不会提高模型的性能。该研究代码可在线访问 https://github.com/MedImAIR/brain-mri-processing-pipeline 该论文评估了脑部MRI数据预处理步骤对肿瘤分割任务的影响，发现大多数标准化步骤对深度学习模型性能无显著提升。 Ekaterina Kondrateva,Polina Druzhinina,Alexandra Dalechina,Svetlana Zolotova,Andrey Golanov,Boris Shirokikh,Mikhail Belyaev,Anvar Kurmukov eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Julien Schroeter,Chelsea Myers-Colet,Douglas L Arnold,Tal Arbel
title: Segmentation-Consistent Probabilistic Lesion Counting
title_zh: 分割一致的概率病变计数
comment: Accepted at Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2022
comments: Accepted at Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2022
abstract: Lesion counts are important indicators of disease severity, patient prognosis, and treatment efficacy, yet counting as a task in medical imaging is often overlooked in favor of segmentation. This work introduces a novel continuously differentiable function that maps lesion segmentation predictions to lesion count probability distributions in a consistent manner. The proposed end-to-end approach--which consists of voxel clustering, lesion-level voxel probability aggregation, and Poisson-binomial counting--is non-parametric and thus offers a robust and consistent way to augment lesion segmentation models with post hoc counting capabilities. Experiments on Gadolinium-enhancing lesion counting demonstrate that our method outputs accurate and well-calibrated count distributions that capture meaningful uncertainty information. They also reveal that our model is suitable for multi-task learning of lesion segmentation, is efficient in low data regimes, and is robust to adversarial attacks.
summary: Lesion counts are important indicators of disease severity, patient prognosis, and treatment efficacy, yet counting as a task in medical imaging is often overlooked in favor of segmentation. This work introduces a novel continuously differentiable function that maps lesion segmentation predictions to lesion count probability distributions in a consistent manner. The proposed end-to-end approach--which consists of voxel clustering, lesion-level voxel probability aggregation, and Poisson-binomial counting--is non-parametric and thus offers a robust and consistent way to augment lesion segmentation models with post hoc counting capabilities. Experiments on Gadolinium-enhancing lesion counting demonstrate that our method outputs accurate and well-calibrated count distributions that capture meaningful uncertainty information. They also reveal that our model is suitable for multi-task learning of lesion segmentation, is efficient in low data regimes, and is robust to adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 病灶计数是疾病严重程度、患者预后和治疗效果的重要指标，但计数作为医学成像中的一项任务经常被忽视，而有利于分割。这项工作引入了一种新颖的连续可微函数，该函数以一致的方式将病变分割预测映射到病变计数概率分布。所提出的端到端方法由体素聚类、病变级体素概率聚合和泊松二项式计数组成，是非参数的，因此提供了一种稳健且一致的方法来增强具有事后计数功能的病变分割模型。钆增强病变计数的实验表明，我们的方法输出准确且经过良好校准的计数分布，可以捕获有意义的不确定性信息。他们还表明，我们的模型适用于病变分割的多任务学习，在低数据情况下有效，并且对对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种分割一致的概率病变计数方法，将分割预测映射到病变计数的概率分布，以提高医学影像中病变计数的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统医学影像分析侧重分割而忽视计数，且现有计数方法可能缺乏准确性与鲁棒性，需更可靠的方法来捕捉不确定性并支持多任务学习。
AI.method: 采用非参数方法，结合体素聚类、病变级别概率聚合及泊松-二项式计数，实现分割结果到计数概率分布的端到端映射。
AI.result: 在钆增强病变计数任务中，方法输出准确且校准良好的计数分布，具有小数据高效性、对抗攻击鲁棒性，并适用于多任务学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医学影像中的病变计数提供了鲁棒且一致的解决方案，有助于提升疾病评估与治疗监测的准确性。

authors_text: Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Yeshwanth Venkatesha,Abhishek Moitra,Priyadarshini Panda
title: MIME: Adapting a Single Neural Network for Multi-task Inference with Memory-efficient Dynamic Pruning
title_zh: MIME：通过内存高效的动态修剪调整单个神经网络进行多任务推理
abstract: Recent years have seen a paradigm shift towards multi-task learning. This calls for memory and energy-efficient solutions for inference in a multi-task scenario. We propose an algorithm-hardware co-design approach called MIME. MIME reuses the weight parameters of a trained parent task and learns task-specific threshold parameters for inference on multiple child tasks. We find that MIME results in highly memory-efficient DRAM storage of neural-network parameters for multiple tasks compared to conventional multi-task inference. In addition, MIME results in input-dependent dynamic neuronal pruning, thereby enabling energy-efficient inference with higher throughput on a systolic-array hardware. Our experiments with benchmark datasets (child tasks)- CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and Fashion-MNIST, show that MIME achieves ~3.48x memory-efficiency and ~2.4-3.1x energy-savings compared to conventional multi-task inference in Pipelined task mode.
summary: Recent years have seen a paradigm shift towards multi-task learning. This calls for memory and energy-efficient solutions for inference in a multi-task scenario. We propose an algorithm-hardware co-design approach called MIME. MIME reuses the weight parameters of a trained parent task and learns task-specific threshold parameters for inference on multiple child tasks. We find that MIME results in highly memory-efficient DRAM storage of neural-network parameters for multiple tasks compared to conventional multi-task inference. In addition, MIME results in input-dependent dynamic neuronal pruning, thereby enabling energy-efficient inference with higher throughput on a systolic-array hardware. Our experiments with benchmark datasets (child tasks)- CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and Fashion-MNIST, show that MIME achieves ~3.48x memory-efficiency and ~2.4-3.1x energy-savings compared to conventional multi-task inference in Pipelined task mode.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多任务学习的范式发生了转变。这就需要内存和节能解决方案来在多任务场景中进行推理。我们提出了一种称为 MIME 的算法-硬件协同设计方法。 MIME 重用经过训练的父任务的权重参数，并学习特定于任务的阈值参数以对多个子任务进行推理。我们发现，与传统的多任务推理相比，MIME 可以为多个任务提供高度内存效率的神经网络参数 DRAM 存储。此外，MIME 会产生依赖于输入的动态神经元修剪，从而在脉动阵列硬件上实现具有更高吞吐量的节能推理。我们对基准数据集（子任务）——CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 Fashion-MNIST 进行的实验表明，与流水线任务模式下的传统多任务推理相比，MIME 实现了约 3.48 倍的内存效率和约 2.4-3.1 倍的节能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIME方法，通过动态剪枝和参数复用实现多任务推理的内存与能耗高效解决方案。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习场景下，传统方法存在内存占用高、能耗大的问题，亟需更高效的推理方案。
AI.method: 设计算法-硬件协同方案MIME，复用主任务权重参数并学习子任务阈值，实现动态神经元剪枝与内存高效存储。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10等数据集上，MIME相比传统方法实现3.48倍内存效率提升及2.4-3.1倍能耗降低。
AI.conclusion: MIME通过参数复用与动态剪枝有效平衡多任务推理的内存与能耗需求，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Paul Chauchat,Silvere Bonnabel,Axel Barrau
title: Invariant Smoothing with low process noise
title_zh: 具有低过程噪声的不变平滑
abstract: In this paper we address smoothing-that is, optimisation-based-estimation techniques for localisation problems in the case where motion sensors are very accurate. Our mathematical analysis focuses on the difficult limit case where motion sensors are infinitely precise, resulting in the absence of process noise. Then the formulation degenerates, as the dynamical model that serves as a soft constraint becomes an equality constraint, and conventional smoothing methods are not able to fully respect it. By contrast, once an appropriate Lie group embedding has been found, we prove theoretically that invariant smoothing gracefully accommodates this limit case in that the estimates tend to be consistent with the induced constraints when the noise tends to zero. Simulations on the important problem of initial alignement in inertial navigation show that, in a low noise setting, invariant smoothing may favorably compare to state-of-the-art smoothers when using precise inertial measurements units (IMU).
summary: In this paper we address smoothing-that is, optimisation-based-estimation techniques for localisation problems in the case where motion sensors are very accurate. Our mathematical analysis focuses on the difficult limit case where motion sensors are infinitely precise, resulting in the absence of process noise. Then the formulation degenerates, as the dynamical model that serves as a soft constraint becomes an equality constraint, and conventional smoothing methods are not able to fully respect it. By contrast, once an appropriate Lie group embedding has been found, we prove theoretically that invariant smoothing gracefully accommodates this limit case in that the estimates tend to be consistent with the induced constraints when the noise tends to zero. Simulations on the important problem of initial alignement in inertial navigation show that, in a low noise setting, invariant smoothing may favorably compare to state-of-the-art smoothers when using precise inertial measurements units (IMU).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了运动传感器非常准确的情况下针对定位问题的平滑（即基于优化的估计技术）。我们的数学分析重点关注运动传感器无限精确的困难极限情况，从而导致不存在过程噪声。然后，公式就会退化，因为充当软约束的动态模型变成了等式约束，而传统的平滑方法无法完全遵守它。相比之下，一旦找到合适的李群嵌入，我们就可以从理论上证明不变平滑可以很好地适应这种极限情况，因为当噪声趋于零时，估计值往往与引入的约束一致。对惯性导航中初始对准这一重要问题的仿真表明，在低噪声设置下，使用精确惯性测量单元 (IMU) 时，不变平滑可能优于最先进的平滑器。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在运动传感器高度精确（过程噪声极低）的情况下，传统平滑方法失效的问题，提出基于李群嵌入的不变平滑方法以解决约束退化问题。
AI.motivation: 当运动传感器趋于无限精确时，过程噪声消失导致动态模型退化为等式约束，传统平滑方法无法有效满足该约束条件。
AI.method: 通过构造适当的李群嵌入，理论证明不变平滑方法在噪声趋于零时能保持估计一致性，并在惯性导航初始对齐问题中进行验证。
AI.result: 仿真表明在低噪声环境下，使用高精度IMU时不变平滑方法的性能优于现有先进平滑算法。
AI.conclusion: 不变平滑方法能有效处理无过程噪声的极限情况，在高精度传感器场景中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Chinedu Innocent Nwoye,Nicolas Padoy
title: Data Splits and Metrics for Method Benchmarking on Surgical Action Triplet Datasets
title_zh: 手术动作三联体数据集方法基准的数据分割和指标
comment: Official splits for the CholecT50 and CholecT45 datasets, 13 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables
comments: Official splits for the CholecT50 and CholecT45 datasets, 13 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables
abstract: In addition to generating data and annotations, devising sensible data splitting strategies and evaluation metrics is essential for the creation of a benchmark dataset. This practice ensures consensus on the usage of the data, homogeneous assessment, and uniform comparison of research methods on the dataset. This study focuses on CholecT50, which is a 50 video surgical dataset that formalizes surgical activities as triplets of <instrument, verb, target>. In this paper, we introduce the standard splits for the CholecT50 and CholecT45 datasets and show how they compare with existing use of the dataset. CholecT45 is the first public release of 45 videos of CholecT50 dataset. We also develop a metrics library, ivtmetrics, for model evaluation on surgical triplets. Furthermore, we conduct a benchmark study by reproducing baseline methods in the most predominantly used deep learning frameworks (PyTorch and TensorFlow) to evaluate them using the proposed data splits and metrics and release them publicly to support future research. The proposed data splits and evaluation metrics will enable global tracking of research progress on the dataset and facilitate optimal model selection for further deployment.
summary: In addition to generating data and annotations, devising sensible data splitting strategies and evaluation metrics is essential for the creation of a benchmark dataset. This practice ensures consensus on the usage of the data, homogeneous assessment, and uniform comparison of research methods on the dataset. This study focuses on CholecT50, which is a 50 video surgical dataset that formalizes surgical activities as triplets of <instrument, verb, target>. In this paper, we introduce the standard splits for the CholecT50 and CholecT45 datasets and show how they compare with existing use of the dataset. CholecT45 is the first public release of 45 videos of CholecT50 dataset. We also develop a metrics library, ivtmetrics, for model evaluation on surgical triplets. Furthermore, we conduct a benchmark study by reproducing baseline methods in the most predominantly used deep learning frameworks (PyTorch and TensorFlow) to evaluate them using the proposed data splits and metrics and release them publicly to support future research. The proposed data splits and evaluation metrics will enable global tracking of research progress on the dataset and facilitate optimal model selection for further deployment.
abstract_zh: 除了生成数据和注释之外，设计合理的数据分割策略和评估指标对于创建基准数据集至关重要。这种做法确保了数据使用、同质评估以及数据集研究方法的统一比较方面达成共识。本研究重点关注 CholecT50，这是一个包含 50 个视频手术数据集，将手术活动形式化为 <仪器、动词、目标> 三元组。在本文中，我们介绍了 CholecT50 和 CholecT45 数据集的标准分割，并展示了它们如何与数据集的现有使用进行比较。 CholecT45 是 CholecT50 数据集的 45 个视频的首次公开发布。我们还开发了一个度量库 ivtmetrics，用于手术三胞胎的模型评估。此外，我们通过在最常用的深度学习框架（PyTorch 和 TensorFlow）中重现基线方法来进行基准研究，以使用建议的数据分割和指标对其进行评估，并将其公开发布以支持未来的研究。所提出的数据分割和评估指标将能够对数据集的研究进展进行全球跟踪，并促进进一步部署的最佳模型选择。

AI.tldr: 本文针对手术动作三元组数据集CholecT50和CholecT45，提出标准的数据划分策略和评估指标，并开发基准测试工具库ivtmetrics以支持模型评估与研究。
AI.motivation: 为确保数据使用一致性、评估公平性及方法比较的统一性，需制定合理的数据划分策略和评估指标，推动手术动作识别领域研究进展。
AI.method: 引入CholecT50/CholecT45的标准数据划分方案，开发ivtmetrics评估库，复现主流深度学习框架（PyTorch/TensorFlow）中的基线方法并进行基准测试。
AI.result: 提出的数据划分与评估指标已公开发布，基准测试结果可支持未来研究，促进手术动作三元组识别领域模型优化与部署。
AI.conclusion: 标准化的数据划分和评估体系为该领域研究提供了统一基准，有助于全球研究进展追踪与最优模型选择。

authors_text: Siva Uday Sampreeth Chebolu,Franck Dernoncourt,Nedim Lipka,Thamar Solorio
title: Survey of Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis Datasets
title_zh: 基于方面的情感分析数据集调查
abstract: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) is a natural language processing problem that requires analyzing user-generated reviews to determine: a) The target entity being reviewed, b) The high-level aspect to which it belongs, and c) The sentiment expressed toward the targets and the aspects. Numerous yet scattered corpora for ABSA make it difficult for researchers to identify corpora best suited for a specific ABSA subtask quickly. This study aims to present a database of corpora that can be used to train and assess autonomous ABSA systems. Additionally, we provide an overview of the major corpora for ABSA and its subtasks and highlight several features that researchers should consider when selecting a corpus. Finally, we discuss the advantages and disadvantages of current collection approaches and make recommendations for future corpora creation. This survey examines 65 publicly available ABSA datasets covering over 25 domains, including 45 English and 20 other languages datasets.
summary: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) is a natural language processing problem that requires analyzing user-generated reviews to determine: a) The target entity being reviewed, b) The high-level aspect to which it belongs, and c) The sentiment expressed toward the targets and the aspects. Numerous yet scattered corpora for ABSA make it difficult for researchers to identify corpora best suited for a specific ABSA subtask quickly. This study aims to present a database of corpora that can be used to train and assess autonomous ABSA systems. Additionally, we provide an overview of the major corpora for ABSA and its subtasks and highlight several features that researchers should consider when selecting a corpus. Finally, we discuss the advantages and disadvantages of current collection approaches and make recommendations for future corpora creation. This survey examines 65 publicly available ABSA datasets covering over 25 domains, including 45 English and 20 other languages datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）是一个自然语言处理问题，需要分析用户生成的评论来确定：a）正在评论的目标实体，b）它所属的高级方面，以及c）针对目标和方面表达的情感。 ABSA 语料库众多但分散，使得研究人员很难快速识别最适合特定 ABSA 子任务的语料库。本研究旨在提供一个可用于训练和评估自主 ABSA 系统的语料库数据库。此外，我们还概述了 ABSA 的主要语料库及其子任务，并强调了研究人员在选择语料库时应考虑的几个特征。最后，我们讨论当前收集方法的优点和缺点，并为未来的语料库创建提出建议。这项调查检查了 65 个公开可用的 ABSA 数据集，涵盖超过 25 个领域，其中包括 45 个英语和 20 个其他语言数据集。

AI.tldr: 该论文对基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）数据集进行综述，旨在为研究人员提供一个系统化的数据集数据库及选择指南。
AI.motivation: 现有ABSA数据集分散且缺乏统一分类，研究人员难以快速筛选适合特定子任务的数据集，需建立系统性数据库以提升研究效率。
AI.method: 通过收集并分析65个公开ABSA数据集，覆盖25个领域及多种语言，总结数据集特征、子任务分类及当前数据收集方法的优缺点。
AI.result: 构建了ABSA数据集数据库，概述了主流数据集的分布与特点，指出现有数据集在领域覆盖、语言多样性及标注一致性上的差异。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来数据集应加强跨领域、多语言支持，并注重标注规范性；研究人员需根据任务需求综合评估数据集特征以提高模型性能。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文对基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）数据集进行综述，旨在为研究人员提供一个系统化的数据集数据库及选择指南。
ai_content.motivation: 现有ABSA数据集分散且缺乏统一分类，研究人员难以快速筛选适合特定子任务的数据集，需建立系统性数据库以提升研究效率。
ai_content.method: 通过收集并分析65个公开ABSA数据集，覆盖25个领域及多种语言，总结数据集特征、子任务分类及当前数据收集方法的优缺点。
ai_content.result: 构建了ABSA数据集数据库，概述了主流数据集的分布与特点，指出现有数据集在领域覆盖、语言多样性及标注一致性上的差异。

search_text: Survey of Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis Datasets 基于方面的情感分析数据集调查 Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) is a natural language processing problem that requires analyzing user-generated reviews to determine: a) The target entity being reviewed, b) The high-level aspect to which it belongs, and c) The sentiment expressed toward the targets and the aspects. Numerous yet scattered corpora for ABSA make it difficult for researchers to identify corpora best suited for a specific ABSA subtask quickly. This study aims to present a database of corpora that can be used to train and assess autonomous ABSA systems. Additionally, we provide an overview of the major corpora for ABSA and its subtasks and highlight several features that researchers should consider when selecting a corpus. Finally, we discuss the advantages and disadvantages of current collection approaches and make recommendations for future corpora creation. This survey examines 65 publicly available ABSA datasets covering over 25 domains, including 45 English and 20 other languages datasets. 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）是一个自然语言处理问题，需要分析用户生成的评论来确定：a）正在评论的目标实体，b）它所属的高级方面，以及c）针对目标和方面表达的情感。 ABSA 语料库众多但分散，使得研究人员很难快速识别最适合特定 ABSA 子任务的语料库。本研究旨在提供一个可用于训练和评估自主 ABSA 系统的语料库数据库。此外，我们还概述了 ABSA 的主要语料库及其子任务，并强调了研究人员在选择语料库时应考虑的几个特征。最后，我们讨论当前收集方法的优点和缺点，并为未来的语料库创建提出建议。这项调查检查了 65 个公开可用的 ABSA 数据集，涵盖超过 25 个领域，其中包括 45 个英语和 20 个其他语言数据集。 该论文对基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）数据集进行综述，旨在为研究人员提供一个系统化的数据集数据库及选择指南。 Siva Uday Sampreeth Chebolu,Franck Dernoncourt,Nedim Lipka,Thamar Solorio cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zheng Liu,Wei Zhang,Yan Chen,Weiyi Sun,Tianchuan Du,Benjamin Schroeder
title: Towards Generalizable Semantic Product Search by Text Similarity Pre-training on Search Click Logs
title_zh: 通过搜索点击日志上的文本相似性预训练实现可推广的语义产品搜索
abstract: Recently, semantic search has been successfully applied to e-commerce product search and the learned semantic space(s) for query and product encoding are expected to generalize to unseen queries or products. Yet, whether generalization can conveniently emerge has not been thoroughly studied in the domain thus far. In this paper, we examine several general-domain and domain-specific pre-trained Roberta variants and discover that general-domain fine-tuning does not help generalization, which aligns with the discovery of prior art. Proper domain-specific fine-tuning with clickstream data can lead to better model generalization, based on a bucketed analysis of a publicly available manual annotated query-product pair da
summary: Recently, semantic search has been successfully applied to e-commerce product search and the learned semantic space(s) for query and product encoding are expected to generalize to unseen queries or products. Yet, whether generalization can conveniently emerge has not been thoroughly studied in the domain thus far. In this paper, we examine several general-domain and domain-specific pre-trained Roberta variants and discover that general-domain fine-tuning does not help generalization, which aligns with the discovery of prior art. Proper domain-specific fine-tuning with clickstream data can lead to better model generalization, based on a bucketed analysis of a publicly available manual annotated query-product pair da
abstract_zh: 最近，语义搜索已成功应用于电子商务产品搜索，并且用于查询和产品编码的学习语义空间有望推广到未见过的查询或产品。然而，泛化是否能够方便地出现，迄今为止该领域尚未得到深入研究。在本文中，我们研究了几种通用域和特定域预训练的 Roberta 变体，发现通用域微调无助于泛化，这与现有技术的发现相一致。基于对公开可用的手动注释查询-产品对 da 的分桶分析，使用点击流数据进行适当的特定领域微调可以带来更好的模型泛化

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析点击日志中的文本相似性预训练，探索提升电商产品搜索语义泛化能力的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语义搜索模型在电商场景中对未见查询或商品的泛化能力不足，需寻找更有效的预训练策略。
AI.method: 对比多种通用域和领域特定的RoBERTa预训练模型，基于点击流数据进行领域微调并分析其泛化效果。
AI.result: 通用域微调无助于泛化，而使用点击流数据的领域特定微调显著提升了模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 点击流数据驱动的领域微调能有效增强语义搜索模型的泛化性，未来需进一步优化预训练方法。

authors_text: Shakti Kumar,Hussain Zaidi
title: GDC- Generalized Distribution Calibration for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: GDC-小样本学习的广义分布校准
comment: 13 pages of main text, 9 pages of supplementary
comments: 13 pages of main text, 9 pages of supplementary
abstract: Few shot learning is an important problem in machine learning as large labelled datasets take considerable time and effort to assemble. Most few-shot learning algorithms suffer from one of two limitations- they either require the design of sophisticated models and loss functions, thus hampering interpretability; or employ statistical techniques but make assumptions that may not hold across different datasets or features. Developing on recent work in extrapolating distributions of small sample classes from the most similar larger classes, we propose a Generalized sampling method that learns to estimate few-shot distributions for classification as weighted random variables of all large classes. We use a form of covariance shrinkage to provide robustness against singular covariances due to overparameterized features or small datasets. We show that our sampled points are close to few-shot classes even in cases when there are no similar large classes in the training set. Our method works with arbitrary off-the-shelf feature extractors and outperforms existing state-of-the-art on miniImagenet, CUB and Stanford Dogs datasets by 3% to 5% on 5way-1shot and 5way-5shot tasks and by 1% in challenging cross domain tasks.
summary: Few shot learning is an important problem in machine learning as large labelled datasets take considerable time and effort to assemble. Most few-shot learning algorithms suffer from one of two limitations- they either require the design of sophisticated models and loss functions, thus hampering interpretability; or employ statistical techniques but make assumptions that may not hold across different datasets or features. Developing on recent work in extrapolating distributions of small sample classes from the most similar larger classes, we propose a Generalized sampling method that learns to estimate few-shot distributions for classification as weighted random variables of all large classes. We use a form of covariance shrinkage to provide robustness against singular covariances due to overparameterized features or small datasets. We show that our sampled points are close to few-shot classes even in cases when there are no similar large classes in the training set. Our method works with arbitrary off-the-shelf feature extractors and outperforms existing state-of-the-art on miniImagenet, CUB and Stanford Dogs datasets by 3% to 5% on 5way-1shot and 5way-5shot tasks and by 1% in challenging cross domain tasks.
abstract_zh: 很少的镜头学习是机器学习中的一个重要问题，因为大型标记数据集需要大量的时间和精力来组装。大多数小样本学习算法都存在以下两个限制之一：它们要么需要设计复杂的模型和损失函数，从而妨碍可解释性；要么需要设计复杂的模型和损失函数，从而妨碍可解释性。或采用统计技术，但做出的假设可能不适用于不同的数据集或特征。基于最近从最相似的大类中推断小样本类分布的工作，我们提出了一种广义采样方法，该方法学习估计用于分类的小样本分布作为所有大类的加权随机变量。我们使用协方差收缩的形式来提供针对由于过度参数化特征或小数据集而导致的奇异协方差的鲁棒性。我们表明，即使在训练集中没有类似的大类的情况下，我们的采样点也接近小样本类。我们的方法可与任意现成的特征提取器配合使用，并且在 5way-1shot 和 5way-5shot 任务上比 miniImagenet、CUB 和 Stanley Dogs 数据集上现有最先进的技术高出 3% 到 5%，在具有挑战性的跨域任务中高出 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义分布校准方法（GDC），用于解决少样本学习中的分布估计问题，通过加权随机变量和协方差收缩技术提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习算法要么依赖复杂模型降低可解释性，要么依赖统计假设但泛化性不足，难以适应不同数据集和特征。
AI.method: 提出广义采样方法，将少样本类别的分布建模为所有大类别的加权随机变量，并引入协方差收缩技术应对过参数化特征或小数据集导致的奇异协方差问题。
AI.result: 在miniImagenet、CUB和Stanford Dogs数据集上，该方法在5way-1shot和5way-5shot任务中超越现有最优方法3%-5%，在跨域任务中提升1%。
AI.conclusion: GDC方法兼容任意特征提取器，通过分布校准有效提升少样本学习性能，尤其在无相似大类训练样本时仍能保持良好效果。

authors_text: A. M. Vorontsov,G. A. Filimonov
title: The self-learning AI controller for adaptive power beaming with fiber-array laser transmitter system
title_zh: 光纤阵列激光发射系统自适应功率发射的自学习人工智能控制器
abstract: In this study we consider adaptive power beaming with fiber-array laser transmitter system in presence of atmospheric turbulence. For optimization of power transition through the atmosphere fiber-array is traditionally controlled by stochastic parallel gradient descent (SPGD) algorithm where control feedback is provided via radio frequency link by an optical-to-electrical power conversion sensor, attached to a cooperative target. The SPGD algorithm continuously and randomly perturbs voltages applied to fiber-array phase shifters and fiber tip positioners in order to maximize sensor signal, i.e. uses, so-called, "blind" optimization principle. In opposite to this approach a perspective artificially intelligent (AI) control systems for synthesis of optimal control can utilize various pupil- or target-plane data available for the analysis including wavefront sensor data, photo-voltaic array (PVA) data, other optical or atmospheric parameters, and potentially can eliminate well-known drawbacks of SPGD-based controllers. In this study an optimal control is synthesized by a deep neural network (DNN) using target-plane PVA sensor data as its input. A DNN training is occurred online in sync with control system operation and is performed by applying of small perturbations to DNN's outputs. This approach does not require initial DNN's pre-training as well as guarantees optimization of system performance in time. All theoretical results are verified by numerical experiments.

For optimization of power transition through the atmosphere fiber-array is traditionally controlled by stochastic parallel gradient descent (SPGD) algorithm where control feedback is provided via radio frequency link by an optical-to-electrical power conversion sensor, attached to a cooperative target. The SPGD algorithm continuously and randomly perturbs voltages applied to fiber-array phase shifters and fiber tip positioners in order to maximize sensor signal, i.e. uses, so-called, "blind" optimization principle. In opposite to this approach a perspective artificially intelligent (AI) control systems for synthesis of optimal control can utilize various pupil- or target-plane data available for the analysis including wavefront sensor data, photo-voltaic array (PVA) data, other optical or atmospheric parameters, and potentially can eliminate well-known drawbacks of SPGD-based controllers. A DNN training is occurred online in sync with control system operation and is performed by applying of small perturbations to DNN's outputs. This approach does not require initial DNN's pre-training as well as guarantees optimization of system performance in time. All theoretical results are verified by numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们考虑在存在大气湍流的情况下使用光纤阵列激光发射器系统进行自适应功率发射。为了优化通过大气的功率转换，光纤阵列传统上是通过随机并行梯度下降（SPGD）算法来控制的，其中控制反馈是由连接到协作目标的光电功率转换传感器通过射频链路提供的。 SPGD 算法连续随机地扰动施加到光纤阵列移相器和光纤尖端定位器的电压，以便最大化传感器信号，即使用所谓的“盲”优化原理。与这种方法相反，用于合成最佳控制的透视人工智能（AI）控制系统可以利用可用于分析的各种光瞳或目标平面数据，包括波前传感器数据、光伏阵列（PVA）数据、其他光学或大气参数，并且有可能消除基于 SPGD 的控制器的众所周知的缺点。在本研究中，使用目标平面 PVA 传感器数据作为输入的深度神经网络 (DNN) 合成了最佳控制。 DNN 训练与控制系统操作同步在线进行，并通过对 DNN 输出应用小扰动来执行。该方法不需要初始DNN的预训练，并且保证了系统性能的及时优化。所有理论结果均通过数值实验得到验证。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于深度神经网络的自适应功率传输AI控制器，用于光纤阵列激光发射系统在大气湍流环境下的优化控制。
AI.motivation: 传统SPGD算法依赖盲优化，无法利用波前传感器、光伏阵列等多源数据，导致控制效率受限。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络（DNN）以目标平面光伏阵列数据为输入，通过在线训练和输出扰动实现控制器自适应优化。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该方法在无需预训练的情况下，可实时提升系统性能并克服SPGD算法缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 提出的AI控制器通过多源数据融合和在线学习，显著优化了大气湍流下的功率传输效率，具有工程应用潜力。

The SPGD algorithm continuously and randomly perturbs voltages applied to fiber-array phase shifters and fiber tip positioners in order to maximize sensor signal, i.e. uses, so-called, "blind" optimization principle. In this study an optimal control is synthesized by a deep neural network (DNN) using target-plane PVA sensor data as its input. A DNN training is occurred online in sync with control system operation and is performed by applying of small perturbations to DNN's outputs. This approach does not require initial DNN's pre-training as well as guarantees optimization of system performance in time. authors_text: Lorenz Diener,Sten Sootla,Solomiya Branets,Ando Saabas,Robert Aichner,Ross Cutler
title: INTERSPEECH 2022 Audio Deep Packet Loss Concealment Challenge
title_zh: INTERSPEECH 2022 音频深度丢包隐藏挑战赛
comment: 4 pages + 1 page references, 1 figure, 2 tables. Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 4 pages + 1 page references, 1 figure, 2 tables. Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Audio Packet Loss Concealment (PLC) is the hiding of gaps in audio streams caused by data transmission failures in packet switched networks. This is a common problem, and of increasing importance as end-to-end VoIP telephony and teleconference systems become the default and ever more widely used form of communication in business as well as in personal usage. This paper presents the INTERSPEECH 2022 Audio Deep Packet Loss Concealment challenge. We first give an overview of the PLC problem, and introduce some classical approaches to PLC as well as recent work. We then present the open source dataset released as part of this challenge as well as the evaluation methods and metrics used to determine the winner. We also briefly introduce PLCMOS, a novel data-driven metric that can be used to quickly evaluate the performance PLC systems. Finally, we present the results of the INTERSPEECH 2022 Audio Deep PLC Challenge, and provide a summary of important takeaways.
summary: Audio Packet Loss Concealment (PLC) is the hiding of gaps in audio streams caused by data transmission failures in packet switched networks. This is a common problem, and of increasing importance as end-to-end VoIP telephony and teleconference systems become the default and ever more widely used form of communication in business as well as in personal usage. This paper presents the INTERSPEECH 2022 Audio Deep Packet Loss Concealment challenge. We first give an overview of the PLC problem, and introduce some classical approaches to PLC as well as recent work. We then present the open source dataset released as part of this challenge as well as the evaluation methods and metrics used to determine the winner. We also briefly introduce PLCMOS, a novel data-driven metric that can be used to quickly evaluate the performance PLC systems. Finally, we present the results of the INTERSPEECH 2022 Audio Deep PLC Challenge, and provide a summary of important takeaways.
abstract_zh: 音频数据包丢失隐藏 (PLC) 是隐藏由数据包交换网络中的数据传输故障引起的音频流中的间隙。这是一个常见问题，并且随着端到端 VoIP 电话和电话会议系统成为商业和个人使用中默认且越来越广泛使用的通信形式，该问题变得越来越重要。本文介绍了 INTERSPEECH 2022 音频深度丢包隐藏挑战。我们首先概述 PLC 问题，并介绍一些 PLC 的经典方法以及最近的工作。然后，我们展示作为本次挑战赛的一部分发布的开源数据集，以及用于确定获胜者的评估方法和指标。我们还简要介绍了 PLCMOS，这是一种新颖的数据驱动指标，可用于快速评估 PLC 系统的性能。最后，我们展示了 INTERSPEECH 2022 音频深度 PLC 挑战赛的结果，并总结了重要要点。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了INTERSPEECH 2022音频深度分组丢失隐藏（PLC）挑战赛，旨在通过开源数据集和评估方法推动PLC技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 随着VoIP和视频会议系统普及，网络传输中的数据包丢失问题日益严重，亟需改进音频分组丢失隐藏技术以提升通信质量。
AI.method: 发布开源数据集，引入PLCMOS新型评估指标，并通过竞赛形式对比不同PLC方法的性能。
AI.result: 展示了挑战赛结果，验证了深度学习方法在PLC任务中的有效性，并总结了关键研究发现。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为PLC研究提供了标准化评估框架，推动了基于深度学习的音频修复技术进步。

authors_text: Karim Guirguis,Ahmed Hendawy,George Eskandar,Mohamed Abdelsamad,Matthias Kayser,Juergen Beyerer
title: CFA: Constraint-based Finetuning Approach for Generalized Few-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: CFA：用于广义少样本目标检测的基于约束的微调方法
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) seeks to detect novel categories with limited data by leveraging prior knowledge from abundant base data. Generalized few-shot object detection (G-FSOD) aims to tackle FSOD without forgetting previously seen base classes and, thus, accounts for a more realistic scenario, where both classes are encountered during test time. While current FSOD methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting, G-FSOD addresses this limitation yet exhibits a performance drop on novel tasks compared to the state-of-the-art FSOD. In this work, we propose a constraint-based finetuning approach (CFA) to alleviate catastrophic forgetting, while achieving competitive results on the novel task without increasing the model capacity. CFA adapts a continual learning method, namely Average Gradient Episodic Memory (A-GEM) to G-FSOD. Specifically, more constraints on the gradient search strategy are imposed from which a new gradient update rule is derived, allowing for better knowledge exchange between base and novel classes. To evaluate our method, we conduct extensive experiments on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets. Our method outperforms current FSOD and G-FSOD approaches on the novel task with minor degeneration on the base task. Moreover, CFA is orthogonal to FSOD approaches and operates as a plug-and-play module without increasing the model capacity or inference time.
summary: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) seeks to detect novel categories with limited data by leveraging prior knowledge from abundant base data. Generalized few-shot object detection (G-FSOD) aims to tackle FSOD without forgetting previously seen base classes and, thus, accounts for a more realistic scenario, where both classes are encountered during test time. While current FSOD methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting, G-FSOD addresses this limitation yet exhibits a performance drop on novel tasks compared to the state-of-the-art FSOD. In this work, we propose a constraint-based finetuning approach (CFA) to alleviate catastrophic forgetting, while achieving competitive results on the novel task without increasing the model capacity. CFA adapts a continual learning method, namely Average Gradient Episodic Memory (A-GEM) to G-FSOD. Specifically, more constraints on the gradient search strategy are imposed from which a new gradient update rule is derived, allowing for better knowledge exchange between base and novel classes. To evaluate our method, we conduct extensive experiments on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets. Our method outperforms current FSOD and G-FSOD approaches on the novel task with minor degeneration on the base task. Moreover, CFA is orthogonal to FSOD approaches and operates as a plug-and-play module without increasing the model capacity or inference time.
abstract_zh: 少样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在利用丰富的基础数据中的先验知识，利用有限的数据检测新类别。广义少样本目标检测 (G-FSOD) 旨在解决 FSOD 问题，同时不会忘记以前见过的基类，因此考虑了更现实的场景，在测试期间会遇到这两个类。虽然当前的 FSOD 方法遭受灾难性遗忘，但 G-FSOD 解决了这一限制，但与最先进的 FSOD 相比，在新任务上表现出性能下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于约束的微调方法（CFA）来减轻灾难性遗忘，同时在不增加模型容量的情况下在新任务上取得有竞争力的结果。 CFA 采用了一种持续学习方法，即平均梯度情景记忆（A-GEM）到 G-FSOD。具体来说，对梯度搜索策略施加更多约束，从中导出新的梯度更新规则，从而允许基础类和新类之间更好的知识交换。为了评估我们的方法，我们在 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法在新任务上优于当前的 FSOD 和 G-FSOD 方法，并且在基本任务上有轻微退化。此外，CFA 与 FSOD 方法正交，并作为即插即用模块运行，而不会增加模型容量或推理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束的微调方法（CFA），用于解决通用小样本目标检测（G-FSOD）中的灾难性遗忘问题，同时保持对新类别的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有G-FSOD方法在解决灾难性遗忘时，会导致新任务性能下降；同时需在不增加模型容量的前提下，实现对基础类和新类的平衡优化。
AI.method: 将持续学习中的A-GEM方法迁移至G-FSOD，通过在梯度搜索策略中增加约束条件，推导新的梯度更新规则，促进基础类与新类之间的知识共享。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL-VOC数据集上，CFA在新任务上优于现有FSOD和G-FSOD方法，且对基础任务性能仅轻微下降；方法具有模块化特性，无需增加模型容量或推理时间。
AI.conclusion: CFA通过约束微调有效缓解了G-FSOD中的灾难性遗忘问题，在保持模型轻量化的同时实现了新旧任务的性能平衡，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: CFA: Constraint-based Finetuning Approach for Generalized Few-Shot Object Detection CFA：用于广义少样本目标检测的基于约束的微调方法 Few-shot object detection (FSOD) seeks to detect novel categories with limited data by leveraging prior knowledge from abundant base data. Generalized few-shot object detection (G-FSOD) aims to tackle FSOD without forgetting previously seen base classes and, thus, accounts for a more realistic scenario, where both classes are encountered during test time. While current FSOD methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting, G-FSOD addresses this limitation yet exhibits a performance drop on novel tasks compared to the state-of-the-art FSOD. In this work, we propose a constraint-based finetuning approach (CFA) to alleviate catastrophic forgetting, while achieving competitive results on the novel task without increasing the model capacity. CFA adapts a continual learning method, namely Average Gradient Episodic Memory (A-GEM) to G-FSOD. Specifically, more constraints on the gradient search strategy are imposed from which a new gradient update rule is derived, allowing for better knowledge exchange between base and novel classes. To evaluate our method, we conduct extensive experiments on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets. Our method outperforms current FSOD and G-FSOD approaches on the novel task with minor degeneration on the base task. Moreover, CFA is orthogonal to FSOD approaches and operates as a plug-and-play module without increasing the model capacity or inference time. 少样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在利用丰富的基础数据中的先验知识，利用有限的数据检测新类别。广义少样本目标检测 (G-FSOD) 旨在解决 FSOD 问题，同时不会忘记以前见过的基类，因此考虑了更现实的场景，在测试期间会遇到这两个类。虽然当前的 FSOD 方法遭受灾难性遗忘，但 G-FSOD 解决了这一限制，但与最先进的 FSOD 相比，在新任务上表现出性能下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于约束的微调方法（CFA）来减轻灾难性遗忘，同时在不增加模型容量的情况下在新任务上取得有竞争力的结果。 CFA 采用了一种持续学习方法，即平均梯度情景记忆（A-GEM）到 G-FSOD。具体来说，对梯度搜索策略施加更多约束，从中导出新的梯度更新规则，从而允许基础类和新类之间更好的知识交换。为了评估我们的方法，我们在 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法在新任务上优于当前的 FSOD 和 G-FSOD 方法，并且在基本任务上有轻微退化。此外，CFA 与 FSOD 方法正交，并作为即插即用模块运行，而不会增加模型容量或推理时间。 本文提出一种基于约束的微调方法（CFA），用于解决通用小样本目标检测（G-FSOD）中的灾难性遗忘问题，同时保持对新类别的检测性能。 Karim Guirguis,Ahmed Hendawy,George Eskandar,Mohamed Abdelsamad,Matthias Kayser,Juergen Beyerer cs.CV

authors_text: Hamza Gardi,Sebastian F. Walter,Christoph S. Garbe
title: An Optimal Experimental Design Approach for Light Configurations in Photometric Stereo
title_zh: 光度立体光配置的优化实验设计方法
abstract: This paper presents a technique for finding the surface normal of an object from a set of images obtained under different lighting positions. The method presented is based on the principles of Photometric Stereo (PS) combined with Optimum Experimental Design (OED) and Parameter Estimation (PE). Unclear by the approach of photometric stereo, and many models based thereon, is how to position the light sources. So far, this is done by using heuristic approaches this leads to suboptimal and non-data driven positioning of the light sources. But what if the optimal positions of the light sources are calculated for photometric stereo? To this end, in this contribution, the effect of positioning the light sources on the quality of the normal vector for PS is evaluated. Furthermore, a new approach in this direction is derived and formulated. For the calculation of the surface normal of a Lambertian surface, the approach based on calibrated photometric stereo; for the estimation the optimal position of the light sources the approach is premised on parameter estimation and optimum experimental design. The approach is tested using synthetic and real-data. Based on results it can be seen that the surface normal estimated with the new method is more detailed than with conventional methods.
summary: This paper presents a technique for finding the surface normal of an object from a set of images obtained under different lighting positions. The method presented is based on the principles of Photometric Stereo (PS) combined with Optimum Experimental Design (OED) and Parameter Estimation (PE). Unclear by the approach of photometric stereo, and many models based thereon, is how to position the light sources. So far, this is done by using heuristic approaches this leads to suboptimal and non-data driven positioning of the light sources. But what if the optimal positions of the light sources are calculated for photometric stereo? To this end, in this contribution, the effect of positioning the light sources on the quality of the normal vector for PS is evaluated. Furthermore, a new approach in this direction is derived and formulated. For the calculation of the surface normal of a Lambertian surface, the approach based on calibrated photometric stereo; for the estimation the optimal position of the light sources the approach is premised on parameter estimation and optimum experimental design. The approach is tested using synthetic and real-data. Based on results it can be seen that the surface normal estimated with the new method is more detailed than with conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从不同照明位置下获得的一组图像中查找物体表面法线的技术。该方法基于光度立体（PS）原理并结合最佳实验设计（OED）和参数估计（PE）。光度立体方法以及基于此的许多模型尚不清楚如何定位光源。到目前为止，这是通过使用启发式方法来完成的，这会导致光源的定位不理想且非数据驱动。但是如果计算出光度立体光源的最佳位置呢？为此，在本贡献中，评估了光源定位对 PS 法线矢量质量的影响。此外，还衍生并制定了该方向的新方法。对于朗伯表面的表面法线的计算，基于校准光度立体的方法；为了估计光源的最佳位置，该方法以参数估计和最佳实验设计为前提。该方法使用合成数据和真实数据进行测试。从结果可以看出，用新方法估计的表面法线比传统方法更详细。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合光度立体法与最优实验设计的方法，用于优化光照配置以提高表面法线估计的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统光度立体法依赖启发式光照配置，导致结果次优且缺乏数据驱动性，需探索更科学的光源位置计算方法。
AI.method: 基于校准光度立体法，结合参数估计与最优实验设计理论，推导光源位置优化模型，并通过合成数据与真实数据验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法估计的表面法线在细节表现上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光度立体法提供了数据驱动的光照配置方案，显著提升了表面法线估计的精度与细节还原能力。

authors_text: Michael Cerny Green,Ahmed Khalifa,M Charity,Julian Togelius
title: Persona-driven Dominant/Submissive Map (PDSM) Generation for Tutorials
title_zh: 角色驱动的主导/服从地图 (PDSM) 生成教程
abstract: In this paper, we present a method for automated persona-driven video game tutorial level generation. Tutorial levels are scenarios in which the player can explore and discover different rules and game mechanics. Procedural personas can guide generators to create content which encourages or discourages certain playstyle behaviors. In this system, we use procedural personas to calculate the behavioral characteristics of levels which are evolved using the quality-diversity algorithm known as Constrained MAP-Elites. An evolved map's quality is determined by its simplicity: the simpler it is, the better it is. Within this work, we show that the generated maps can strongly encourage or discourage different persona-like behaviors and range from simple solutions to complex puzzle-levels, making them perfect candidates for a tutorial generative system.
summary: In this paper, we present a method for automated persona-driven video game tutorial level generation. Tutorial levels are scenarios in which the player can explore and discover different rules and game mechanics. Procedural personas can guide generators to create content which encourages or discourages certain playstyle behaviors. In this system, we use procedural personas to calculate the behavioral characteristics of levels which are evolved using the quality-diversity algorithm known as Constrained MAP-Elites. An evolved map's quality is determined by its simplicity: the simpler it is, the better it is. Within this work, we show that the generated maps can strongly encourage or discourage different persona-like behaviors and range from simple solutions to complex puzzle-levels, making them perfect candidates for a tutorial generative system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种自动角色驱动视频游戏教程关卡生成的方法。教程级别是玩家可以探索和发现不同规则和游戏机制的场景。程序角色可以指导生成器创建鼓励或阻止某些游戏风格行为的内容。在这个系统中，我们使用程序角色来计算使用称为“约束 MAP-精英”的质量多样性算法演变而来的级别的行为特征。进化地图的质量取决于其简单性：越简单越好。在这项工作中，我们表明生成的地图可以强烈鼓励或阻止不同的类似角色的行为，范围从简单的解决方案到复杂的谜题级别，使它们成为教程生成系统的完美候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于角色驱动的视频游戏教程关卡自动生成方法，通过程序化生成的主导/服从角色特征，结合约束MAP-Elites算法生成适应不同行为倾向的教程地图。
AI.motivation: 传统教程关卡难以灵活适配不同玩家行为模式，需设计能主动引导特定玩法行为的生成系统，以提升玩家学习效率与沉浸体验。
AI.method: 采用程序化生成角色（procedural personas）定义行为特征，运用约束MAP-Elites算法进行质量多样性进化，以关卡简单性作为核心评估指标生成多层级教程地图。
AI.result: 生成的教程地图能有效强化或抑制特定行为模式，涵盖从基础到复杂谜题的多样性关卡，验证了该方法在教程生成场景的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于角色驱动的约束MAP-Elites算法可成功生成适配不同行为倾向的教程关卡，为动态化、个性化游戏教学系统提供有效技术方案。

conclusion: 基于角色驱动的约束MAP-Elites算法可成功生成适配不同行为倾向的教程关卡，为动态化、个性化游戏教学系统提供有效技术方案。
search_text: Persona-driven Dominant/Submissive Map (PDSM) Generation for Tutorials 角色驱动的主导/服从地图 (PDSM) 生成教程 In this paper, we present a method for automated persona-driven video game tutorial level generation. Tutorial levels are scenarios in which the player can explore and discover different rules and game mechanics. Procedural personas can guide generators to create content which encourages or discourages certain playstyle behaviors. In this system, we use procedural personas to calculate the behavioral characteristics of levels which are evolved using the quality-diversity algorithm known as Constrained MAP-Elites. An evolved map's quality is determined by its simplicity: the simpler it is, the better it is. Within this work, we show that the generated maps can strongly encourage or discourage different persona-like behaviors and range from simple solutions to complex puzzle-levels, making them perfect candidates for a tutorial generative system. 在本文中，我们提出了一种自动角色驱动视频游戏教程关卡生成的方法。教程级别是玩家可以探索和发现不同规则和游戏机制的场景。程序角色可以指导生成器创建鼓励或阻止某些游戏风格行为的内容。在这个系统中，我们使用程序角色来计算使用称为“约束 MAP-精英”的质量多样性算法演变而来的级别的行为特征。进化地图的质量取决于其简单性：越简单越好。在这项工作中，我们表明生成的地图可以强烈鼓励或阻止不同的类似角色的行为，范围从简单的解决方案到复杂的谜题级别，使它们成为教程生成系统的完美候选者。 本文提出一种基于角色驱动的视频游戏教程关卡自动生成方法，通过程序化生成的主导/服从角色特征，结合约束MAP-Elites算法生成适应不同行为倾向的教程地图。 Michael Cerny Green,Ahmed Khalifa,M Charity,Julian Togelius cs.AI

authors_text: Nuo Chen,Linjun Shou,Ming Gong,Jian Pei,Daxin Jiang
title: Bridging the Gap between Language Models and Cross-Lingual Sequence Labeling
title_zh: 弥合语言模型和跨语言序列标记之间的差距
abstract: Large-scale cross-lingual pre-trained language models (xPLMs) have shown effectiveness in cross-lingual sequence labeling tasks (xSL), such as cross-lingual machine reading comprehension (xMRC) by transferring knowledge from a high-resource language to low-resource languages. Despite the great success, we draw an empirical observation that there is a training objective gap between pre-training and fine-tuning stages: e.g., mask language modeling objective requires local understanding of the masked token and the span-extraction objective requires global understanding and reasoning of the input passage/paragraph and question, leading to the discrepancy between pre-training and xMRC. In this paper, we first design a pre-training task tailored for xSL named Cross-lingual Language Informative Span Masking (CLISM) to eliminate the objective gap in a self-supervised manner. Second, we present ContrAstive-Consistency Regularization (CACR), which utilizes contrastive learning to encourage the consistency between representations of input parallel sequences via unsupervised cross-lingual instance-wise training signals during pre-training. By these means, our methods not only bridge the gap between pretrain-finetune, but also enhance PLMs to better capture the alignment between different languages. Extensive experiments prove that our method achieves clearly superior results on multiple xSL benchmarks with limited pre-training data. Our methods also surpass the previous state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in few-shot data settings, where only a few hundred training examples are available.
summary: Large-scale cross-lingual pre-trained language models (xPLMs) have shown effectiveness in cross-lingual sequence labeling tasks (xSL), such as cross-lingual machine reading comprehension (xMRC) by transferring knowledge from a high-resource language to low-resource languages. Despite the great success, we draw an empirical observation that there is a training objective gap between pre-training and fine-tuning stages: e.g., mask language modeling objective requires local understanding of the masked token and the span-extraction objective requires global understanding and reasoning of the input passage/paragraph and question, leading to the discrepancy between pre-training and xMRC. In this paper, we first design a pre-training task tailored for xSL named Cross-lingual Language Informative Span Masking (CLISM) to eliminate the objective gap in a self-supervised manner. Second, we present ContrAstive-Consistency Regularization (CACR), which utilizes contrastive learning to encourage the consistency between representations of input parallel sequences via unsupervised cross-lingual instance-wise training signals during pre-training. By these means, our methods not only bridge the gap between pretrain-finetune, but also enhance PLMs to better capture the alignment between different languages. Extensive experiments prove that our method achieves clearly superior results on multiple xSL benchmarks with limited pre-training data. Our methods also surpass the previous state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in few-shot data settings, where only a few hundred training examples are available.
abstract_zh: 大规模跨语言预训练语言模型（xPLM）已在跨语言序列标记任务（xSL）中显示出有效性，例如通过将知识从高资源语言转移到低资源语言的跨语言机器阅读理解（xMRC）。尽管取得了巨大的成功，但我们根据经验观察到，预训练和微调阶段之间存在训练目标差距：例如，掩码语言建模目标需要对掩码标记进行局部理解，而跨度提取目标需要对输入段落/段落和问题进行全局理解和推理，导致预训练和 xMRC 之间存在差异。在本文中，我们首先设计了一个为 xSL 量身定制的预训练任务，名为跨语言语言信息跨度掩码（CLISM），以自我监督的方式消除客观差距。其次，我们提出了对比一致性正则化（CACR），它利用对比学习，通过预训练期间的无监督跨语言实例训练信号来鼓励输入并行序列表示之间的一致性。通过这些方式，我们的方法不仅弥合了预训练与微调之间的差距，而且还增强了 PLM 以更好地捕获不同语言之间的一致性。大量实验证明，我们的方法在使用有限的预训练数据的多个 xSL 基准上取得了明显优异的结果。我们的方法在少量数据设置中也大大超越了以前最先进的方法，其中只有几百个训练样本可用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决跨语言序列标注任务中预训练与微调阶段目标差异的问题，提出新方法提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言预训练模型在预训练和微调阶段存在目标差距，导致跨语言任务效果受限，需设计新方法弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 设计跨语言语言信息跨度掩码预训练任务（CLISM）并提出对比一致性正则化（CACR），通过自监督和对比学习增强语言对齐能力。
AI.result: 在多个跨语言序列标注基准测试中，方法在有限预训练数据下显著优于现有技术，尤其在少样本场景下提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缩小预训练与微调目标差异，增强模型跨语言对齐能力，在低资源场景下表现尤为突出。
