authors_text: Selene Baez Santamaria,Emmanouil Manousogiannis,Guusje Boomgaard,Linh P. Tran,Zoltan Szlavik,Robert-Jan Sips
title: Access to care: analysis of the geographical distribution of healthcare using Linked Open Data
title_zh: 获得医疗服务：使用关联开放数据分析医疗保健的地理分布
comment: Accepted at 4th Workshop on Semantic Web solutions for large-scale biomedical data analytics (SeWeBMeDA-2020)
comments: Accepted at 4th Workshop on Semantic Web solutions for large-scale biomedical data analytics (SeWeBMeDA-2020)
abstract: Background: Access to medical care is strongly dependent on resource allocation, such as the geographical distribution of medical facilities. Nevertheless, this data is usually restricted to country official documentation, not available to the public. While some medical facilities' data is accessible as semantic resources on the Web, it is not consistent in its modeling and has yet to be integrated into a complete, open, and specialized repository. This work focuses on generating a comprehensive semantic dataset of medical facilities worldwide containing extensive information about such facilities' geo-location. Results: For this purpose, we collect, align, and link various open-source databases where medical facilities' information may be present. This work allows us to evaluate each data source along various dimensions, such as completeness, correctness, and interlinking with other sources, all critical aspects of current knowledge representation technologies. Conclusions: Our contributions directly benefit stakeholders in the biomedical and health domain (patients, healthcare professionals, companies, regulatory authorities, and researchers), who will now have a better overview of the access to and distribution of medical facilities.
summary: Background: Access to medical care is strongly dependent on resource allocation, such as the geographical distribution of medical facilities. Nevertheless, this data is usually restricted to country official documentation, not available to the public. While some medical facilities' data is accessible as semantic resources on the Web, it is not consistent in its modeling and has yet to be integrated into a complete, open, and specialized repository. This work focuses on generating a comprehensive semantic dataset of medical facilities worldwide containing extensive information about such facilities' geo-location. Results: For this purpose, we collect, align, and link various open-source databases where medical facilities' information may be present. This work allows us to evaluate each data source along various dimensions, such as completeness, correctness, and interlinking with other sources, all critical aspects of current knowledge representation technologies. Conclusions: Our contributions directly benefit stakeholders in the biomedical and health domain (patients, healthcare professionals, companies, regulatory authorities, and researchers), who will now have a better overview of the access to and distribution of medical facilities.
abstract_zh: 背景：获得医疗服务很大程度上取决于资源分配，例如医疗设施的地理分布。然而，这些数据通常仅限于国家官方文件，不向公众开放。虽然一些医疗机构的数据可以作为网络上的语义资源进行访问，但其建模并不一致，并且尚未集成到完整、开放和专业的存储库中。这项工作的重点是生成全球医疗设施的综合语义数据集，其中包含有关此类设施地理位置的广泛信息。结果：为此，我们收集、调整和链接可能存在医疗机构信息的各种开源数据库。这项工作使我们能够从各个维度评估每个数据源，例如完整性、正确性以及与其他源的互连，这些都是当前知识表示技术的关键方面。结论：我们的贡献直接使生物医学和健康领域的利益相关者（患者、医疗保健专业人员、公司、监管机构和研究人员）受益，他们现在可以更好地了解医疗设施的获取和分布。

AI.tldr: 生成包含全球医疗机构地理信息的综合语义数据集，以分析医疗资源的地理分布。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗设施数据分散且不一致，缺乏整合的开放仓库，导致利益相关者难以全面了解医疗可及性。
AI.method: 收集并整合多个开源数据库中的医疗设施数据，通过对齐和链接技术实现数据整合，并评估各数据源的完整性、正确性及互连性。
AI.result: 构建了一个全面的医疗设施语义数据集，提供了关于医疗机构地理分布的详细信息，并评估了各数据源的质量和互连性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为医疗健康领域的多方利益相关者提供了更全面的医疗设施分布信息，有助于优化医疗资源配置和提升医疗可及性。

Tran,Zoltan Szlavik,Robert-Jan Sips cs.AI

authors_text: Syed Ashar Javed,Dinkar Juyal,Zahil Shanis,Shreya Chakraborty,Harsha Pokkalla,Aaditya Prakash
title: Rethinking Machine Learning Model Evaluation in Pathology
title_zh: 重新思考病理学中的机器学习模型评估
abstract: Machine Learning has been applied to pathology images in research and clinical practice with promising outcomes. However, standard ML models often lack the rigorous evaluation required for clinical decisions. Machine learning techniques for natural images are ill-equipped to deal with pathology images that are significantly large and noisy, require expensive labeling, are hard to interpret, and are susceptible to spurious correlations. We propose a set of practical guidelines for ML evaluation in pathology that address the above concerns. The paper includes measures for setting up the evaluation framework, effectively dealing with variability in labels, and a recommended suite of tests to address issues related to domain shift, robustness, and confounding variables. We hope that the proposed framework will bridge the gap between ML researchers and domain experts, leading to wider adoption of ML techniques in pathology and improving patient outcomes.
summary: Machine Learning has been applied to pathology images in research and clinical practice with promising outcomes. However, standard ML models often lack the rigorous evaluation required for clinical decisions. Machine learning techniques for natural images are ill-equipped to deal with pathology images that are significantly large and noisy, require expensive labeling, are hard to interpret, and are susceptible to spurious correlations. We propose a set of practical guidelines for ML evaluation in pathology that address the above concerns. The paper includes measures for setting up the evaluation framework, effectively dealing with variability in labels, and a recommended suite of tests to address issues related to domain shift, robustness, and confounding variables. We hope that the proposed framework will bridge the gap between ML researchers and domain experts, leading to wider adoption of ML techniques in pathology and improving patient outcomes.
abstract_zh: 机器学习已应用于研究和临床实践中的病理图像，并取得了可喜的成果。然而，标准机器学习模型通常缺乏临床决策所需的严格评估。用于自然图像的机器学习技术不足以处理非常大且嘈杂的病理图像，需要昂贵的标签，难以解释，并且容易受到虚假相关性的影响。我们提出了一套病理学 ML 评估的实用指南来解决上述问题。该论文包括建立评估框架、有效处理标签变异性的措施，以及一套推荐的测试来解决与领域转移、鲁棒性和混杂变量相关的问题。我们希望所提出的框架能够弥合机器学习研究人员和领域专家之间的差距，从而使机器学习技术在病理学领域得到更广泛的采用，并改善患者的治疗结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套针对病理学中机器学习模型评估的实用指南，以解决临床决策所需的严格评估问题。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习模型在处理病理图像时面临图像尺寸大、噪声多、标注成本高、可解释性差及易受虚假相关性影响等挑战，亟需建立更严谨的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出包含评估框架搭建、标签变异性处理及领域迁移、鲁棒性和混杂变量测试的综合方案，以系统性解决病理图像的特殊问题。
AI.result: 该框架为机器学习研究者与病理学专家提供了协作工具，有望推动ML技术在病理领域的临床应用并改善患者预后。
AI.conclusion: 通过建立针对性评估体系，本文提出的指南可有效弥合技术与临床需求间的鸿沟，促进病理学中机器学习的可靠应用。

authors_text: Filip Ślazyk,Przemysław Jabłecki,Aneta Lisowska,Maciej Malawski,Szymon Płotka
title: CXR-FL: Deep Learning-Based Chest X-ray Image Analysis Using Federated Learning
title_zh: CXR-FL：使用联邦学习进行基于深度学习的胸部 X 射线图像分析
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS) 2022, London
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS) 2022, London
abstract: Federated learning enables building a shared model from multicentre data while storing the training data locally for privacy. In this paper, we present an evaluation (called CXR-FL) of deep learning-based models for chest X-ray image analysis using the federated learning method. We examine the impact of federated learning parameters on the performance of central models. Additionally, we show that classification models perform worse if trained on a region of interest reduced to segmentation of the lung compared to the full image. However, focusing training of the classification model on the lung area may result in improved pathology interpretability during inference. We also find that federated learning helps maintain model generalizability. The pre-trained weights and code are publicly available at (https://github.com/SanoScience/CXR-FL).
summary: Federated learning enables building a shared model from multicentre data while storing the training data locally for privacy. In this paper, we present an evaluation (called CXR-FL) of deep learning-based models for chest X-ray image analysis using the federated learning method. We examine the impact of federated learning parameters on the performance of central models. Additionally, we show that classification models perform worse if trained on a region of interest reduced to segmentation of the lung compared to the full image. However, focusing training of the classification model on the lung area may result in improved pathology interpretability during inference. We also find that federated learning helps maintain model generalizability. The pre-trained weights and code are publicly available at (https://github.com/SanoScience/CXR-FL).
abstract_zh: 联邦学习可以从多中心数据构建共享模型，同时将训练数据存储在本地以保护隐私。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用联邦学习方法进行胸部 X 射线图像分析的基于深度学习的模型的评估（称为 CXR-FL）。我们研究联邦学习参数对中心模型性能的影响。此外，我们表明，与完整图像相比，如果在简化为肺部分割的感兴趣区域上进行训练，分类模型的表现会更差。然而，将分类模型的训练集中在肺部区域可能会提高推理过程中病理学的可解释性。我们还发现联邦学习有助于保持模型的通用性。预训练的权重和代码可在 (https://github.com/SanoScience/CXR-FL) 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于联邦学习的深度学习模型在胸部X光图像分析中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 解决多中心医疗数据隐私问题，同时实现模型共享与性能优化。
AI.method: 采用联邦学习框架训练深度学习模型，对比全图像与肺部区域分割的训练效果，分析参数对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 肺部区域分割训练的分类模型性能下降，但可提升病理可解释性；联邦学习有效保持模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习可平衡隐私保护与模型性能，肺部区域聚焦训练有助于可解释性，但需权衡准确率与泛化性。

authors_text: Sebastien Martin
title: A Post-Processing Tool and Feasibility Study for Three-Dimensional Imaging with Electrical Impedance Tomography During Deep Brain Stimulation Surgery
title_zh: 深部脑刺激手术中电阻抗断层扫描三维成像的后处理工具和可行性研究
abstract: Electrical impedance tomography (EIT) is a promising technique for biomedical imaging. The strength of EIT is its ability to reconstruct images of the body's internal structures through radiation-safe techniques. EIT is regarded as safe for patients' health, and it is currently being actively researched. This paper investigates the application of EIT during deep brain stimulation (DBS) surgery as a means to identify targets during operations. DBS involves a surgical procedure in which a lead or electrode array is implanted in a specific target area in the brain. Electrical stimulations are then used to modulate neural circuits within the target area to reduce disabling neurological symptoms. The main difficulty in performing DBS surgery is to accurately position the lead in the target area before commencing the treatment. Brain tissue shifts during DBS surgery can be as large as the target size when compared with the pre-operative magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) or computed tomography (CT) images. To address this problem, a solution based on open-domain EIT to reconstruct images surrounding the probe during DBS surgery is proposed. Data acquisition and image reconstruction were performed, and artificial intelligence was applied to enhance the resulting images. The results showed that the proposed method is rapid, produces valuable high-quality images, and constitutes a first step towards in-vivo study.
summary: Electrical impedance tomography (EIT) is a promising technique for biomedical imaging. The strength of EIT is its ability to reconstruct images of the body's internal structures through radiation-safe techniques. EIT is regarded as safe for patients' health, and it is currently being actively researched. This paper investigates the application of EIT during deep brain stimulation (DBS) surgery as a means to identify targets during operations. DBS involves a surgical procedure in which a lead or electrode array is implanted in a specific target area in the brain. Electrical stimulations are then used to modulate neural circuits within the target area to reduce disabling neurological symptoms. The main difficulty in performing DBS surgery is to accurately position the lead in the target area before commencing the treatment. Brain tissue shifts during DBS surgery can be as large as the target size when compared with the pre-operative magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) or computed tomography (CT) images. To address this problem, a solution based on open-domain EIT to reconstruct images surrounding the probe during DBS surgery is proposed. Data acquisition and image reconstruction were performed, and artificial intelligence was applied to enhance the resulting images. The results showed that the proposed method is rapid, produces valuable high-quality images, and constitutes a first step towards in-vivo study.
abstract_zh: 电阻抗断层扫描（EIT）是一种很有前景的生物医学成像技术。 EIT 的优势在于它能够通过辐射安全技术重建人体内部结构的图像。 EIT被认为对患者健康是安全的，目前正在积极研究。本文研究了 EIT 在深部脑刺激 (DBS) 手术中的应用，作为手术期间识别目标的一种手段。 DBS 涉及一种外科手术，其中将导线或电极阵列植入大脑的特定目标区域。然后使用电刺激来调节目标区域内的神经回路，以减少致残的神经症状。进行 DBS 手术的主要困难是在开始治疗之前将导线准确定位在目标区域。与术前磁共振成像 (MRI) 或计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像相比，DBS 手术期间的脑组织移位可能与目标尺寸一样大。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于开域 EIT 的解决方案，在 DBS 手术中重建探头周围的图像。进行数据采集和图像重建，并应用人工智能来增强生成的图像。结果表明，所提出的方法快速，可产生有价值的高质量图像，并构成体内研究的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于电导率断层扫描（EIT）的后处理工具，并研究其在深部脑刺激（DBS）手术中的三维成像可行性，以提高手术中靶区定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: DBS手术中电极定位依赖术前MRI/CT图像，但术中脑组织移位可能导致定位误差。EIT作为一种无辐射、安全的成像技术，可实时监测术中组织变化，但其在DBS中的应用尚未充分验证。
AI.method: 采用开放域EIT技术进行术中探针周围图像重建，结合人工智能算法增强图像质量，并通过实验验证方法的快速性和图像有效性。
AI.result: 该方法能快速生成高质量图像，为术中靶区识别提供了可行方案，是迈向活体研究的第一步。
AI.conclusion: EIT结合AI增强技术可作为DBS手术中实时成像的补充手段，未来需进一步验证其在活体环境中的稳定性与临床适用性。

search_text: A Post-Processing Tool and Feasibility Study for Three-Dimensional Imaging with Electrical Impedance Tomography During Deep Brain Stimulation Surgery 深部脑刺激手术中电阻抗断层扫描三维成像的后处理工具和可行性研究 Electrical impedance tomography (EIT) is a promising technique for biomedical imaging. The strength of EIT is its ability to reconstruct images of the body's internal structures through radiation-safe techniques. EIT is regarded as safe for patients' health, and it is currently being actively researched. This paper investigates the application of EIT during deep brain stimulation (DBS) surgery as a means to identify targets during operations. DBS involves a surgical procedure in which a lead or electrode array is implanted in a specific target area in the brain. Electrical stimulations are then used to modulate neural circuits within the target area to reduce disabling neurological symptoms. The main difficulty in performing DBS surgery is to accurately position the lead in the target area before commencing the treatment. Brain tissue shifts during DBS surgery can be as large as the target size when compared with the pre-operative magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) or computed tomography (CT) images. To address this problem, a solution based on open-domain EIT to reconstruct images surrounding the probe during DBS surgery is proposed. Data acquisition and image reconstruction were performed, and artificial intelligence was applied to enhance the resulting images. The results showed that the proposed method is rapid, produces valuable high-quality images, and constitutes a first step towards in-vivo study. 电阻抗断层扫描（EIT）是一种很有前景的生物医学成像技术。 EIT 的优势在于它能够通过辐射安全技术重建人体内部结构的图像。 EIT被认为对患者健康是安全的，目前正在积极研究。本文研究了 EIT 在深部脑刺激 (DBS) 手术中的应用，作为手术期间识别目标的一种手段。 DBS 涉及一种外科手术，其中将导线或电极阵列植入大脑的特定目标区域。然后使用电刺激来调节目标区域内的神经回路，以减少致残的神经症状。进行 DBS 手术的主要困难是在开始治疗之前将导线准确定位在目标区域。与术前磁共振成像 (MRI) 或计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像相比，DBS 手术期间的脑组织移位可能与目标尺寸一样大。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于开域 EIT 的解决方案，在 DBS 手术中重建探头周围的图像。进行数据采集和图像重建，并应用人工智能来增强生成的图像。结果表明，所提出的方法快速，可产生有价值的高质量图像，并构成体内研究的第一步。 本文提出一种基于电导率断层扫描（EIT）的后处理工具，并研究其在深部脑刺激（DBS）手术中的三维成像可行性，以提高手术中靶区定位的准确性。 Sebastien Martin eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Seán Mullery,Paul F. Whelan
title: Human vs Objective Evaluation of Colourisation Performance
title_zh: 着色性能的人类与客观评估
abstract: Automatic colourisation of grey-scale images is the process of creating a full-colour image from the grey-scale prior. It is an ill-posed problem, as there are many plausible colourisations for a given grey-scale prior. The current SOTA in auto-colourisation involves image-to-image type Deep Convolutional Neural Networks with Generative Adversarial Networks showing the greatest promise. The end goal of colourisation is to produce full colour images that appear plausible to the human viewer, but human assessment is costly and time consuming. This work assesses how well commonly used objective measures correlate with human opinion. We also attempt to determine what facets of colourisation have the most significant effect on human opinion. For each of 20 images from the BSD dataset, we create 65 recolourisations made up of local and global changes. Opinion scores are then crowd sourced using the Amazon Mechanical Turk and together with the images this forms an extensible dataset called the Human Evaluated Colourisation Dataset (HECD). While we find statistically significant correlations between human-opinion scores and a small number of objective measures, the strength of the correlations is low. There is also evidence that human observers are most intolerant to an incorrect hue of naturally occurring objects.
summary: Automatic colourisation of grey-scale images is the process of creating a full-colour image from the grey-scale prior. It is an ill-posed problem, as there are many plausible colourisations for a given grey-scale prior. The current SOTA in auto-colourisation involves image-to-image type Deep Convolutional Neural Networks with Generative Adversarial Networks showing the greatest promise. The end goal of colourisation is to produce full colour images that appear plausible to the human viewer, but human assessment is costly and time consuming. This work assesses how well commonly used objective measures correlate with human opinion. We also attempt to determine what facets of colourisation have the most significant effect on human opinion. For each of 20 images from the BSD dataset, we create 65 recolourisations made up of local and global changes. Opinion scores are then crowd sourced using the Amazon Mechanical Turk and together with the images this forms an extensible dataset called the Human Evaluated Colourisation Dataset (HECD). While we find statistically significant correlations between human-opinion scores and a small number of objective measures, the strength of the correlations is low. There is also evidence that human observers are most intolerant to an incorrect hue of naturally occurring objects.
abstract_zh: 灰度图像的自动着色是根据灰度先验创建全彩色图像的过程。这是一个不适定问题，因为对于给定的灰度先验，存在许多合理的着色。当前自动着色领域的 SOTA 涉及图像到图像类型的深度卷积神经网络，其中生成对抗网络显示出最大的前景。彩色化的最终目标是生成对人类观看者来说似乎合理的全彩色图像，但人类评估成本高昂且耗时。这项工作评估了常用的客观衡量标准与人类观点的关联程度。我们还尝试确定着色的哪些方面对人类观点影响最显着。对于 BSD 数据集中的 20 个图像中的每一个，我们创建了由局部和全局变化组成的 65 种重新着色。然后使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk 众包收集意见分数，并与图像一起形成一个可扩展的数据集，称为人类评估色彩数据集 (HECD)。虽然我们发现人类意见得分与少量客观指标之间存在统计上显着的相关性，但相关性的强度很低。还有证据表明，人类观察者最不能容忍自然物体的不正确色调。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了自动图像着色中客观评价指标与人类主观评价的相关性，并分析了影响人类评价的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 自动图像着色的客观评价指标与人类感知存在差距，而人类评估成本高昂，需验证客观指标的有效性并确定关键影响因素。
AI.method: 基于BSD数据集生成20张图像的65种着色变体，通过Amazon Mechanical Turk收集人类评分，构建HECD数据集，分析客观指标与评分的相关性。
AI.result: 部分客观指标与人类评分存在统计显著性相关，但相关性较弱；人类对自然物体色调错误最为敏感。
AI.conclusion: 客观指标难以全面反映人类感知，需进一步研究评价体系，同时强调色调准确性对人类评价的关键作用。

authors_text: Mantas Lukoševičius,Arnas Uselis
title: Task-Synchronized Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 任务同步循环神经网络
comment: The 1st version was written in May 2019 and double-blind reviewed for a prominent conference. A major update. We changed the name of the article and methods to an arguably more precise one, and because a very similar title has been published in the meantime. We've rewritten much of the text, connected to the current literature, redone some experiments, figures, discussion, published source code
comments: The 1st version was written in May 2019 and double-blind reviewed for a prominent conference. A major update. We changed the name of the article and methods to an arguably more precise one, and because a very similar title has been published in the meantime. We've rewritten much of the text, connected to the current literature, redone some experiments, figures, discussion, published source code
abstract: Data are often sampled irregularly in time. Dealing with this using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) traditionally involved ignoring the fact, feeding the time differences as additional inputs, or resampling the data. All these methods have their shortcomings. We propose an elegant straightforward alternative approach where instead the RNN is in effect resampled in time to match the time of the data or the task at hand. We use Echo State Network (ESN) and Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) as the basis for our solution. Such RNNs can be seen as discretizations of continuous-time dynamical systems, which gives a solid theoretical ground to our approach. Our Task-Synchronized ESN (TSESN) and GRU (TSGRU) models allow for a direct model time setting and require no additional training, parameter tuning, or computation (solving differential equations or interpolating data) compared to their regular counterparts, thus retaining their original efficiency. We confirm empirically that our models can effectively compensate for the time-non-uniformity of the data and demonstrate that they compare favorably to data resampling, classical RNN methods, and alternative RNN models proposed to deal with time irregularities on several real-world nonuniform-time datasets. We open-source the code at https://github.com/oshapio/task-synchronized-RNNs .
summary: Data are often sampled irregularly in time. Dealing with this using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) traditionally involved ignoring the fact, feeding the time differences as additional inputs, or resampling the data. All these methods have their shortcomings. We propose an elegant straightforward alternative approach where instead the RNN is in effect resampled in time to match the time of the data or the task at hand. We use Echo State Network (ESN) and Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) as the basis for our solution. Such RNNs can be seen as discretizations of continuous-time dynamical systems, which gives a solid theoretical ground to our approach. Our Task-Synchronized ESN (TSESN) and GRU (TSGRU) models allow for a direct model time setting and require no additional training, parameter tuning, or computation (solving differential equations or interpolating data) compared to their regular counterparts, thus retaining their original efficiency. We confirm empirically that our models can effectively compensate for the time-non-uniformity of the data and demonstrate that they compare favorably to data resampling, classical RNN methods, and alternative RNN models proposed to deal with time irregularities on several real-world nonuniform-time datasets. We open-source the code at https://github.com/oshapio/task-synchronized-RNNs .
abstract_zh: 数据通常是不定期采样的。传统上，使用循环神经网络 (RNN) 处理此问题需要忽略这一事实，将时间差作为额外输入，或对数据进行重新采样。所有这些方法都有其缺点。我们提出了一种优雅、直接的替代方法，其中 RNN 实际上会及时重新采样，以匹配数据或手头任务的时间。我们使用回声状态网络（ESN）和门控循环单元（GRU）作为我们解决方案的基础。这种 RNN 可以被视为连续时间动力系统的离散化，这为我们的方法提供了坚实的理论基础。与常规模型相比，我们的任务同步 ESN (TSESN) 和 GRU (TSGRU) 模型允许直接模型时间设置，并且不需要额外的训练、参数调整或计算（求解微分方程或插值数据），从而保留其原始效率。我们凭经验证实，我们的模型可以有效地补偿数据的时间不均匀性，并证明它们与数据重采样、经典 RNN 方法以及为处理几个现实世界非均匀时间数据集上的时间不规则性而提出的替代 RNN 模型相比具有优势。我们在 https://github.com/oshapio/task-synchronized-RNNs 开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为任务同步循环神经网络（Task-Synchronized RNN）的新方法，用于处理时间不规则采样的数据。
AI.motivation: 传统循环神经网络（RNN）在处理不规则时间采样数据时存在不足，如忽略时间差异、额外输入时间差或重采样数据，这些方法均存在缺陷。
AI.method: 通过将RNN与任务时间同步，将其视为连续时间动态系统的离散化，提出任务同步ESN（TSESN）和GRU（TSGRU）模型，无需额外训练或参数调整。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能有效补偿数据的时间非均匀性，在多个真实世界非均匀时间数据集上优于数据重采样、经典RNN及其他替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 任务同步RNN提供了一种高效且无需额外计算的解决方案，为处理不规则时间序列数据提供了理论支持和实践验证。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为任务同步循环神经网络（Task-Synchronized RNN）的新方法，用于处理时间不规则采样的数据。
motivation: 传统循环神经网络（RNN）在处理不规则时间采样数据时存在不足，如忽略时间差异、额外输入时间差或重采样数据，这些方法均存在缺陷。
method: 通过将RNN与任务时间同步，将其视为连续时间动态系统的离散化，提出任务同步ESN（TSESN）和GRU（TSGRU）模型，无需额外训练或参数调整。
result: 实验表明，该模型能有效补偿数据的时间非均匀性，在多个真实世界非均匀时间数据集上优于数据重采样、经典RNN及其他替代方法。
conclusion: 任务同步RNN提供了一种高效且无需额外计算的解决方案，为处理不规则时间序列数据提供了理论支持和实践验证。
search_text: Task-Synchronized Recurrent Neural Networks 任务同步循环神经网络 Data are often sampled irregularly in time. Dealing with this using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) traditionally involved ignoring the fact, feeding the time differences as additional inputs, or resampling the data. All these methods have their shortcomings. We propose an elegant straightforward alternative approach where instead the RNN is in effect resampled in time to match the time of the data or the task at hand. We use Echo State Network (ESN) and Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) as the basis for our solution. Such RNNs can be seen as discretizations of continuous-time dynamical systems, which gives a solid theoretical ground to our approach. Our Task-Synchronized ESN (TSESN) and GRU (TSGRU) models allow for a direct model time setting and require no additional training, parameter tuning, or computation (solving differential equations or interpolating data) compared to their regular counterparts, thus retaining their original efficiency. We confirm empirically that our models can effectively compensate for the time-non-uniformity of the data and demonstrate that they compare favorably to data resampling, classical RNN methods, and alternative RNN models proposed to deal with time irregularities on several real-world nonuniform-time datasets. We open-source the code at https://github.com/oshapio/task-synchronized-RNNs . 数据通常是不定期采样的。传统上，使用循环神经网络 (RNN) 处理此问题需要忽略这一事实，将时间差作为额外输入，或对数据进行重新采样。所有这些方法都有其缺点。我们提出了一种优雅、直接的替代方法，其中 RNN 实际上会及时重新采样，以匹配数据或手头任务的时间。我们使用回声状态网络（ESN）和门控循环单元（GRU）作为我们解决方案的基础。这种 RNN 可以被视为连续时间动力系统的离散化，这为我们的方法提供了坚实的理论基础。与常规模型相比，我们的任务同步 ESN (TSESN) 和 GRU (TSGRU) 模型允许直接模型时间设置，并且不需要额外的训练、参数调整或计算（求解微分方程或插值数据），从而保留其原始效率。我们凭经验证实，我们的模型可以有效地补偿数据的时间不均匀性，并证明它们与数据重采样、经典 RNN 方法以及为处理几个现实世界非均匀时间数据集上的时间不规则性而提出的替代 RNN 模型相比具有优势。我们在 https://github.com/oshapio/task-synchronized-RNNs 开源代码。 本文提出了一种名为任务同步循环神经网络（Task-Synchronized RNN）的新方法，用于处理时间不规则采样的数据。 Mantas Lukoševičius,Arnas Uselis cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Vishal Sunder,Eric Fosler-Lussier,Samuel Thomas,Hong-Kwang J. Kuo,Brian Kingsbury
title: Tokenwise Contrastive Pretraining for Finer Speech-to-BERT Alignment in End-to-End Speech-to-Intent Systems
title_zh: 用于端到端语音到意图系统中更精细的语音到 BERT 对齐的 Tokenwise 对比预训练
abstract: Recent advances in End-to-End (E2E) Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) have been primarily due to effective pretraining of speech representations. One such pretraining paradigm is the distillation of semantic knowledge from state-of-the-art text-based models like BERT to speech encoder neural networks. This work is a step towards doing the same in a much more efficient and fine-grained manner where we align speech embeddings and BERT embeddings on a token-by-token basis. We introduce a simple yet novel technique that uses a cross-modal attention mechanism to extract token-level contextual embeddings from a speech encoder such that these can be directly compared and aligned with BERT based contextual embeddings. This alignment is performed using a novel tokenwise contrastive loss. Fine-tuning such a pretrained model to perform intent recognition using speech directly yields state-of-the-art performance on two widely used SLU datasets. Our model improves further when fine-tuned with additional regularization using SpecAugment especially when speech is noisy, giving an absolute improvement as high as 8% over previous results.
summary: Recent advances in End-to-End (E2E) Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) have been primarily due to effective pretraining of speech representations. One such pretraining paradigm is the distillation of semantic knowledge from state-of-the-art text-based models like BERT to speech encoder neural networks. This work is a step towards doing the same in a much more efficient and fine-grained manner where we align speech embeddings and BERT embeddings on a token-by-token basis. We introduce a simple yet novel technique that uses a cross-modal attention mechanism to extract token-level contextual embeddings from a speech encoder such that these can be directly compared and aligned with BERT based contextual embeddings. This alignment is performed using a novel tokenwise contrastive loss. Fine-tuning such a pretrained model to perform intent recognition using speech directly yields state-of-the-art performance on two widely used SLU datasets. Our model improves further when fine-tuned with additional regularization using SpecAugment especially when speech is noisy, giving an absolute improvement as high as 8% over previous results.
abstract_zh: 端到端 (E2E) 口语理解 (SLU) 的最新进展主要归功于语音表示的有效预训练。其中一种预训练范式是将语义知识从最先进的基于文本的模型（如 BERT）提炼到语音编码器神经网络。这项工作是朝着以更高效、更细粒度的方式做同样的事情迈出的一步，我们在逐个令牌的基础上对齐语音嵌入和 BERT 嵌入。我们引入了一种简单而新颖的技术，该技术使用跨模式注意机制从语音编码器中提取令牌级上下文嵌入，以便可以将它们直接与基于 BERT 的上下文嵌入进行比较和对齐。这种对齐是使用一种新颖的标记对比损失来执行的。对这样的预训练模型进行微调，以直接使用语音执行意图识别，从而在两个广泛使用的 SLU 数据集上产生最先进的性能。当使用 SpecAugment 进行额外的正则化微调时，我们的模型得到了进一步的改进，特别是当语音有噪声时，与之前的结果相比，绝对改进高达 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于逐词对比预训练的方法，以提升端到端语音到意图系统中语音与BERT嵌入的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练方法在语音表示学习中效率不足且粒度粗糙，难以有效对齐语音嵌入与文本模型（如BERT）的上下文嵌入。
AI.method: 引入跨模态注意力机制提取语音编码器的词级上下文嵌入，并通过新型逐词对比损失直接与BERT嵌入对齐。
AI.result: 在两个主流SLU数据集上达到最先进性能，结合SpecAugment正则化后，在噪声语音场景下绝对提升高达8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过细粒度对齐显著提升语音意图识别效果，尤其在噪声环境下表现优异，为高效预训练提供新思路。

authors_text: Pratyusha Sharma,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Valts Blukis,Chris Paxton,Tucker Hermans,Antonio Torralba,Jacob Andreas,Dieter Fox
title: Correcting Robot Plans with Natural Language Feedback
title_zh: 使用自然语言反馈纠正机器人计划
abstract: When humans design cost or goal specifications for robots, they often produce specifications that are ambiguous, underspecified, or beyond planners' ability to solve. In these cases, corrections provide a valuable tool for human-in-the-loop robot control. Corrections might take the form of new goal specifications, new constraints (e.g. to avoid specific objects), or hints for planning algorithms (e.g. to visit specific waypoints). Existing correction methods (e.g. using a joystick or direct manipulation of an end effector) require full teleoperation or real-time interaction. In this paper, we explore natural language as an expressive and flexible tool for robot correction. We describe how to map from natural language sentences to transformations of cost functions. We show that these transformations enable users to correct goals, update robot motions to accommodate additional user preferences, and recover from planning errors. These corrections can be leveraged to get 81% and 93% success rates on tasks where the original planner failed, with either one or two language corrections. Our method makes it possible to compose multiple constraints and generalizes to unseen scenes, objects, and sentences in simulated environments and real-world environments.
summary: When humans design cost or goal specifications for robots, they often produce specifications that are ambiguous, underspecified, or beyond planners' ability to solve. In these cases, corrections provide a valuable tool for human-in-the-loop robot control. Corrections might take the form of new goal specifications, new constraints (e.g. to avoid specific objects), or hints for planning algorithms (e.g. to visit specific waypoints). Existing correction methods (e.g. using a joystick or direct manipulation of an end effector) require full teleoperation or real-time interaction. In this paper, we explore natural language as an expressive and flexible tool for robot correction. We describe how to map from natural language sentences to transformations of cost functions. We show that these transformations enable users to correct goals, update robot motions to accommodate additional user preferences, and recover from planning errors. These corrections can be leveraged to get 81% and 93% success rates on tasks where the original planner failed, with either one or two language corrections. Our method makes it possible to compose multiple constraints and generalizes to unseen scenes, objects, and sentences in simulated environments and real-world environments.
abstract_zh: 当人类为机器人设计成本或目标规格时，他们经常会产生模糊、不明确或超出规划者解决能力的规格。在这些情况下，校正为人在环机器人控制提供了宝贵的工具。修正可能采取新目标规范、新约束（例如，避免特定物体）或规划算法提示（例如，访问特定路径点）的形式。现有的校正方法（例如使用操纵杆或直接操纵末端执行器）需要完全远程操作或实时交互。在本文中，我们探索自然语言作为机器人校正的一种富有表现力和灵活的工具。我们描述了如何从自然语言句子映射到成本函数的转换。我们表明，这些转换使用户能够纠正目标、更新机器人动作以适应其他用户偏好，并从计划错误中恢复。通过一两次语言修正，这些修正可以使原始计划者失败的任务获得 81% 和 93% 的成功率。我们的方法使得组合多个约束成为可能，并推广到模拟环境和现实环境中未见过的场景、对象和句子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过自然语言反馈纠正机器人计划的方法，将用户语言转化为成本函数调整，提升机器人任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人纠正方法依赖实时交互或全遥控，灵活性差。自然语言作为更通用的表达方式，能有效处理复杂约束和用户意图。
AI.method: 构建自然语言到成本函数转换的映射机制，允许用户通过语言调整目标、添加约束或修正规划错误，支持多约束组合与场景泛化。
AI.result: 在原始规划失败的任务中，单次/两次语言纠正使成功率分别达81%和93%，方法适用于模拟与真实环境中的新场景和未见过的对象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自然语言实现高效、灵活的机器人计划修正，为复杂场景下的人机协作提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Our method makes it possible to compose multiple constraints and generalizes to unseen scenes, objects, and sentences in simulated environments and real-world environments. 当人类为机器人设计成本或目标规格时，他们经常会产生模糊、不明确或超出规划者解决能力的规格。在这些情况下，校正为人在环机器人控制提供了宝贵的工具。修正可能采取新目标规范、新约束（例如，避免特定物体）或规划算法提示（例如，访问特定路径点）的形式。现有的校正方法（例如使用操纵杆或直接操纵末端执行器）需要完全远程操作或实时交互。在本文中，我们探索自然语言作为机器人校正的一种富有表现力和灵活的工具。我们描述了如何从自然语言句子映射到成本函数的转换。我们表明，这些转换使用户能够纠正目标、更新机器人动作以适应其他用户偏好，并从计划错误中恢复。通过一两次语言修正，这些修正可以使原始计划者失败的任务获得 81% 和 93% 的成功率。我们的方法使得组合多个约束成为可能，并推广到模拟环境和现实环境中未见过的场景、对象和句子。 本文提出一种通过自然语言反馈纠正机器人计划的方法，将用户语言转化为成本函数调整，提升机器人任务成功率。 Pratyusha Sharma,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Valts Blukis,Chris Paxton,Tucker Hermans,Antonio Torralba,Jacob Andreas,Dieter Fox cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vishal Sunder,Prashant Serai,Eric Fosler-Lussier
title: Building an ASR Error Robust Spoken Virtual Patient System in a Highly Class-Imbalanced Scenario Without Speech Data
title_zh: 在没有语音数据的高度类不平衡场景中构建 ASR 错误鲁棒语音虚拟患者系统
abstract: A Virtual Patient (VP) is a powerful tool for training medical students to take patient histories, where responding to a diverse set of spoken questions is essential to simulate natural conversations with a student. The performance of such a Spoken Language Understanding system (SLU) can be adversely affected by both the presence of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) errors in the test data and a high degree of class imbalance in the SLU training data. While these two issues have been addressed separately in prior work, we develop a novel two-step training methodology that tackles both these issues effectively in a single dialog agent. As it is difficult to collect spoken data from users without a functioning SLU system, our method does not rely on spoken data for training, rather we use an ASR error predictor to "speechify" the text data. Our method shows significant improvements over strong baselines on the VP intent classification task at various word error rate settings.
summary: A Virtual Patient (VP) is a powerful tool for training medical students to take patient histories, where responding to a diverse set of spoken questions is essential to simulate natural conversations with a student. The performance of such a Spoken Language Understanding system (SLU) can be adversely affected by both the presence of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) errors in the test data and a high degree of class imbalance in the SLU training data. While these two issues have been addressed separately in prior work, we develop a novel two-step training methodology that tackles both these issues effectively in a single dialog agent. As it is difficult to collect spoken data from users without a functioning SLU system, our method does not rely on spoken data for training, rather we use an ASR error predictor to "speechify" the text data. Our method shows significant improvements over strong baselines on the VP intent classification task at various word error rate settings.
abstract_zh: 虚拟患者 (VP) 是训练医学生了解患者病史的强大工具，其中回答各种口头问题对于模拟与学生的自然对话至关重要。这种口语理解系统 (SLU) 的性能可能会因测试数据中存在的自动语音识别 (ASR) 错误以及 SLU 训练数据中的高度类别不平衡而受到不利影响。虽然这两个问题在之前的工作中已分别解决，但我们开发了一种新颖的两步训练方法，可以在单个对话代理中有效地解决这两个问题。由于在没有正常运行的 SLU 系统的情况下很难从用户那里收集语音数据，因此我们的方法不依赖语音数据进行训练，而是使用 ASR 错误预测器来“语音化”文本数据。我们的方法在各种单词错误率设置下显示了 VP 意图分类任务的强大基线的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在无语音数据情况下，构建具有ASR错误鲁棒性的语音虚拟患者系统的方法，以解决类不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别处理ASR错误和类不平衡问题，但缺乏同时解决两者的方法，且难以获取训练用的语音数据。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练方法，利用ASR错误预测器将文本数据转换为语音特征，无需真实语音数据即可训练对话代理。
AI.result: 在不同词错误率设置下，该方法在虚拟患者意图分类任务中显著优于现有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成语音数据有效解决了ASR错误和类不平衡问题，为无语音数据场景下的医疗对话系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lin Zhang,Xin Wang,Erica Cooper,Nicholas Evans,Junichi Yamagishi
title: The PartialSpoof Database and Countermeasures for the Detection of Short Fake Speech Segments Embedded in an Utterance
title_zh: PartialSpoof 数据库和检测嵌入在话语中的短假语音片段的对策
comment: Published in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing (DOI: 10.1109/TASLP.2022.3233236)
comments: Published in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing (DOI: 10.1109/TASLP.2022.3233236)
abstract: Automatic speaker verification is susceptible to various manipulations and spoofing, such as text-to-speech synthesis, voice conversion, replay, tampering, adversarial attacks, and so on. We consider a new spoofing scenario called "Partial Spoof" (PS) in which synthesized or transformed speech segments are embedded into a bona fide utterance. While existing countermeasures (CMs) can detect fully spoofed utterances, there is a need for their adaptation or extension to the PS scenario. We propose various improvements to construct a significantly more accurate CM that can detect and locate short-generated spoofed speech segments at finer temporal resolutions. First, we introduce newly developed self-supervised pre-trained models as enhanced feature extractors. Second, we extend our PartialSpoof database by adding segment labels for various temporal resolutions. Since the short spoofed speech segments to be embedded by attackers are of variable length, six different temporal resolutions are considered, ranging from as short as 20 ms to as large as 640 ms. Third, we propose a new CM that enables the simultaneous use of the segment-level labels at different temporal resolutions as well as utterance-level labels to execute utterance- and segment-level detection at the same time. We also show that the proposed CM is capable of detecting spoofing at the utterance level with low error rates in the PS scenario as well as in a related logical access (LA) scenario. The equal error rates of utterance-level detection on the PartialSpoof database and ASVspoof 2019 LA database were 0.77 and 0.90%, respectively.
summary: Automatic speaker verification is susceptible to various manipulations and spoofing, such as text-to-speech synthesis, voice conversion, replay, tampering, adversarial attacks, and so on. We consider a new spoofing scenario called "Partial Spoof" (PS) in which synthesized or transformed speech segments are embedded into a bona fide utterance. While existing countermeasures (CMs) can detect fully spoofed utterances, there is a need for their adaptation or extension to the PS scenario. We propose various improvements to construct a significantly more accurate CM that can detect and locate short-generated spoofed speech segments at finer temporal resolutions. First, we introduce newly developed self-supervised pre-trained models as enhanced feature extractors. Second, we extend our PartialSpoof database by adding segment labels for various temporal resolutions. Since the short spoofed speech segments to be embedded by attackers are of variable length, six different temporal resolutions are considered, ranging from as short as 20 ms to as large as 640 ms. Third, we propose a new CM that enables the simultaneous use of the segment-level labels at different temporal resolutions as well as utterance-level labels to execute utterance- and segment-level detection at the same time. We also show that the proposed CM is capable of detecting spoofing at the utterance level with low error rates in the PS scenario as well as in a related logical access (LA) scenario. The equal error rates of utterance-level detection on the PartialSpoof database and ASVspoof 2019 LA database were 0.77 and 0.90%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证容易受到各种操纵和欺骗，例如文本到语音合成、语音转换、重放、篡改、对抗性攻击等。我们考虑一种称为“部分欺骗”（PS）的新欺骗场景，其中合成或转换的语音片段被嵌入到真实的话语中。虽然现有的对策 (CM) 可以检测完全欺骗的话语，但仍需要对其进行调整或扩展以适应 PS 场景。我们提出了各种改进来构建一个更加准确的 CM，该 CM 可以以更精细的时间分辨率检测和定位短生成的欺骗语音片段。首先，我们引入新开发的自监督预训练模型作为增强的特征提取器。其次，我们通过添加各种时间分辨率的分段标签来扩展 PartialSpoof 数据库。由于攻击者要嵌入的短欺骗语音段的长度是可变的，因此考虑了六种不同的时间分辨率，范围从短至 20 ms 到大至 640 ms。第三，我们提出了一种新的 CM，它能够同时使用不同时间分辨率的段级标签以及话语级标签来同时执行话语级和段级检测。我们还表明，所提出的 CM 能够在 PS 场景以及相关逻辑访问 (LA) 场景中以低错误率检测话语级别的欺骗。 PartialSpoof 数据库和 ASVspoof 2019 LA 数据库的话语级检测的等错误率分别为 0.77 和 0.90%。

AI.tldr: 构建PartialSpoof数据库及改进反制措施，用于检测嵌入真实语音中的短伪造语音片段。
AI.motivation: 现有反制措施难以检测嵌入真实语音中的短伪造片段（Partial Spoof），需改进检测方法并扩展数据库标注。
AI.method: 引入自监督预训练模型作为特征提取器，扩展数据库至六种时间分辨率（20ms-640ms），设计可同时处理片段级与整体级检测的新型反制措施。
AI.result: 在PartialSpoof数据库和ASVspoof 2019 LA数据库上，整体检测错误率分别为0.77%和0.90%。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升了短伪造语音片段的检测精度，适用于部分伪造及逻辑访问场景。

authors_text: Arushi Jain,Sharan Vaswani,Reza Babanezhad,Csaba Szepesvari,Doina Precup
title: Towards Painless Policy Optimization for Constrained MDPs
title_zh: 为受约束的 MDP 实现无痛策略优化
abstract: We study policy optimization in an infinite horizon, $γ$-discounted constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). Our objective is to return a policy that achieves large expected reward with a small constraint violation. We consider the online setting with linear function approximation and assume global access to the corresponding features. We propose a generic primal-dual framework that allows us to bound the reward sub-optimality and constraint violation for arbitrary algorithms in terms of their primal and dual regret on online linear optimization problems. We instantiate this framework to use coin-betting algorithms and propose the Coin Betting Politex (CBP) algorithm. Assuming that the action-value functions are $\varepsilon_b$-close to the span of the $d$-dimensional state-action features and no sampling errors, we prove that $T$ iterations of CBP result in an $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^3 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b\sqrt{d}}{(1 - γ)^2} \right)$ reward sub-optimality and an $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^2 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b \sqrt{d}}{1 - γ} \right)$ constraint violation. Importantly, unlike gradient descent-ascent and other recent methods, CBP does not require extensive hyperparameter tuning. Via experiments on synthetic and Cartpole environments, we demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of CBP.
summary: We study policy optimization in an infinite horizon, $γ$-discounted constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). Our objective is to return a policy that achieves large expected reward with a small constraint violation. We consider the online setting with linear function approximation and assume global access to the corresponding features. We propose a generic primal-dual framework that allows us to bound the reward sub-optimality and constraint violation for arbitrary algorithms in terms of their primal and dual regret on online linear optimization problems. We instantiate this framework to use coin-betting algorithms and propose the Coin Betting Politex (CBP) algorithm. Assuming that the action-value functions are $\varepsilon_b$-close to the span of the $d$-dimensional state-action features and no sampling errors, we prove that $T$ iterations of CBP result in an $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^3 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b\sqrt{d}}{(1 - γ)^2} \right)$ reward sub-optimality and an $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^2 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b \sqrt{d}}{1 - γ} \right)$ constraint violation. Importantly, unlike gradient descent-ascent and other recent methods, CBP does not require extensive hyperparameter tuning. Via experiments on synthetic and Cartpole environments, we demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of CBP.
abstract_zh: 我们研究无限视野、$γ$折扣约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）中的政策优化。我们的目标是返回一个以较小的约束违规实现较大预期奖励的策略。我们考虑使用线性函数近似的在线设置，并假设对相应特征的全局访问。我们提出了一个通用的原始-对偶框架，允许我们根据在线线性优化问题的原始和对偶遗憾来限制任意算法的奖励次优性和约束违规。我们实例化该框架以使用硬币投注算法，并提出硬币投注 Politex (CBP) 算法。假设动作值函数$\varepsilon_b$接近$d$维状态动作特征的范围并且没有采样误差，我们证明CBP的$T$迭代会产生$O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^3 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b\sqrt{d}}{(1 - γ)^2} \right)$奖励次优性和 $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^2 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b \sqrt{d}}{1 - γ} \right)$ 约束违规。重要的是，与梯度下降-上升和其他最近的方法不同，CBP 不需要大量的超参数调整。通过在合成环境和 Cartpole 环境中进行的实验，我们证明了 CBP 的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需复杂超参数调整的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）策略优化方法，通过结合对偶框架与硬币下注算法实现奖励最大化与约束违规最小化。
AI.motivation: 现有约束策略优化方法（如梯度下降-上升）依赖繁琐的超参数调优，且难以平衡奖励与约束目标，亟需一种通用且鲁棒的优化框架。
AI.method: 构建通用原-对偶框架，将CMDP问题转化为在线线性优化的对偶 regret 分析，结合硬币下注算法设计 Coin Betting Politex（CBP）算法，并利用线性函数逼近理论证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 理论证明CBP算法在T次迭代后可达到O(1/(1-γ)^3√T)的奖励次优性和O(1/(1-γ)^2√T)的约束违规率，合成实验与Cartpole环境验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CBP算法通过原-对偶框架与硬币下注机制，在无需超参数调优的情况下实现了约束策略优化的高效性与稳定性，为CMDP问题提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Towards Painless Policy Optimization for Constrained MDPs 为受约束的 MDP 实现无痛策略优化 We study policy optimization in an infinite horizon, $γ$-discounted constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). Our objective is to return a policy that achieves large expected reward with a small constraint violation. We consider the online setting with linear function approximation and assume global access to the corresponding features. We propose a generic primal-dual framework that allows us to bound the reward sub-optimality and constraint violation for arbitrary algorithms in terms of their primal and dual regret on online linear optimization problems. We instantiate this framework to use coin-betting algorithms and propose the Coin Betting Politex (CBP) algorithm. Importantly, unlike gradient descent-ascent and other recent methods, CBP does not require extensive hyperparameter tuning. Via experiments on synthetic and Cartpole environments, we demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of CBP. 我们研究无限视野、$γ$折扣约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）中的政策优化。我们的目标是返回一个以较小的约束违规实现较大预期奖励的策略。我们考虑使用线性函数近似的在线设置，并假设对相应特征的全局访问。我们提出了一个通用的原始-对偶框架，允许我们根据在线线性优化问题的原始和对偶遗憾来限制任意算法的奖励次优性和约束违规。我们实例化该框架以使用硬币投注算法，并提出硬币投注 Politex (CBP) 算法。假设动作值函数$\varepsilon_b$接近$d$维状态动作特征的范围并且没有采样误差，我们证明CBP的$T$迭代会产生$O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^3 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b\sqrt{d}}{(1 - γ)^2} \right)$奖励次优性和 $O\left(\frac{1}{(1 - γ)^2 \sqrt{T}} + \frac{\varepsilon_b \sqrt{d}}{1 - γ} \right)$ 约束违规。重要的是，与梯度下降-上升和其他最近的方法不同，CBP 不需要大量的超参数调整。通过在合成环境和 Cartpole 环境中进行的实验，我们证明了 CBP 的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种无需复杂超参数调整的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）策略优化方法，通过结合对偶框架与硬币下注算法实现奖励最大化与约束违规最小化。 Arushi Jain,Sharan Vaswani,Reza Babanezhad,Csaba Szepesvari,Doina Precup cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Peter Steinbach,Felicita Gernhardt,Mahnoor Tanveer,Steve Schmerler,Sebastian Starke
title: Machine Learning State-of-the-Art with Uncertainties
title_zh: 最先进的机器学习，但存在不确定性
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the ICLR2022 workshop on ML Evaluation Standards. Code to reproduce results can be obtained from https://github.com/psteinb/sota_on_uncertainties.git
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the ICLR2022 workshop on ML Evaluation Standards. Code to reproduce results can be obtained from https://github.com/psteinb/sota_on_uncertainties.git
abstract: With the availability of data, hardware, software ecosystem and relevant skill sets, the machine learning community is undergoing a rapid development with new architectures and approaches appearing at high frequency every year. In this article, we conduct an exemplary image classification study in order to demonstrate how confidence intervals around accuracy measurements can greatly enhance the communication of research results as well as impact the reviewing process. In addition, we explore the hallmarks and limitations of this approximation. We discuss the relevance of this approach reflecting on a spotlight publication of ICLR22. A reproducible workflow is made available as an open-source adjoint to this publication. Based on our discussion, we make suggestions for improving the authoring and reviewing process of machine learning articles.
summary: With the availability of data, hardware, software ecosystem and relevant skill sets, the machine learning community is undergoing a rapid development with new architectures and approaches appearing at high frequency every year. In this article, we conduct an exemplary image classification study in order to demonstrate how confidence intervals around accuracy measurements can greatly enhance the communication of research results as well as impact the reviewing process. In addition, we explore the hallmarks and limitations of this approximation. We discuss the relevance of this approach reflecting on a spotlight publication of ICLR22. A reproducible workflow is made available as an open-source adjoint to this publication. Based on our discussion, we make suggestions for improving the authoring and reviewing process of machine learning articles.
abstract_zh: 随着数据、硬件、软件生态系统和相关技能的可用性，机器学习社区正在快速发展，每年都会频繁出现新的架构和方法。在本文中，我们进行了一项示例性图像分类研究，以证明准确度测量的置信区间如何极大地增强研究结果的交流并影响审查过程。此外，我们还探讨了这种近似的特点和局限性。我们讨论了这种方法的相关性，反映了 ICLR22 的焦点出版物。可重复的工作流程作为本出版物的开源附件提供。根据我们的讨论，我们提出了改进机器学习文章的创作和审阅流程的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过图像分类研究展示如何利用置信区间提升机器学习研究结果的沟通效率，并探讨该方法的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习领域发展迅速，但研究结果的不确定性常被忽视，需通过量化不确定性改进学术交流与评审流程。
AI.method: 以图像分类任务为例，构建可复现的开源工作流，分析置信区间对结果表达的影响，并结合ICLR22论文进行案例讨论。
AI.result: 发现置信区间能更准确反映模型性能波动，提出在论文撰写与评审中增加不确定性分析的建议。
AI.conclusion: 引入置信区间可提升机器学习研究的透明度与可重复性，需在学术社区推广该实践以优化研究评估标准。

authors_text: Bin Jiang,Zhihao Li,M. Salman Asif,Xun Cao,Zhan Ma
title: Event Transformer
title_zh: 事件转换器
abstract: The event camera's low power consumption and ability to capture microsecond brightness changes make it attractive for various computer vision tasks. Existing event representation methods typically convert events into frames, voxel grids, or spikes for deep neural networks (DNNs). However, these approaches often sacrifice temporal granularity or require specialized devices for processing. This work introduces a novel token-based event representation, where each event is considered a fundamental processing unit termed an event-token. This approach preserves the sequence's intricate spatiotemporal attributes at the event level. Moreover, we propose a Three-way Attention mechanism in the Event Transformer Block (ETB) to collaboratively construct temporal and spatial correlations between events. We compare our proposed token-based event representation extensively with other prevalent methods for object classification and optical flow estimation. The experimental results showcase its competitive performance while demanding minimal computational resources on standard devices. Our code is publicly accessible at \url{https://github.com/NJUVISION/EventTransformer}.
summary: The event camera's low power consumption and ability to capture microsecond brightness changes make it attractive for various computer vision tasks. Existing event representation methods typically convert events into frames, voxel grids, or spikes for deep neural networks (DNNs). However, these approaches often sacrifice temporal granularity or require specialized devices for processing. This work introduces a novel token-based event representation, where each event is considered a fundamental processing unit termed an event-token. This approach preserves the sequence's intricate spatiotemporal attributes at the event level. Moreover, we propose a Three-way Attention mechanism in the Event Transformer Block (ETB) to collaboratively construct temporal and spatial correlations between events. We compare our proposed token-based event representation extensively with other prevalent methods for object classification and optical flow estimation. The experimental results showcase its competitive performance while demanding minimal computational resources on standard devices. Our code is publicly accessible at \url{https://github.com/NJUVISION/EventTransformer}.
abstract_zh: 事件相机的低功耗和捕获微秒亮度变化的能力使其对各种计算机视觉任务具有吸引力。现有的事件表示方法通常将事件转换为深度神经网络 (DNN) 的帧、体素网格或尖峰。然而，这些方法通常会牺牲时间粒度或需要专门的设备进行处理。这项工作引入了一种新颖的基于令牌的事件表示，其中每个事件都被视为称为事件令牌的基本处理单元。这种方法在事件级别保留了序列复杂的时空属性。此外，我们在事件转换器块（ETB）中提出了一种三向注意力机制，以协作构建事件之间的时间和空间相关性。我们将我们提出的基于标记的事件表示与其他流行的对象分类和光流估计方法进行了广泛比较。实验结果展示了其具有竞争力的性能，同时在标准设备上要求最少的计算资源。我们的代码可通过 \url{https://github.com/NJUVISION/EventTransformer} 公开访问。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于事件标记的新型事件表示方法及三向注意力机制，用于高效处理事件相机数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在时间粒度或设备需求上存在不足，需更高效处理事件数据。
AI.method: 引入事件标记作为基本处理单元，并设计三向注意力机制的事件转换器块（ETB）以捕捉时空关系。
AI.result: 在标准设备上实现高竞争力，计算资源需求低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效保留时空特征，适用于多种任务，代码开源促进应用。

search_text: Event Transformer 事件转换器 The event camera's low power consumption and ability to capture microsecond brightness changes make it attractive for various computer vision tasks. Existing event representation methods typically convert events into frames, voxel grids, or spikes for deep neural networks (DNNs). However, these approaches often sacrifice temporal granularity or require specialized devices for processing. This work introduces a novel token-based event representation, where each event is considered a fundamental processing unit termed an event-token. This approach preserves the sequence's intricate spatiotemporal attributes at the event level. Moreover, we propose a Three-way Attention mechanism in the Event Transformer Block (ETB) to collaboratively construct temporal and spatial correlations between events. We compare our proposed token-based event representation extensively with other prevalent methods for object classification and optical flow estimation. The experimental results showcase its competitive performance while demanding minimal computational resources on standard devices. Our code is publicly accessible at \url{https://github.com/NJUVISION/EventTransformer}. 事件相机的低功耗和捕获微秒亮度变化的能力使其对各种计算机视觉任务具有吸引力。现有的事件表示方法通常将事件转换为深度神经网络 (DNN) 的帧、体素网格或尖峰。然而，这些方法通常会牺牲时间粒度或需要专门的设备进行处理。这项工作引入了一种新颖的基于令牌的事件表示，其中每个事件都被视为称为事件令牌的基本处理单元。这种方法在事件级别保留了序列复杂的时空属性。此外，我们在事件转换器块（ETB）中提出了一种三向注意力机制，以协作构建事件之间的时间和空间相关性。我们将我们提出的基于标记的事件表示与其他流行的对象分类和光流估计方法进行了广泛比较。实验结果展示了其具有竞争力的性能，同时在标准设备上要求最少的计算资源。我们的代码可通过 \url{https://github.com/NJUVISION/EventTransformer} 公开访问。 提出一种基于事件标记的新型事件表示方法及三向注意力机制，用于高效处理事件相机数据。 Bin Jiang,Zhihao Li,M. Salman Asif,Xun Cao,Zhan Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Vishal Sunder,Samuel Thomas,Hong-Kwang J. Kuo,Jatin Ganhotra,Brian Kingsbury,Eric Fosler-Lussier
title: Towards End-to-End Integration of Dialog History for Improved Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 实现对话历史的端到端集成以提高口语理解
abstract: Dialog history plays an important role in spoken language understanding (SLU) performance in a dialog system. For end-to-end (E2E) SLU, previous work has used dialog history in text form, which makes the model dependent on a cascaded automatic speech recognizer (ASR). This rescinds the benefits of an E2E system which is intended to be compact and robust to ASR errors. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical conversation model that is capable of directly using dialog history in speech form, making it fully E2E. We also distill semantic knowledge from the available gold conversation transcripts by jointly training a similar text-based conversation model with an explicit tying of acoustic and semantic embeddings. We also propose a novel technique that we call DropFrame to deal with the long training time incurred by adding dialog history in an E2E manner. On the HarperValleyBank dialog dataset, our E2E history integration outperforms a history independent baseline by 7.7% absolute F1 score on the task of dialog action recognition. Our model performs competitively with the state-of-the-art history based cascaded baseline, but uses 48% fewer parameters. In the absence of gold transcripts to fine-tune an ASR model, our model outperforms this baseline by a significant margin of 10% absolute F1 score.
summary: Dialog history plays an important role in spoken language understanding (SLU) performance in a dialog system. For end-to-end (E2E) SLU, previous work has used dialog history in text form, which makes the model dependent on a cascaded automatic speech recognizer (ASR). This rescinds the benefits of an E2E system which is intended to be compact and robust to ASR errors. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical conversation model that is capable of directly using dialog history in speech form, making it fully E2E. We also distill semantic knowledge from the available gold conversation transcripts by jointly training a similar text-based conversation model with an explicit tying of acoustic and semantic embeddings. We also propose a novel technique that we call DropFrame to deal with the long training time incurred by adding dialog history in an E2E manner. On the HarperValleyBank dialog dataset, our E2E history integration outperforms a history independent baseline by 7.7% absolute F1 score on the task of dialog action recognition. Our model performs competitively with the state-of-the-art history based cascaded baseline, but uses 48% fewer parameters. In the absence of gold transcripts to fine-tune an ASR model, our model outperforms this baseline by a significant margin of 10% absolute F1 score.
abstract_zh: 对话历史记录在对话系统中的口语理解 (SLU) 性能中发挥着重要作用。对于端到端（E2E）SLU，之前的工作使用了文本形式的对话历史记录，这使得模型依赖于级联的自动语音识别器（ASR）。这抵消了 E2E 系统的优势，该系统旨在紧凑且对 ASR 错误具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层对话模型，能够直接使用语音形式的对话历史记录，使其完全端到端。我们还通过联合训练类似的基于文本的对话模型以及声学和语义嵌入的显式绑定，从可用的黄金对话笔录中提取语义知识。我们还提出了一种称为 DropFrame 的新技术来处理以 E2E 方式添加对话历史记录所带来的较长训练时间。在 HarperValleyBank 对话数据集上，我们的 E2E 历史集成在对话动作识别任务上的绝对 F1 分数比历史独立基线高 7.7%。我们的模型的性能与最先进的基于历史的级联基线相当，但使用的参数减少了 48%。在缺乏黄金转录本来微调 ASR 模型的情况下，我们的模型的表现优于此基线，绝对 F1 分数显着提高 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的对话历史集成方法，用于改进口语语言理解（SLU）系统，直接利用语音形式的对话历史，减少对自动语音识别（ASR）的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端SLU模型依赖文本形式的对话历史，需依赖ASR模块，导致系统复杂且易受ASR误差影响。本文旨在构建完全端到端的模型，直接处理语音形式的对话历史，提升鲁棒性并减少参数量。
AI.method: 设计分层对话模型直接处理语音形式的对话历史；通过知识蒸馏从黄金对话转录本中提取语义信息，联合训练文本模型并绑定声学与语义嵌入；提出DropFrame技术解决端到端集成带来的长训练时间问题。
AI.result: 在HarperValleyBank数据集上，对话动作识别任务较无历史基线提升7.7% F1分数；参数量比级联基线减少48%，且在无黄金转录本时超越级联基线10% F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 端到端对话历史集成方法有效提升了SLU性能，同时减少参数量，证明了直接处理语音历史的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Leye Wang
title: The Principle of Least Sensing: A Privacy-Friendly Sensing Paradigm for Urban Big Data Analytics
title_zh: 最少感知原则：城市大数据分析的隐私友好感知范式
comment: ef:XRDS: Crossroads, The ACM Magazine for Students, Volume 28, Issue 3, Spring 2022, pp 56-59
comments: ef:XRDS: Crossroads, The ACM Magazine for Students, Volume 28, Issue 3, Spring 2022, pp 56-59
abstract: With the worldwide emergence of data protection regulations, how to conduct law-regulated big data analytics becomes a challenging and fundamental problem. This article introduces the principle of least sensing, a promising sensing paradigm toward law-regulated big data analytics.
summary: With the worldwide emergence of data protection regulations, how to conduct law-regulated big data analytics becomes a challenging and fundamental problem. This article introduces the principle of least sensing, a promising sensing paradigm toward law-regulated big data analytics.
abstract_zh: 随着数据保护法规在全球范围内的兴起，如何进行受法律监管的大数据分析成为一个具有挑战性的基本问题。本文介绍了最小传感原理，这是一种有前途的法律监管大数据分析传感范式。

AI.tldr: 提出一种隐私友好的感知范式——最少感知原则，以应对数据保护法规下的城市大数据分析挑战。
AI.motivation: 全球数据保护法规的出台使合法大数据分析面临隐私与数据利用的矛盾，亟需新范式平衡二者。
AI.method: 通过限制数据采集范围与处理粒度，仅保留必要信息以满足分析需求，降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.result: 构建了符合法规要求的隐私保护框架，为城市大数据分析提供了可落地的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 最少感知原则为隐私保护与数据价值挖掘的协同提供了理论支撑，推动智慧城市合规发展。

authors_text: Cuong Tran,Keyu Zhu,Ferdinando Fioretto,Pascal Van Hentenryck
title: SF-PATE: Scalable, Fair, and Private Aggregation of Teacher Ensembles
title_zh: SF-PATE：可扩展、公平且私密的教师集合聚合
abstract: A critical concern in data-driven processes is to build models whose outcomes do not discriminate against some demographic groups, including gender, ethnicity, or age. To ensure non-discrimination in learning tasks, knowledge of the group attributes is essential. However, in practice, these attributes may not be available due to legal and ethical requirements. To address this challenge, this paper studies a model that protects the privacy of the individuals' sensitive information while also allowing it to learn non-discriminatory predictors. A key characteristic of the proposed model is to enable the adoption of off-the-selves and non-private fair models to create a privacy-preserving and fair model. The paper analyzes the relation between accuracy, privacy, and fairness, and the experimental evaluation illustrates the benefits of the proposed models on several prediction tasks. In particular, this proposal is the first to allow both scalable and accurate training of private and fair models for very large neural networks.
summary: A critical concern in data-driven processes is to build models whose outcomes do not discriminate against some demographic groups, including gender, ethnicity, or age. To ensure non-discrimination in learning tasks, knowledge of the group attributes is essential. However, in practice, these attributes may not be available due to legal and ethical requirements. To address this challenge, this paper studies a model that protects the privacy of the individuals' sensitive information while also allowing it to learn non-discriminatory predictors. A key characteristic of the proposed model is to enable the adoption of off-the-selves and non-private fair models to create a privacy-preserving and fair model. The paper analyzes the relation between accuracy, privacy, and fairness, and the experimental evaluation illustrates the benefits of the proposed models on several prediction tasks. In particular, this proposal is the first to allow both scalable and accurate training of private and fair models for very large neural networks.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动过程中的一个关键问题是建立模型，其结果不会歧视某些人口群体，包括性别、种族或年龄。为了确保学习任务中的非歧视性，了解群体属性至关重要。然而，在实践中，由于法律和道德要求，这些属性可能不可用。为了应对这一挑战，本文研究了一种模型，该模型可以保护个人敏感信息的隐私，同时允许其学习非歧视性预测变量。所提出模型的一个关键特征是能够采用非私人的公平模型来创建隐私保护和公平的模型。本文分析了准确性、隐私性和公平性之间的关系，实验评估说明了所提出的模型在多个预测任务上的好处。特别是，该提案是第一个允许对非常大的神经网络进行可扩展且准确的私有和公平模型训练的提案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SF-PATE框架，通过集成教师模型实现可扩展、公平且隐私保护的机器学习模型训练。
AI.motivation: 现有模型可能因缺乏敏感属性（如性别、种族）数据而产生歧视，同时隐私保护与模型公平性难以兼顾，需在不暴露敏感信息的前提下实现非歧视学习。
AI.method: 结合隐私保护机制与公平性约束，利用预训练的非私有公平模型作为教师模型，通过聚合多个教师模型的预测结果生成最终模型，平衡准确性、隐私性和公平性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个预测任务中有效提升模型公平性与隐私保护水平，且首次实现大规模神经网络的私有公平模型训练。
AI.conclusion: SF-PATE框架为隐私保护与模型公平性提供了可扩展解决方案，验证了隐私、公平与准确性三者可兼顾的技术可行性。

search_text: SF-PATE: Scalable, Fair, and Private Aggregation of Teacher Ensembles SF-PATE：可扩展、公平且私密的教师集合聚合 A critical concern in data-driven processes is to build models whose outcomes do not discriminate against some demographic groups, including gender, ethnicity, or age. To ensure non-discrimination in learning tasks, knowledge of the group attributes is essential. However, in practice, these attributes may not be available due to legal and ethical requirements. To address this challenge, this paper studies a model that protects the privacy of the individuals' sensitive information while also allowing it to learn non-discriminatory predictors. A key characteristic of the proposed model is to enable the adoption of off-the-selves and non-private fair models to create a privacy-preserving and fair model. The paper analyzes the relation between accuracy, privacy, and fairness, and the experimental evaluation illustrates the benefits of the proposed models on several prediction tasks. In particular, this proposal is the first to allow both scalable and accurate training of private and fair models for very large neural networks. 数据驱动过程中的一个关键问题是建立模型，其结果不会歧视某些人口群体，包括性别、种族或年龄。为了确保学习任务中的非歧视性，了解群体属性至关重要。然而，在实践中，由于法律和道德要求，这些属性可能不可用。为了应对这一挑战，本文研究了一种模型，该模型可以保护个人敏感信息的隐私，同时允许其学习非歧视性预测变量。所提出模型的一个关键特征是能够采用非私人的公平模型来创建隐私保护和公平的模型。本文分析了准确性、隐私性和公平性之间的关系，实验评估说明了所提出的模型在多个预测任务上的好处。特别是，该提案是第一个允许对非常大的神经网络进行可扩展且准确的私有和公平模型训练的提案。 本文提出SF-PATE框架，通过集成教师模型实现可扩展、公平且隐私保护的机器学习模型训练。 Cuong Tran,Keyu Zhu,Ferdinando Fioretto,Pascal Van Hentenryck cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ho-Hsiang Wu,Magdalena Fuentes,Prem Seetharaman,Juan Pablo Bello
title: How to Listen? Rethinking Visual Sound Localization
title_zh: 如何聆听？重新思考视觉声音定位
abstract: Localizing visual sounds consists on locating the position of objects that emit sound within an image. It is a growing research area with potential applications in monitoring natural and urban environments, such as wildlife migration and urban traffic. Previous works are usually evaluated with datasets having mostly a single dominant visible object, and proposed models usually require the introduction of localization modules during training or dedicated sampling strategies, but it remains unclear how these design choices play a role in the adaptability of these methods in more challenging scenarios. In this work, we analyze various model choices for visual sound localization and discuss how their different components affect the model's performance, namely the encoders' architecture, the loss function and the localization strategy. Furthermore, we study the interaction between these decisions, the model performance, and the data, by digging into different evaluation datasets spanning different difficulties and characteristics, and discuss the implications of such decisions in the context of real-world applications. Our code and model weights are open-sourced and made available for further applications.
summary: Localizing visual sounds consists on locating the position of objects that emit sound within an image. It is a growing research area with potential applications in monitoring natural and urban environments, such as wildlife migration and urban traffic. Previous works are usually evaluated with datasets having mostly a single dominant visible object, and proposed models usually require the introduction of localization modules during training or dedicated sampling strategies, but it remains unclear how these design choices play a role in the adaptability of these methods in more challenging scenarios. In this work, we analyze various model choices for visual sound localization and discuss how their different components affect the model's performance, namely the encoders' architecture, the loss function and the localization strategy. Furthermore, we study the interaction between these decisions, the model performance, and the data, by digging into different evaluation datasets spanning different difficulties and characteristics, and discuss the implications of such decisions in the context of real-world applications. Our code and model weights are open-sourced and made available for further applications.
abstract_zh: 定位视觉声音包括定位图像中发出声音的物体的位置。这是一个不断发展的研究领域，在监测自然和城市环境（例如野生动物迁徙和城市交通）方面具有潜在的应用前景。以前的工作通常使用主要具有单个主要可见对象的数据集进行评估，并且所提出的模型通常需要在训练期间引入定位模块或专用采样策略，但目前尚不清楚这些设计选择如何在这些方法在更具挑战性的场景中的适应性中发挥作用。在这项工作中，我们分析了视觉声音定位的各种模型选择，并讨论了它们的不同组件如何影响模型的性能，即编码器的架构、损失函数和定位策略。此外，我们通过深入研究跨越不同困难和特征的不同评估数据集来研究这些决策、模型性能和数据之间的相互作用，并讨论此类决策在实际应用中的含义。我们的代码和模型权重是开源的，可用于进一步的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析视觉声音定位中的模型设计选择，探讨其对模型性能的影响，并评估不同数据集下的适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下的适应性不足，需明确模型设计选择与性能之间的关系，以提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 通过分析编码器结构、损失函数和定位策略等模型组件，研究其与性能及数据的相互作用，并在不同难度的数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 明确了模型组件对性能的影响，揭示了不同数据集下的适应性差异，并提供了开源资源促进进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 模型设计选择和数据集特性显著影响性能，需根据实际应用需求调整模型组件，以提升复杂场景下的适应性。

authors_text: Moran Feldman,Ashkan Norouzi-Fard,Ola Svensson,Rico Zenklusen
title: Submodular Maximization Subject to Matroid Intersection on the Fly
title_zh: 受制于动态拟阵交集的子模最大化
comment: 41 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.07183
comments: 41 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.07183
abstract: Despite a surge of interest in submodular maximization in the data stream model, there remain significant gaps in our knowledge about what can be achieved in this setting, especially when dealing with multiple constraints. In this work, we nearly close several basic gaps in submodular maximization subject to $k$ matroid constraints in the data stream model. We present a new hardness result showing that super polynomial memory in $k$ is needed to obtain an $o(k / \log k)$-approximation. This implies near optimality of prior algorithms. For the same setting, we show that one can nevertheless obtain a constant-factor approximation by maintaining a set of elements whose size is independent of the stream size. Finally, for bipartite matching constraints, a well-known special case of matroid intersection, we present a new technique to obtain hardness bounds that are significantly stronger than those obtained with prior approaches. Prior results left it open whether a $2$-approximation may exist in this setting, and only a complexity-theoretic hardness of $1.91$ was known. We prove an unconditional hardness of $2.69$.
summary: Despite a surge of interest in submodular maximization in the data stream model, there remain significant gaps in our knowledge about what can be achieved in this setting, especially when dealing with multiple constraints. In this work, we nearly close several basic gaps in submodular maximization subject to $k$ matroid constraints in the data stream model. We present a new hardness result showing that super polynomial memory in $k$ is needed to obtain an $o(k / \log k)$-approximation. This implies near optimality of prior algorithms. For the same setting, we show that one can nevertheless obtain a constant-factor approximation by maintaining a set of elements whose size is independent of the stream size. Finally, for bipartite matching constraints, a well-known special case of matroid intersection, we present a new technique to obtain hardness bounds that are significantly stronger than those obtained with prior approaches. Prior results left it open whether a $2$-approximation may exist in this setting, and only a complexity-theoretic hardness of $1.91$ was known. We prove an unconditional hardness of $2.69$.
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对数据流模型中的子模最大化的兴趣激增，但我们对在这种情况下可以实现什么的了解仍然存在很大差距，特别是在处理多个约束时。在这项工作中，我们几乎弥补了受数据流模型中 $k$ 拟阵约束影响的子模最大化中的几个基本差距。我们提出了一个新的硬度结果，表明需要 $k$ 中的超多项式记忆才能获得 $o(k / \log k)$ 近似值。这意味着现有算法接近最优。对于相同的设置，我们表明，仍然可以通过维护一组大小与流大小无关的元素来获得常数因子近似值。最后，对于二分匹配约束（拟阵相交的一种众所周知的特殊情况），我们提出了一种新技术来获得比先前方法获得的硬度边界强得多的硬度边界。先前的结果尚未确定在此设置中是否存在 2 美元近似值，并且仅已知复杂性理论硬度为 1.91 美元。我们证明无条件硬度为 2.69 美元。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在数据流模型下针对k个matroid约束的子模函数最大化问题，旨在填补该领域的知识空白。
AI.motivation: 尽管数据流模型中的子模最大化受到广泛关注，但面对多个约束条件时仍存在显著知识缺口，尤其是关于内存需求与近似比的关系。
AI.method: 通过提出新的硬度结果证明获得o(k/logk)近似比需要超多项式内存，并设计了一种与流大小无关的元素集合维护方法。针对二分图匹配约束，开发了更强大的硬度分析技术。
AI.result: 证明了现有算法的近似比接近最优，实现了与流大小无关的常数近似比，且针对二分图匹配约束的无条件硬度下限提升至2.69。
AI.conclusion: 该工作明确了多matroid约束下子模最大化的核心挑战，为后续算法设计提供了理论边界，并推动了对二分图匹配约束的深入研究。

motivation: 尽管数据流模型中的子模最大化受到广泛关注，但面对多个约束条件时仍存在显著知识缺口，尤其是关于内存需求与近似比的关系。

conclusion: 该工作明确了多matroid约束下子模最大化的核心挑战，为后续算法设计提供了理论边界，并推动了对二分图匹配约束的深入研究。
search_text: Submodular Maximization Subject to Matroid Intersection on the Fly 受制于动态拟阵交集的子模最大化 Despite a surge of interest in submodular maximization in the data stream model, there remain significant gaps in our knowledge about what can be achieved in this setting, especially when dealing with multiple constraints. In this work, we nearly close several basic gaps in submodular maximization subject to $k$ matroid constraints in the data stream model. We present a new hardness result showing that super polynomial memory in $k$ is needed to obtain an $o(k / \log k)$-approximation. This implies near optimality of prior algorithms. For the same setting, we show that one can nevertheless obtain a constant-factor approximation by maintaining a set of elements whose size is independent of the stream size. Finally, for bipartite matching constraints, a well-known special case of matroid intersection, we present a new technique to obtain hardness bounds that are significantly stronger than those obtained with prior approaches. Prior results left it open whether a $2$-approximation may exist in this setting, and only a complexity-theoretic hardness of $1.91$ was known. We prove an unconditional hardness of $2.69$. 尽管人们对数据流模型中的子模最大化的兴趣激增，但我们对在这种情况下可以实现什么的了解仍然存在很大差距，特别是在处理多个约束时。在这项工作中，我们几乎弥补了受数据流模型中 $k$ 拟阵约束影响的子模最大化中的几个基本差距。我们提出了一个新的硬度结果，表明需要 $k$ 中的超多项式记忆才能获得 $o(k / \log k)$ 近似值。这意味着现有算法接近最优。对于相同的设置，我们表明，仍然可以通过维护一组大小与流大小无关的元素来获得常数因子近似值。最后，对于二分匹配约束（拟阵相交的一种众所周知的特殊情况），我们提出了一种新技术来获得比先前方法获得的硬度边界强得多的硬度边界。先前的结果尚未确定在此设置中是否存在 2 美元近似值，并且仅已知复杂性理论硬度为 1.91 美元。我们证明无条件硬度为 2.69 美元。 该论文研究了在数据流模型下针对k个matroid约束的子模函数最大化问题，旨在填补该领域的知识空白。 Moran Feldman,Ashkan Norouzi-Fard,Ola Svensson,Rico Zenklusen cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Travis LaCroix,Alexandra Sasha Luccioni
title: Metaethical Perspectives on 'Benchmarking' AI Ethics
title_zh: “基准化”人工智能伦理的元伦理视角
abstract: Benchmarks are seen as the cornerstone for measuring technical progress in Artificial Intelligence (AI) research and have been developed for a variety of tasks ranging from question answering to facial recognition. An increasingly prominent research area in AI is ethics, which currently has no set of benchmarks nor commonly accepted way for measuring the 'ethicality' of an AI system. In this paper, drawing upon research in moral philosophy and metaethics, we argue that it is impossible to develop such a benchmark. As such, alternative mechanisms are necessary for evaluating whether an AI system is 'ethical'. This is especially pressing in light of the prevalence of applied, industrial AI research. We argue that it makes more sense to talk about 'values' (and 'value alignment') rather than 'ethics' when considering the possible actions of present and future AI systems. We further highlight that, because values are unambiguously relative, focusing on values forces us to consider explicitly what the values are and whose values they are. Shifting the emphasis from ethics to values therefore gives rise to several new ways of understanding how researchers might advance research programmes for robustly safe or beneficial AI. We conclude by highlighting a number of possible ways forward for the field as a whole, and we advocate for different approaches towards more value-aligned AI research.
summary: Benchmarks are seen as the cornerstone for measuring technical progress in Artificial Intelligence (AI) research and have been developed for a variety of tasks ranging from question answering to facial recognition. An increasingly prominent research area in AI is ethics, which currently has no set of benchmarks nor commonly accepted way for measuring the 'ethicality' of an AI system. In this paper, drawing upon research in moral philosophy and metaethics, we argue that it is impossible to develop such a benchmark. As such, alternative mechanisms are necessary for evaluating whether an AI system is 'ethical'. This is especially pressing in light of the prevalence of applied, industrial AI research. We argue that it makes more sense to talk about 'values' (and 'value alignment') rather than 'ethics' when considering the possible actions of present and future AI systems. We further highlight that, because values are unambiguously relative, focusing on values forces us to consider explicitly what the values are and whose values they are. Shifting the emphasis from ethics to values therefore gives rise to several new ways of understanding how researchers might advance research programmes for robustly safe or beneficial AI. We conclude by highlighting a number of possible ways forward for the field as a whole, and we advocate for different approaches towards more value-aligned AI research.
abstract_zh: 基准被视为衡量人工智能 (AI) 研究技术进步的基石，并且已针对从问答到面部识别等各种任务而开发。人工智能中一个日益突出的研究领域是伦理学，目前尚无一套基准或普遍接受的方法来衡量人工智能系统的“伦理性”。在本文中，我们根据道德哲学和元伦理学的研究，认为不可能制定这样一个基准。因此，需要替代机制来评估人工智能系统是否“道德”。鉴于应用、工业人工智能研究的盛行，这一点尤其紧迫。我们认为，在考虑当前和未来人工智能系统可能采取的行动时，谈论“价值观”（和“价值取向”）比“道德”更有意义。我们进一步强调，因为价值观是明确相对的，所以关注价值观迫使我们明确考虑价值观是什么以及它们是谁的价值观。因此，将重点从伦理转向价值观产生了几种新的方式来理解研究人员如何推进稳健安全或有益的人工智能的研究项目。最后，我们强调了整个领域的一些可能的前进方向，并提倡采用不同的方法来进行更符合价值的人工智能研究。

AI.tldr: 本文从元伦理学角度探讨AI伦理基准的不可行性，并提出以价值观对齐作为替代评估框架。
AI.motivation: 当前AI伦理领域缺乏统一基准，而工业级AI应用亟需有效评估机制以确保系统伦理合规性。
AI.method: 通过整合元伦理学理论与道德哲学研究，分析伦理基准构建的逻辑困境及价值观相对性特征。
AI.result: 论证伦理基准在理论层面不可行，揭示价值观相对性要求明确价值主体与内容，提出转向价值对齐研究的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁建立多维度价值对齐研究框架，推动安全可靠AI系统的发展路径创新。

authors_text: David Patterson,Joseph Gonzalez,Urs Hölzle,Quoc Le,Chen Liang,Lluis-Miquel Munguia,Daniel Rothchild,David So,Maud Texier,Jeff Dean
title: The Carbon Footprint of Machine Learning Training Will Plateau, Then Shrink
title_zh: 机器学习训练的碳足迹将趋于稳定，然后缩小
abstract: Machine Learning (ML) workloads have rapidly grown in importance, but raised concerns about their carbon footprint. Four best practices can reduce ML training energy by up to 100x and CO2 emissions up to 1000x. By following best practices, overall ML energy use (across research, development, and production) held steady at <15% of Google's total energy use for the past three years. If the whole ML field were to adopt best practices, total carbon emissions from training would reduce. Hence, we recommend that ML papers include emissions explicitly to foster competition on more than just model quality. Estimates of emissions in papers that omitted them have been off 100x-100,000x, so publishing emissions has the added benefit of ensuring accurate accounting. Given the importance of climate change, we must get the numbers right to make certain that we work on its biggest challenges.
summary: Machine Learning (ML) workloads have rapidly grown in importance, but raised concerns about their carbon footprint. Four best practices can reduce ML training energy by up to 100x and CO2 emissions up to 1000x. By following best practices, overall ML energy use (across research, development, and production) held steady at <15% of Google's total energy use for the past three years. If the whole ML field were to adopt best practices, total carbon emissions from training would reduce. Hence, we recommend that ML papers include emissions explicitly to foster competition on more than just model quality. Estimates of emissions in papers that omitted them have been off 100x-100,000x, so publishing emissions has the added benefit of ensuring accurate accounting. Given the importance of climate change, we must get the numbers right to make certain that we work on its biggest challenges.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 工作负载的重要性迅速增长，但也引起了人们对其碳足迹的担忧。四种最佳实践可将 ML 训练能量减少高达 100 倍，二氧化碳排放量减少高达 1000 倍。通过遵循最佳实践，机器学习的整体能源使用量（涵盖研究、开发和生产）在过去三年中一直稳定在 Google 总能源使用量的 15% 以下。如果整个机器学习领域都采用最佳实践，那么培训产生的总碳排放量就会减少。因此，我们建议 ML 论文明确包含排放量，以促进模型质量以外的竞争。省略排放量的论文中的排放量估计值相差 100 倍至 100,000 倍，因此发布排放量还有一个额外的好处，即确保准确核算。鉴于气候变化的重要性，我们必须掌握正确的数字，以确保我们致力于应对其最大的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过最佳实践减少机器学习训练的碳足迹，并分析其对谷歌能源使用的长期影响。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习工作负载的快速增长，其碳足迹引发环境担忧，需通过优化实践降低能耗与排放。
AI.method: 采用四项最佳实践（如算法优化、硬件利用、分布式训练等）减少训练能耗与碳排放。
AI.result: 谷歌过去三年ML总能耗稳定在总能耗的15%以下，最佳实践可使碳排放减少至原值的1/1000。
AI.conclusion: 推广最佳实践能显著降低ML碳排放，且需在论文中强制披露排放数据以确保准确性和推动行业竞争。
