authors_text: Robin Algayres,Adel Nabli,Benoit Sagot,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: Speech Sequence Embeddings using Nearest Neighbors Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 使用最近邻对比学习的语音序列嵌入
comment: Interspeech 2022 New version on 10/21/23 with appendix data and gitlab link
comments: Interspeech 2022 New version on 10/21/23 with appendix data and gitlab link
abstract: We introduce a simple neural encoder architecture that can be trained using an unsupervised contrastive learning objective which gets its positive samples from data-augmented k-Nearest Neighbors search. We show that when built on top of recent self-supervised audio representations, this method can be applied iteratively and yield competitive SSE as evaluated on two tasks: query-by-example of random sequences of speech, and spoken term discovery. On both tasks our method pushes the state-of-the-art by a significant margin across 5 different languages. Finally, we establish a benchmark on a query-by-example task on the LibriSpeech dataset to monitor future improvements in the field.
summary: We introduce a simple neural encoder architecture that can be trained using an unsupervised contrastive learning objective which gets its positive samples from data-augmented k-Nearest Neighbors search. We show that when built on top of recent self-supervised audio representations, this method can be applied iteratively and yield competitive SSE as evaluated on two tasks: query-by-example of random sequences of speech, and spoken term discovery. On both tasks our method pushes the state-of-the-art by a significant margin across 5 different languages. Finally, we establish a benchmark on a query-by-example task on the LibriSpeech dataset to monitor future improvements in the field.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种简单的神经编码器架构，可以使用无监督对比学习目标进行训练，该目标从数据增强的 k 最近邻搜索中获取正样本。我们表明，当建立在最近的自监督音频表示之上时，该方法可以迭代应用，并根据两个任务的评估产生有竞争力的 SSE：随机语音序列的示例查询和口语术语发现。在这两项任务中，我们的方法在 5 种不同语言中都显着推动了最先进的技术。最后，我们在 LibriSpeech 数据集上的示例查询任务上建立了基准，以监控该领域的未来改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最近邻对比学习的语音序列嵌入方法，通过无监督训练提升语音表示性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音嵌入方法依赖监督数据或无法有效利用数据增强，需探索更高效的无监督学习框架。
AI.method: 构建神经编码器，结合数据增强的k近邻搜索生成正样本，基于自监督音频表征进行迭代对比学习。
AI.result: 在语音查询匹配和口语术语发现任务中，五种语言的性能均显著超越现有方法，并建立LibriSpeech基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单架构实现高效无监督学习，为语音序列嵌入研究提供新方向和基准参考。

search_text: Speech Sequence Embeddings using Nearest Neighbors Contrastive Learning 使用最近邻对比学习的语音序列嵌入 We introduce a simple neural encoder architecture that can be trained using an unsupervised contrastive learning objective which gets its positive samples from data-augmented k-Nearest Neighbors search. We show that when built on top of recent self-supervised audio representations, this method can be applied iteratively and yield competitive SSE as evaluated on two tasks: query-by-example of random sequences of speech, and spoken term discovery. On both tasks our method pushes the state-of-the-art by a significant margin across 5 different languages. Finally, we establish a benchmark on a query-by-example task on the LibriSpeech dataset to monitor future improvements in the field. 我们引入了一种简单的神经编码器架构，可以使用无监督对比学习目标进行训练，该目标从数据增强的 k 最近邻搜索中获取正样本。我们表明，当建立在最近的自监督音频表示之上时，该方法可以迭代应用，并根据两个任务的评估产生有竞争力的 SSE：随机语音序列的示例查询和口语术语发现。在这两项任务中，我们的方法在 5 种不同语言中都显着推动了最先进的技术。最后，我们在 LibriSpeech 数据集上的示例查询任务上建立了基准，以监控该领域的未来改进。 本文提出一种基于最近邻对比学习的语音序列嵌入方法，通过无监督训练提升语音表示性能。 Robin Algayres,Adel Nabli,Benoit Sagot,Emmanuel Dupoux cs.AI

authors_text: Georgy Ponimatkin,Yann Labbé,Bryan Russell,Mathieu Aubry,Josef Sivic
title: Focal Length and Object Pose Estimation via Render and Compare
title_zh: 通过渲染和比较进行焦距和物体姿态估计
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code available at http://github.com/ponimatkin/focalpose
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code available at http://github.com/ponimatkin/focalpose
abstract: We introduce FocalPose, a neural render-and-compare method for jointly estimating the camera-object 6D pose and camera focal length given a single RGB input image depicting a known object. The contributions of this work are twofold. First, we derive a focal length update rule that extends an existing state-of-the-art render-and-compare 6D pose estimator to address the joint estimation task. Second, we investigate several different loss functions for jointly estimating the object pose and focal length. We find that a combination of direct focal length regression with a reprojection loss disentangling the contribution of translation, rotation, and focal length leads to improved results. We show results on three challenging benchmark datasets that depict known 3D models in uncontrolled settings. We demonstrate that our focal length and 6D pose estimates have lower error than the existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We introduce FocalPose, a neural render-and-compare method for jointly estimating the camera-object 6D pose and camera focal length given a single RGB input image depicting a known object. The contributions of this work are twofold. First, we derive a focal length update rule that extends an existing state-of-the-art render-and-compare 6D pose estimator to address the joint estimation task. Second, we investigate several different loss functions for jointly estimating the object pose and focal length. We find that a combination of direct focal length regression with a reprojection loss disentangling the contribution of translation, rotation, and focal length leads to improved results. We show results on three challenging benchmark datasets that depict known 3D models in uncontrolled settings. We demonstrate that our focal length and 6D pose estimates have lower error than the existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 FocalPose，一种神经渲染和比较方法，用于在给定描绘已知对象的单个 RGB 输入图像的情况下联合估计相机对象 6D 姿态和相机焦距。这项工作的贡献是双重的。首先，我们推导出焦距更新规则，该规则扩展了现有最先进的渲染和比较 6D 姿态估计器以解决联合估计任务。其次，我们研究了几种不同的损失函数来联合估计物体姿态和焦距。我们发现，直接焦距回归与重投影损失的结合可以消除平移、旋转和焦距的影响，从而改善结果。我们展示了三个具有挑战性的基准数据集的结果，这些数据集描绘了不受控制的设置中的已知 3D 模型。我们证明，我们的焦距和 6D 姿态估计的误差比现有最先进的方法更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FocalPose方法，通过神经渲染与比较技术，利用单张RGB图像联合估计相机焦距和已知物体的6D位姿。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时准确估计相机焦距与物体位姿，且多数依赖可控环境或额外传感器数据，需在复杂场景中提升估计精度。
AI.method: 扩展渲染-比较框架，推导焦距更新规则；设计结合直接焦距回归与解耦重投影损失的联合优化策略，分离平移、旋转与焦距对损失的贡献。
AI.result: 在三个未控环境数据集上，焦距与6D位姿估计误差均优于现有最佳方法，验证了联合估计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化焦距与位姿可行，损失函数设计关键，为单目视觉估计提供新思路。

authors_text: Ahmed Akakzia,Olivier Sigaud
title: Learning Object-Centered Autotelic Behaviors with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用图神经网络学习以对象为中心的自动行为
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, published at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents COLLAS 2022
comments: 15 pages, 10 figures, published at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents COLLAS 2022
abstract: Although humans live in an open-ended world and endlessly face new challenges, they do not have to learn from scratch each time they face the next one. Rather, they have access to a handful of previously learned skills, which they rapidly adapt to new situations. In artificial intelligence, autotelic agents, which are intrinsically motivated to represent and set their own goals, exhibit promising skill adaptation capabilities. However, these capabilities are highly constrained by their policy and goal space representations. In this paper, we propose to investigate the impact of these representations on the learning and transfer capabilities of autotelic agents. We study different implementations of autotelic agents using four types of Graph Neural Networks policy representations and two types of goal spaces, either geometric or predicate-based. By testing agents on unseen goals, we show that combining object-centered architectures that are expressive enough with semantic relational goals helps learning to reach more difficult goals. We also release our graph-based implementations to encourage further research in this direction.
summary: Although humans live in an open-ended world and endlessly face new challenges, they do not have to learn from scratch each time they face the next one. Rather, they have access to a handful of previously learned skills, which they rapidly adapt to new situations. In artificial intelligence, autotelic agents, which are intrinsically motivated to represent and set their own goals, exhibit promising skill adaptation capabilities. However, these capabilities are highly constrained by their policy and goal space representations. In this paper, we propose to investigate the impact of these representations on the learning and transfer capabilities of autotelic agents. We study different implementations of autotelic agents using four types of Graph Neural Networks policy representations and two types of goal spaces, either geometric or predicate-based. By testing agents on unseen goals, we show that combining object-centered architectures that are expressive enough with semantic relational goals helps learning to reach more difficult goals. We also release our graph-based implementations to encourage further research in this direction.
abstract_zh: 尽管人类生活在一个开放的世界中，不断面临新的挑战，但他们不必每次面对下一个挑战时都从头开始学习。相反，他们可以获得一些以前学过的技能，并能快速适应新情况。在人工智能中，自动智能体具有内在动机来代表和设定自己的目标，表现出有前途的技能适应能力。然而，这些能力受到其政策和目标空间表示的高度限制。在本文中，我们建议研究这些表示对自动智能体的学习和迁移能力的影响。我们使用四种类型的图神经网络策略表示和两种类型的目标空间（几何或基于谓词）来研究自动实现代理的不同实现。通过在看不见的目标上测试智能体，我们表明，将具有足够表达力的以对象为中心的架构与语义关系目标相结合，有助于学习实现更困难的目标。我们还发布了基于图的实现，以鼓励在这个方向上进行进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用图神经网络提升自驱型智能体在对象中心场景下的技能迁移能力，通过优化策略表示和目标空间设计实现更复杂目标的学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自驱型智能体的策略表示和目标空间限制了其技能迁移能力，需探索更有效的表示方法以提升复杂环境下的目标达成效率。
AI.method: 采用四种图神经网络策略表示与两种目标空间（几何/语义关系）组合，通过未见过的目标测试验证不同架构的迁移效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合高表达能力的对象中心架构与语义关系目标能显著提升复杂目标的学习效果，相关代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 策略表示与目标空间设计对自驱型智能体性能至关重要，未来需进一步探索更高效的对象中心表征方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何利用图神经网络提升自驱型智能体在对象中心场景下的技能迁移能力，通过优化策略表示和目标空间设计实现更复杂目标的学习。

ai_content.method: 采用四种图神经网络策略表示与两种目标空间（几何/语义关系）组合，通过未见过的目标测试验证不同架构的迁移效果。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，结合高表达能力的对象中心架构与语义关系目标能显著提升复杂目标的学习效果，相关代码已开源。

We also release our graph-based implementations to encourage further research in this direction. 尽管人类生活在一个开放的世界中，不断面临新的挑战，但他们不必每次面对下一个挑战时都从头开始学习。相反，他们可以获得一些以前学过的技能，并能快速适应新情况。在人工智能中，自动智能体具有内在动机来代表和设定自己的目标，表现出有前途的技能适应能力。然而，这些能力受到其政策和目标空间表示的高度限制。在本文中，我们建议研究这些表示对自动智能体的学习和迁移能力的影响。我们使用四种类型的图神经网络策略表示和两种类型的目标空间（几何或基于谓词）来研究自动实现代理的不同实现。通过在看不见的目标上测试智能体，我们表明，将具有足够表达力的以对象为中心的架构与语义关系目标相结合，有助于学习实现更困难的目标。我们还发布了基于图的实现，以鼓励在这个方向上进行进一步的研究。 本文研究如何利用图神经网络提升自驱型智能体在对象中心场景下的技能迁移能力，通过优化策略表示和目标空间设计实现更复杂目标的学习。 Ahmed Akakzia,Olivier Sigaud cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Jared Edward Reser
title: Artificial Intelligence Software Structured to Simulate Human Working Memory, Mental Imagery, and Mental Continuity
title_zh: 人工智能软件旨在模拟人类工作记忆、心理意象和心理连续性
abstract: This article presents an artificial intelligence (AI) architecture intended to simulate the iterative updating of the human working memory system. It features several interconnected neural networks designed to emulate the specialized modules of the cerebral cortex. These are structured hierarchically and integrated into a global workspace. They are capable of temporarily maintaining high-level representational patterns akin to the psychological items maintained in working memory. This maintenance is made possible by persistent neural activity in the form of two modalities: sustained neural firing (resulting in a focus of attention) and synaptic potentiation (resulting in a short-term store). Representations held in persistent activity are recursively replaced resulting in incremental changes to the content of the working memory system. As this content gradually evolves, successive processing states overlap and are continuous with one another. The present article will explore how this architecture can lead to iterative shift in the distribution of coactive representations, ultimately leading to mental continuity between processing states, and thus to human-like thought and cognition. Taken together, these components outline a biologically motivated route toward synthetic consciousness or artificial sentience and subjectivity.
summary: This article presents an artificial intelligence (AI) architecture intended to simulate the iterative updating of the human working memory system. It features several interconnected neural networks designed to emulate the specialized modules of the cerebral cortex. These are structured hierarchically and integrated into a global workspace. They are capable of temporarily maintaining high-level representational patterns akin to the psychological items maintained in working memory. This maintenance is made possible by persistent neural activity in the form of two modalities: sustained neural firing (resulting in a focus of attention) and synaptic potentiation (resulting in a short-term store). Representations held in persistent activity are recursively replaced resulting in incremental changes to the content of the working memory system. As this content gradually evolves, successive processing states overlap and are continuous with one another. The present article will explore how this architecture can lead to iterative shift in the distribution of coactive representations, ultimately leading to mental continuity between processing states, and thus to human-like thought and cognition. Taken together, these components outline a biologically motivated route toward synthetic consciousness or artificial sentience and subjectivity.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种人工智能 (AI) 架构，旨在模拟人类工作记忆系统的迭代更新。它具有多个互连的神经网络，旨在模拟大脑皮层的专门模块。它们按层次结构构建并集成到全局工作空间中。他们能够暂时维持高水平的表征模式，类似于工作记忆中维持的心理项目。这种维持是通过两种形式的持续神经活动来实现的：持续神经放电（导致注意力集中）和突触增强（导致短期存储）。持久活动中保存的表示被递归地替换，从而导致工作记忆系统的内容发生增量变化。随着这一内容的逐渐发展，连续的处理状态相互重叠且连续。本文将探讨这种架构如何导致协同表征分布的迭代转变，最终导致处理状态之间的心理连续性，从而实现类人的思维和认知。总而言之，这些组成部分概述了一条通向合成意识或人工感知和主观性的生物驱动途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种人工智能架构，旨在模拟人类工作记忆系统、心智意象和心智连续性，通过神经网络模拟大脑皮层模块并实现认知迭代更新。
AI.motivation: 通过生物启发式方法构建人工意识，探索实现类人思维和认知的可能路径，推动合成意识或人工主观性的研究。
AI.method: 设计分层互联的神经网络模块，模拟大脑皮层功能，利用持续神经放电和突触增强两种机制维持工作记忆表征，并通过递归替换实现认知状态的连续演化。
AI.result: 该架构可实现处理状态间的认知分布渐进转移，形成心智连续性，为类人思维和合成意识提供了技术框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于生物机制的意识模拟提供了新路径，通过整合神经科学原理与人工智能技术，推动人工主观性的实现。

authors_text: Arthur Juliani,Kai Arulkumaran,Shuntaro Sasai,Ryota Kanai
title: On the link between conscious function and general intelligence in humans and machines
title_zh: 人类和机器的意识功能与一般智能之间的联系
abstract: In popular media, there is often a connection drawn between the advent of awareness in artificial agents and those same agents simultaneously achieving human or superhuman level intelligence. In this work, we explore the validity and potential application of this seemingly intuitive link between consciousness and intelligence. We do so by examining the cognitive abilities associated with three contemporary theories of conscious function: Global Workspace Theory (GWT), Information Generation Theory (IGT), and Attention Schema Theory (AST). We find that all three theories specifically relate conscious function to some aspect of domain-general intelligence in humans. With this insight, we turn to the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and find that, while still far from demonstrating general intelligence, many state-of-the-art deep learning methods have begun to incorporate key aspects of each of the three functional theories. Having identified this trend, we use the motivating example of mental time travel in humans to propose ways in which insights from each of the three theories may be combined into a single unified and implementable model. Given that it is made possible by cognitive abilities underlying each of the three functional theories, artificial agents capable of mental time travel would not only possess greater general intelligence than current approaches, but also be more consistent with our current understanding of the functional role of consciousness in humans, thus making it a promising near-term goal for AI research.
summary: In popular media, there is often a connection drawn between the advent of awareness in artificial agents and those same agents simultaneously achieving human or superhuman level intelligence. In this work, we explore the validity and potential application of this seemingly intuitive link between consciousness and intelligence. We do so by examining the cognitive abilities associated with three contemporary theories of conscious function: Global Workspace Theory (GWT), Information Generation Theory (IGT), and Attention Schema Theory (AST). We find that all three theories specifically relate conscious function to some aspect of domain-general intelligence in humans. With this insight, we turn to the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and find that, while still far from demonstrating general intelligence, many state-of-the-art deep learning methods have begun to incorporate key aspects of each of the three functional theories. Having identified this trend, we use the motivating example of mental time travel in humans to propose ways in which insights from each of the three theories may be combined into a single unified and implementable model. Given that it is made possible by cognitive abilities underlying each of the three functional theories, artificial agents capable of mental time travel would not only possess greater general intelligence than current approaches, but also be more consistent with our current understanding of the functional role of consciousness in humans, thus making it a promising near-term goal for AI research.
abstract_zh: 在大众媒体中，人工智能体的意识出现与同时实现人类或超人水平智能的这些智能体之间经常存在联系。在这项工作中，我们探索了意识和智力之间这种看似直观的联系的有效性和潜在应用。我们通过检查与三种当代意识功能理论相关的认知能力来做到这一点：全局工作空间理论（GWT）、信息生成理论（IGT）和注意图式理论（AST）。我们发现这三种理论都将意识功能与人类通用领域智能的某些方面具体联系起来。有了这种洞察力，我们转向人工智能（AI）领域，发现虽然距离展示通用智能还很远，但许多最先进的深度学习方法已经开始纳入三种功能理论的关键方面。确定了这一趋势后，我们利用人类心理时间旅行的激励性例子提出了一些方法，将这三种理论中的每一种的见解结合到一个统一且可实施的模型中。鉴于这三种功能理论中每一种的认知能力都使之成为可能，能够进行心理时间旅行的人工智能不仅比目前的方法拥有更高的一般智能，而且更符合我们目前对人类意识功能作用的理解，从而使其成为人工智能研究的一个有前途的近期目标。

AI.tldr: 探讨意识功能与一般智能在人类和机器中的联系，并分析如何将相关理论应用于人工智能，特别是心理时间旅行模型的构建。
AI.motivation: 验证意识与智能水平之间的直观联系是否成立，并探索其在人工智能中的潜在应用。
AI.method: 分析三种意识理论（GWT、IGT、AST）与人类一般智能的关系，评估当前AI方法对这些理论的融合，并以心理时间旅行为例提出统一模型。
AI.result: 发现三种意识理论均与人类一般智能相关，当前AI方法已部分融合这些理论，并提出结合三种理论的统一模型，认为具备心理时间旅行能力的AI将更智能且符合人类意识功能。
AI.conclusion: 具备心理时间旅行能力的AI是近期可行的研究目标，可能提升一般智能并更符合人类意识功能的理解。

authors_text: Shengjie Zheng,Wenyi Li,Lang Qian,Chenggang He,Xiaojian Li
title: A Spiking Neural Network based on Neural Manifold for Augmenting Intracortical Brain-Computer Interface Data
title_zh: 基于神经流形的尖峰神经网络用于增强皮质内脑机接口数据
abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), transform neural signals in the brain into in-structions to control external devices. However, obtaining sufficient training data is difficult as well as limited. With the advent of advanced machine learning methods, the capability of brain-computer interfaces has been enhanced like never before, however, these methods require a large amount of data for training and thus require data augmentation of the limited data available. Here, we use spiking neural networks (SNN) as data generators. It is touted as the next-generation neu-ral network and is considered as one of the algorithms oriented to general artifi-cial intelligence because it borrows the neural information processing from bio-logical neurons. We use the SNN to generate neural spike information that is bio-interpretable and conforms to the intrinsic patterns in the original neural data. Ex-periments show that the model can directly synthesize new spike trains, which in turn improves the generalization ability of the BCI decoder. Both the input and output of the spiking neural model are spike information, which is a brain-inspired intelligence approach that can be better integrated with BCI in the future.
summary: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), transform neural signals in the brain into in-structions to control external devices. However, obtaining sufficient training data is difficult as well as limited. With the advent of advanced machine learning methods, the capability of brain-computer interfaces has been enhanced like never before, however, these methods require a large amount of data for training and thus require data augmentation of the limited data available. Here, we use spiking neural networks (SNN) as data generators. It is touted as the next-generation neu-ral network and is considered as one of the algorithms oriented to general artifi-cial intelligence because it borrows the neural information processing from bio-logical neurons. We use the SNN to generate neural spike information that is bio-interpretable and conforms to the intrinsic patterns in the original neural data. Ex-periments show that the model can directly synthesize new spike trains, which in turn improves the generalization ability of the BCI decoder. Both the input and output of the spiking neural model are spike information, which is a brain-inspired intelligence approach that can be better integrated with BCI in the future.
abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCI）将大脑中的神经信号转化为控制外部设备的指令。然而，获得足够的训练数据既困难又有限。随着先进机器学习方法的出现，脑机接口的能力得到了前所未有的增强，然而，这些方法需要大量数据进行训练，因此需要对有限的可用数据进行数据增强。在这里，我们使用尖峰神经网络（SNN）作为数据生成器。它被誉为下一代神经网络，由于借鉴了生物神经元的神经信息处理能力，被认为是面向通用人工智能的算法之一。我们使用 SNN 生成可生物解释并符合原始神经数据内在模式的神经尖峰信息。实验表明，该模型可以直接合成新的脉冲序列，从而提高了BCI解码器的泛化能力。脉冲神经模型的输入和输出都是脉冲信息，是一种类脑智能方法，未来可以与BCI更好地结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的神经流形方法，用于增强皮层内脑机接口（BCI）的有限训练数据。
AI.motivation: 脑机接口（BCI）因训练数据不足而受限，传统机器学习方法需大量数据且难以满足需求，需通过数据增强技术解决此问题。
AI.method: 利用脉冲神经网络生成符合生物神经特征的可解释脉冲信号，通过模拟神经元的生物信息处理机制合成新的脉冲序列以扩充数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型可直接合成新脉冲序列，提升BCI解码器的泛化能力，且其输入输出均为脉冲信息，更契合BCI的生物启发特性。
AI.conclusion: 基于神经流形的SNN数据增强方法为BCI提供了更高效的脑启发式解决方案，未来可进一步优化其与BCI系统的融合能力。

search_text: A Spiking Neural Network based on Neural Manifold for Augmenting Intracortical Brain-Computer Interface Data 基于神经流形的尖峰神经网络用于增强皮质内脑机接口数据 Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), transform neural signals in the brain into in-structions to control external devices. However, obtaining sufficient training data is difficult as well as limited. With the advent of advanced machine learning methods, the capability of brain-computer interfaces has been enhanced like never before, however, these methods require a large amount of data for training and thus require data augmentation of the limited data available. Here, we use spiking neural networks (SNN) as data generators. It is touted as the next-generation neu-ral network and is considered as one of the algorithms oriented to general artifi-cial intelligence because it borrows the neural information processing from bio-logical neurons. We use the SNN to generate neural spike information that is bio-interpretable and conforms to the intrinsic patterns in the original neural data. Ex-periments show that the model can directly synthesize new spike trains, which in turn improves the generalization ability of the BCI decoder. authors_text: Hao Wang,Tai-Wei Chang,Tianqiao Liu,Jianmin Huang,Zhichao Chen,Chao Yu,Ruopeng Li,Wei Chu
title: ESCM$^2$: Entire Space Counterfactual Multi-Task Model for Post-Click Conversion Rate Estimation
title_zh: ESCM$^2$：用于点击后转化率估算的全空间反事实多任务模型
abstract: Accurate estimation of post-click conversion rate is critical for building recommender systems, which has long been confronted with sample selection bias and data sparsity issues. Methods in the Entire Space Multi-task Model (ESMM) family leverage the sequential pattern of user actions, i.e. $impression\rightarrow click \rightarrow conversion$ to address data sparsity issue. However, they still fail to ensure the unbiasedness of CVR estimates. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that ESMM suffers from the following two problems: (1) Inherent Estimation Bias (IEB), where the estimated CVR of ESMM is inherently higher than the ground truth; (2) Potential Independence Priority (PIP) for CTCVR estimation, where there is a risk that the ESMM overlooks the causality from click to conversion. To this end, we devise a principled approach named Entire Space Counterfactual Multi-task Modelling (ESCM$^2$), which employs a counterfactual risk miminizer as a regularizer in ESMM to address both IEB and PIP issues simultaneously. Extensive experiments on offline datasets and online environments demonstrate that our proposed ESCM$^2$ can largely mitigate the inherent IEB and PIP issues and achieve better performance than baseline models.
summary: Accurate estimation of post-click conversion rate is critical for building recommender systems, which has long been confronted with sample selection bias and data sparsity issues. Methods in the Entire Space Multi-task Model (ESMM) family leverage the sequential pattern of user actions, i.e. $impression\rightarrow click \rightarrow conversion$ to address data sparsity issue. However, they still fail to ensure the unbiasedness of CVR estimates. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that ESMM suffers from the following two problems: (1) Inherent Estimation Bias (IEB), where the estimated CVR of ESMM is inherently higher than the ground truth; (2) Potential Independence Priority (PIP) for CTCVR estimation, where there is a risk that the ESMM overlooks the causality from click to conversion. To this end, we devise a principled approach named Entire Space Counterfactual Multi-task Modelling (ESCM$^2$), which employs a counterfactual risk miminizer as a regularizer in ESMM to address both IEB and PIP issues simultaneously. Extensive experiments on offline datasets and online environments demonstrate that our proposed ESCM$^2$ can largely mitigate the inherent IEB and PIP issues and achieve better performance than baseline models.
abstract_zh: 准确估计点击后转化率对于构建推荐系统至关重要，而推荐系统长期以来一直面临样本选择偏差和数据稀疏问题。全空间多任务模型 (ESMM) 系列中的方法利用用户操作的顺序模式，即 $impression\rightarrow click \rightarrow conversion$ 来解决数据稀疏问题。然而，他们仍然无法确保 CVR 估计的公正性。在本文中，我们从理论上证明了 ESMM 存在以下两个问题：（1）固有估计偏差（IEB），其中 ESMM 的估计 CVR 本质上高于真实值； (2) CTCVR 估计的潜在独立优先级 (PIP)，其中存在 ESMM 忽视从点击到转化的因果关系的风险。为此，我们设计了一种名为全空间反事实多任务建模（ESCM$^2$）的原则性方法，该方法采用反事实风险最小化器作为 ESMM 中的正则器来同时解决 IEB 和 PIP 问题。对离线数据集和在线环境的大量实验表明，我们提出的 ESCM$^2$ 可以在很大程度上缓解固有的 IEB 和 PIP 问题，并获得比基线模型更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESCM²模型，通过解决现有ESMM方法中的固有估计偏差和潜在独立性优先问题，提升点击后转化率（CVR）估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有ESMM方法在估计CVR时存在固有偏差（IEB）和忽略点击与转化之间因果关系的潜在独立性优先（PIP）问题，导致估计结果不准确。
AI.method: 设计ESCM²方法，在ESMM中引入反事实风险最小化正则化项，同时解决IEB和PIP问题。
AI.result: 在离线数据集和在线环境中实验表明，ESCM²显著缓解了IEB和PIP问题，性能优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: ESCM²通过反事实建模有效解决了CVR估计中的偏差和因果忽略问题，为推荐系统提供了更可靠的转化率预测方案。

search_text: ESCM$^2$: Entire Space Counterfactual Multi-Task Model for Post-Click Conversion Rate Estimation ESCM$^2$：用于点击后转化率估算的全空间反事实多任务模型 Accurate estimation of post-click conversion rate is critical for building recommender systems, which has long been confronted with sample selection bias and data sparsity issues. Methods in the Entire Space Multi-task Model (ESMM) family leverage the sequential pattern of user actions, i.e. $impression\rightarrow click \rightarrow conversion$ to address data sparsity issue. However, they still fail to ensure the unbiasedness of CVR estimates. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that ESMM suffers from the following two problems: (1) Inherent Estimation Bias (IEB), where the estimated CVR of ESMM is inherently higher than the ground truth; (2) Potential Independence Priority (PIP) for CTCVR estimation, where there is a risk that the ESMM overlooks the causality from click to conversion. To this end, we devise a principled approach named Entire Space Counterfactual Multi-task Modelling (ESCM$^2$), which employs a counterfactual risk miminizer as a regularizer in ESMM to address both IEB and PIP issues simultaneously. Extensive experiments on offline datasets and online environments demonstrate that our proposed ESCM$^2$ can largely mitigate the inherent IEB and PIP issues and achieve better performance than baseline models. 准确估计点击后转化率对于构建推荐系统至关重要，而推荐系统长期以来一直面临样本选择偏差和数据稀疏问题。全空间多任务模型 (ESMM) 系列中的方法利用用户操作的顺序模式，即 $impression\rightarrow click \rightarrow conversion$ 来解决数据稀疏问题。然而，他们仍然无法确保 CVR 估计的公正性。在本文中，我们从理论上证明了 ESMM 存在以下两个问题：（1）固有估计偏差（IEB），其中 ESMM 的估计 CVR 本质上高于真实值； (2) CTCVR 估计的潜在独立优先级 (PIP)，其中存在 ESMM 忽视从点击到转化的因果关系的风险。为此，我们设计了一种名为全空间反事实多任务建模（ESCM$^2$）的原则性方法，该方法采用反事实风险最小化器作为 ESMM 中的正则器来同时解决 IEB 和 PIP 问题。对离线数据集和在线环境的大量实验表明，我们提出的 ESCM$^2$ 可以在很大程度上缓解固有的 IEB 和 PIP 问题，并获得比基线模型更好的性能。 本文提出ESCM²模型，通过解决现有ESMM方法中的固有估计偏差和潜在独立性优先问题，提升点击后转化率（CVR）估计的准确性。 Hao Wang,Tai-Wei Chang,Tianqiao Liu,Jianmin Huang,Zhichao Chen,Chao Yu,Ruopeng Li,Wei Chu cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Francesco Martinuzzi,Chris Rackauckas,Anas Abdelrehim,Miguel D. Mahecha,Karin Mora
title: ReservoirComputing.jl: An Efficient and Modular Library for Reservoir Computing Models
title_zh: ReservoirComputing.jl：用于油藏计算模型的高效模块化库
abstract: We introduce ReservoirComputing.jl, an open source Julia library for reservoir computing models. The software offers a great number of algorithms presented in the literature, and allows to expand on them with both internal and external tools in a simple way. The implementation is highly modular, fast and comes with a comprehensive documentation, which includes reproduced experiments from literature. The code and documentation are hosted on Github under an MIT license https://github.com/SciML/ReservoirComputing.jl.
summary: We introduce ReservoirComputing.jl, an open source Julia library for reservoir computing models. The software offers a great number of algorithms presented in the literature, and allows to expand on them with both internal and external tools in a simple way. The implementation is highly modular, fast and comes with a comprehensive documentation, which includes reproduced experiments from literature. The code and documentation are hosted on Github under an MIT license https://github.com/SciML/ReservoirComputing.jl.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 ReservoirComputing.jl，一个用于油藏计算模型的开源 Julia 库。该软件提供了文献中介绍的大量算法，并允许以简单的方式使用内部和外部工具对其进行扩展。该实现是高度模块化、快速的，并附带全面的文档，其中包括文献中的重复实验。代码和文档根据 MIT 许可证托管在 Github 上 https://github.com/SciML/ReservoirComputing.jl。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ReservoirComputing.jl的开源Julia库，用于实现水库计算模型。
AI.motivation: 为了提供一个高效、模块化且易于扩展的水库计算模型库，以支持相关研究和应用。
AI.method: 开发了一个模块化、高效的Julia库，支持多种水库计算算法，并提供全面的文档和实验复现。
AI.result: ReservoirComputing.jl库已发布，包含多种算法，支持扩展，并通过GitHub提供全面文档。
AI.conclusion: 该库为水库计算模型的研究和应用提供了一个高效的工具，具有良好的可扩展性和易用性。

search_text: ReservoirComputing.jl: An Efficient and Modular Library for Reservoir Computing Models ReservoirComputing.jl：用于油藏计算模型的高效模块化库 We introduce ReservoirComputing.jl, an open source Julia library for reservoir computing models. The software offers a great number of algorithms presented in the literature, and allows to expand on them with both internal and external tools in a simple way. The implementation is highly modular, fast and comes with a comprehensive documentation, which includes reproduced experiments from literature. The code and documentation are hosted on Github under an MIT license https://github.com/SciML/ReservoirComputing.jl. 我们介绍 ReservoirComputing.jl，一个用于油藏计算模型的开源 Julia 库。该软件提供了文献中介绍的大量算法，并允许以简单的方式使用内部和外部工具对其进行扩展。该实现是高度模块化、快速的，并附带全面的文档，其中包括文献中的重复实验。代码和文档根据 MIT 许可证托管在 Github 上 https://github.com/SciML/ReservoirComputing.jl。 本文介绍了一个名为ReservoirComputing.jl的开源Julia库，用于实现水库计算模型。 Francesco Martinuzzi,Chris Rackauckas,Anas Abdelrehim,Miguel D. Mahecha,Karin Mora cs.CE,cs.AI

authors_text: Likith Reddy,Vivek Talwar,Shanmukh Alle,Raju. S. Bapi,U. Deva Priyakumar
title: IMLE-Net: An Interpretable Multi-level Multi-channel Model for ECG Classification
title_zh: IMLE-Net：一种可解释的多级多通道心电图分类模型
abstract: Early detection of cardiovascular diseases is crucial for effective treatment and an electrocardiogram (ECG) is pivotal for diagnosis. The accuracy of Deep Learning based methods for ECG signal classification has progressed in recent years to reach cardiologist-level performance. In clinical settings, a cardiologist makes a diagnosis based on the standard 12-channel ECG recording. Automatic analysis of ECG recordings from a multiple-channel perspective has not been given enough attention, so it is essential to analyze an ECG recording from a multiple-channel perspective. We propose a model that leverages the multiple-channel information available in the standard 12-channel ECG recordings and learns patterns at the beat, rhythm, and channel level. The experimental results show that our model achieved a macro-averaged ROC-AUC score of 0.9216, mean accuracy of 88.85\%, and a maximum F1 score of 0.8057 on the PTB-XL dataset. The attention visualization results from the interpretable model are compared against the cardiologist's guidelines to validate the correctness and usability.
summary: Early detection of cardiovascular diseases is crucial for effective treatment and an electrocardiogram (ECG) is pivotal for diagnosis. The accuracy of Deep Learning based methods for ECG signal classification has progressed in recent years to reach cardiologist-level performance. In clinical settings, a cardiologist makes a diagnosis based on the standard 12-channel ECG recording. Automatic analysis of ECG recordings from a multiple-channel perspective has not been given enough attention, so it is essential to analyze an ECG recording from a multiple-channel perspective. We propose a model that leverages the multiple-channel information available in the standard 12-channel ECG recordings and learns patterns at the beat, rhythm, and channel level. The experimental results show that our model achieved a macro-averaged ROC-AUC score of 0.9216, mean accuracy of 88.85\%, and a maximum F1 score of 0.8057 on the PTB-XL dataset. The attention visualization results from the interpretable model are compared against the cardiologist's guidelines to validate the correctness and usability.
abstract_zh: 心血管疾病的早期发现对于有效治疗至关重要，而心电图 (ECG) 对于诊断至关重要。近年来，基于深度学习的心电图信号分类方法的准确性已经取得了进步，达到了心脏病专家的水平。在临床环境中，心脏病专家根据标准 12 通道心电图记录进行诊断。多通道角度的心电图记录自动分析尚未得到足够的重视，因此从多通道角度分析心电图记录至关重要。我们提出了一种模型，该模型利用标准 12 通道心电图记录中可用的多通道信息，并学习节拍、节律和通道级别的模式。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 PTB-XL 数据集上的宏观平均 ROC-AUC 得分为 0.9216，平均准确度为 88.85%，最大 F1 得分为 0.8057。将可解释模型的注意力可视化结果与心脏病专家的指南进行比较，以验证其正确性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的多级多通道模型IMLE-Net，用于心电图（ECG）分类，通过利用标准12导联ECG的多通道信息提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在ECG分类中取得进展，但现有方法对多通道ECG的分析不足，而临床诊断依赖多通道信息，因此需开发兼顾多通道特征与可解释性的模型。
AI.method: 设计多级多通道网络结构，从节律、心跳和通道三个层级学习特征，并通过注意力机制可视化关键通道，与临床指南对比验证模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL数据集上，模型实现宏平均ROC-AUC 0.9216、平均准确率88.85%、最高F1分数0.8057，注意力可视化结果符合临床指南。
AI.conclusion: IMLE-Net通过多通道特征融合与可解释性设计，在ECG分类任务中达到高准确率，且其注意力机制与临床诊断逻辑一致，具备临床应用潜力。

authors_text: I. Ferreira,L. Ochoa,A. Koeshidayatullah
title: PetroGAN: A novel GAN-based approach to generate realistic, label-free petrographic datasets
title_zh: PetroGAN：一种基于 GAN 的新颖方法，用于生成真实的、无标签的岩相数据集
abstract: Deep learning architectures have enriched data analytics in the geosciences, complementing traditional approaches to geological problems. Although deep learning applications in geosciences show encouraging signs, the actual potential remains untapped. This is primarily because geological datasets, particularly petrography, are limited, time-consuming, and expensive to obtain, requiring in-depth knowledge to provide a high-quality labeled dataset. We approached these issues by developing a novel deep learning framework based on generative adversarial networks (GANs) to create the first realistic synthetic petrographic dataset. The StyleGAN2 architecture is selected to allow robust replication of statistical and esthetical characteristics, and improving the internal variance of petrographic data. The training dataset consists of 10070 images of rock thin sections both in plane- and cross-polarized light. The algorithm trained for 264 GPU hours and reached a state-of-the-art Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) score of 12.49 for petrographic images. We further observed the FID values vary with lithology type and image resolution. Our survey established that subject matter experts found the generated images were indistinguishable from real images. This study highlights that GANs are a powerful method for generating realistic synthetic data, experimenting with the latent space, and as a future tool for self-labelling, reducing the effort of creating geological datasets.
summary: Deep learning architectures have enriched data analytics in the geosciences, complementing traditional approaches to geological problems. Although deep learning applications in geosciences show encouraging signs, the actual potential remains untapped. This is primarily because geological datasets, particularly petrography, are limited, time-consuming, and expensive to obtain, requiring in-depth knowledge to provide a high-quality labeled dataset. We approached these issues by developing a novel deep learning framework based on generative adversarial networks (GANs) to create the first realistic synthetic petrographic dataset. The StyleGAN2 architecture is selected to allow robust replication of statistical and esthetical characteristics, and improving the internal variance of petrographic data. The training dataset consists of 10070 images of rock thin sections both in plane- and cross-polarized light. The algorithm trained for 264 GPU hours and reached a state-of-the-art Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) score of 12.49 for petrographic images. We further observed the FID values vary with lithology type and image resolution. Our survey established that subject matter experts found the generated images were indistinguishable from real images. This study highlights that GANs are a powerful method for generating realistic synthetic data, experimenting with the latent space, and as a future tool for self-labelling, reducing the effort of creating geological datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度学习架构丰富了地球科学中的数据分析，补充了解决地质问题的传统方法。尽管深度学习在地球科学中的应用显示出令人鼓舞的迹象，但实际潜力尚未开发。这主要是因为地质数据集，特别是岩相学数据集，获取起来有限、耗时且昂贵，需要深入的知识才能提供高质量的标记数据集。我们通过开发一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的新型深度学习框架来解决这些问题，以创建第一个真实的合成岩石学数据集。选择 StyleGAN2 架构是为了能够稳健地复制统计和美学特征，并改善岩相数据的内部方差。训练数据集包含 10070 张岩石薄片在平面和交叉偏振光下的图像。该算法经过 264 个 GPU 小时的训练，岩相图像的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 得分达到了 12.49 的最先进水平。我们进一步观察到 FID 值随岩性类型和图像分辨率的变化而变化。我们的调查表明，主题专家发现生成的图像与真实图像无法区分。这项研究强调，GAN 是一种强大的方法，可以生成真实的合成数据、试验潜在空间，并作为未来的自我标记工具，减少创建地质数据集的工作量。

AI.tldr: 开发基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的PetroGAN框架，生成高质量、无标签的合成岩相学数据集。
AI.motivation: 地质数据集（尤其是岩相学数据）存在获取困难、成本高、标注依赖专业知识等问题，限制了深度学习在地质领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用StyleGAN2架构，使用10070张岩石薄片图像（含平面偏光和交叉偏光）训练模型，通过264 GPU小时优化生成效果，并以FID分数评估生成图像质量。
AI.result: 模型达到岩相图像的SOTA FID分数12.49，生成图像在专家评估中与真实图像难以区分，且FID值随岩石类型和分辨率变化呈现规律性差异。
AI.conclusion: GAN技术能有效生成高质量合成地质数据，为探索潜在空间、实现自标注提供新工具，可显著降低地质数据集构建成本。

authors_text: Malcolm C. A. White,Kushal Sharma,Ang Li,T. K. Satish Kumar,Nori Nakata
title: FastMapSVM: Classifying Complex Objects Using the FastMap Algorithm and Support-Vector Machines
title_zh: FastMapSVM：使用 FastMap 算法和支持向量机对复杂对象进行分类
abstract: Neural Networks and related Deep Learning methods are currently at the leading edge of technologies used for classifying objects. However, they generally demand large amounts of time and data for model training; and their learned models can sometimes be difficult to interpret. In this paper, we advance FastMapSVM -- an interpretable Machine Learning framework for classifying complex objects -- as an advantageous alternative to Neural Networks for general classification tasks. FastMapSVM extends the applicability of Support-Vector Machines (SVMs) to domains with complex objects by combining the complementary strengths of FastMap and SVMs. FastMap is an efficient linear-time algorithm that maps complex objects to points in a Euclidean space while preserving pairwise domain-specific distances between them. We demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of FastMapSVM in the context of classifying seismograms. We show that its performance, in terms of precision, recall, and accuracy, is comparable to that of other state-of-the-art methods. However, compared to other methods, FastMapSVM uses significantly smaller amounts of time and data for model training. It also provides a perspicuous visualization of the objects and the classification boundaries between them. We expect FastMapSVM to be viable for classification tasks in many other real-world domains.
summary: Neural Networks and related Deep Learning methods are currently at the leading edge of technologies used for classifying objects. However, they generally demand large amounts of time and data for model training; and their learned models can sometimes be difficult to interpret. In this paper, we advance FastMapSVM -- an interpretable Machine Learning framework for classifying complex objects -- as an advantageous alternative to Neural Networks for general classification tasks. FastMapSVM extends the applicability of Support-Vector Machines (SVMs) to domains with complex objects by combining the complementary strengths of FastMap and SVMs. FastMap is an efficient linear-time algorithm that maps complex objects to points in a Euclidean space while preserving pairwise domain-specific distances between them. We demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of FastMapSVM in the context of classifying seismograms. We show that its performance, in terms of precision, recall, and accuracy, is comparable to that of other state-of-the-art methods. However, compared to other methods, FastMapSVM uses significantly smaller amounts of time and data for model training. It also provides a perspicuous visualization of the objects and the classification boundaries between them. We expect FastMapSVM to be viable for classification tasks in many other real-world domains.
abstract_zh: 神经网络和相关的深度学习方法目前处于用于对象分类的技术的前沿。然而，它们通常需要大量的时间和数据来进行模型训练；他们学到的模型有时很难解释。在本文中，我们提出了 FastMapSVM（一种用于对复杂对象进行分类的可解释机器学习框架），作为一般分类任务中神经网络的有利替代方案。 FastMapSVM 通过结合 FastMap 和 SVM 的互补优势，将支持向量机 (SVM) 的适用性扩展到具有复杂对象的领域。 FastMap 是一种高效的线性时间算法，它将复杂对象映射到欧几里得空间中的点，同时保留它们之间的成对域特定距离。我们展示了 FastMapSVM 在地震图分类方面的效率和有效性。我们证明，其在精确度、召回率和准确性方面的性能可与其他最先进的方法相媲美。然而，与其他方法相比，FastMapSVM 用于模型训练的时间和数据要少得多。它还提供了对象及其之间的分类边界的清晰可视化。我们期望 FastMapSVM 对于许多其他现实领域的分类任务是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FastMapSVM的可解释机器学习框架，通过结合FastMap算法与支持向量机（SVM），用于对复杂对象进行分类，作为神经网络的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 神经网络等深度学习方法虽处于分类技术前沿，但通常需要大量时间和数据训练，且模型难以解释。本文旨在提供一种更高效、数据需求更少且可解释的分类方法。
AI.method: FastMapSVM通过FastMap算法将复杂对象映射到欧几里得空间以保留领域特定的距离关系，再结合SVM进行分类，从而扩展SVM在复杂对象领域的适用性。
AI.result: 在地震图分类任务中，FastMapSVM的精确率、召回率和准确率与先进方法相当，但训练时间更短、数据需求更少，并能提供清晰的可视化分类边界。
AI.conclusion: FastMapSVM因其高效性、可解释性和可视化优势，有望在多个现实领域的分类任务中得到应用。

authors_text: Nada Chaari,Hatice Camgoz Akdag,Islem Rekik
title: Comparative Survey of Multigraph Integration Methods for Holistic Brain Connectivity Mapping
title_zh: 整体大脑连接映射的多图集成方法的比较研究
abstract: One of the greatest scientific challenges in network neuroscience is to create a representative map of a population of heterogeneous brain networks, which acts as a connectional fingerprint. The connectional brain template (CBT), also named network atlas, presents a powerful tool for capturing the most representative and discriminative traits of a given population while preserving its topological patterns. The idea of a CBT is to integrate a population of heterogeneous brain connectivity networks, derived from different neuroimaging modalities or brain views (e.g., structural and functional), into a unified holistic representation. Here we review current state-of-the-art methods designed to estimate well-centered and representative CBT for populations of single-view and multi-view brain networks. We start by reviewing each CBT learning method, then we introduce the evaluation measures to compare CBT representativeness of populations generated by single-view and multigraph integration methods, separately, based on the following criteria: centeredness, biomarker-reproducibility, node-level similarity, global-level similarity, and distance-based similarity. We demonstrate that the deep graph normalizer (DGN) method significantly outperforms other multi-graph and all single-view integration methods for estimating CBTs using a variety of healthy and disordered datasets in terms of centeredness, reproducibility (i.e., graph-derived biomarkers reproducibility that disentangle the typical from the atypical connectivity variability), and preserving the topological traits at both local and global graph-levels.
summary: One of the greatest scientific challenges in network neuroscience is to create a representative map of a population of heterogeneous brain networks, which acts as a connectional fingerprint. The connectional brain template (CBT), also named network atlas, presents a powerful tool for capturing the most representative and discriminative traits of a given population while preserving its topological patterns. The idea of a CBT is to integrate a population of heterogeneous brain connectivity networks, derived from different neuroimaging modalities or brain views (e.g., structural and functional), into a unified holistic representation. Here we review current state-of-the-art methods designed to estimate well-centered and representative CBT for populations of single-view and multi-view brain networks. We start by reviewing each CBT learning method, then we introduce the evaluation measures to compare CBT representativeness of populations generated by single-view and multigraph integration methods, separately, based on the following criteria: centeredness, biomarker-reproducibility, node-level similarity, global-level similarity, and distance-based similarity. We demonstrate that the deep graph normalizer (DGN) method significantly outperforms other multi-graph and all single-view integration methods for estimating CBTs using a variety of healthy and disordered datasets in terms of centeredness, reproducibility (i.e., graph-derived biomarkers reproducibility that disentangle the typical from the atypical connectivity variability), and preserving the topological traits at both local and global graph-levels.
abstract_zh: 网络神经科学中最大的科学挑战之一是创建异构大脑网络群体的代表性图谱，作为连接指纹。连接大脑模板（CBT），也称为网络图集，提供了一种强大的工具，可以捕获给定人群最具代表性和辨别力的特征，同时保留其拓扑模式。 CBT 的想法是将源自不同神经影像模式或大脑视图（例如结构和功能）的异质大脑连接网络群体整合为统一的整体表示。在这里，我们回顾了当前最先进的方法，旨在估计单视图和多视图大脑网络群体的集中且具有代表性的 CBT。我们首先回顾每种 CBT 学习方法，然后介绍评估措施，根据以下标准分别比较单视图和多图集成方法生成的人群的 CBT 代表性：中心性、生物标记再现性、节点级相似性、全局级相似性和基于距离的相似性。我们证明，深度图归一化器（DGN）方法在中心性、再现性（即从图衍生的生物标志物再现性中区分典型与非典型连接变异性）以及在局部和全局图水平上保留拓扑特征方面，显着优于其他多图和所有单视图集成方法，用于使用各种健康和无序数据集估计 CBT。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于整合多视图脑连接网络的多种方法，旨在生成具有代表性的连接性脑模板（CBT）。
AI.motivation: 脑网络异质性高，需通过整合不同模态数据生成统一的连接性指纹以捕捉群体特征。
AI.method: 系统回顾CBT学习方法，并基于中心性、生物标志物可重复性、节点级与全局相似性等指标进行评估比较。
AI.result: 深度图归一化器（DGN）在健康与疾病数据集中均显著优于其他单视图及多图整合方法。
AI.conclusion: DGN方法在保持局部与全局拓扑特性的同时，能更准确估计群体代表性脑连接模板。

authors_text: Katsiaryna Haitsiukevich,Alexander Ilin
title: Improved Training of Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Model Ensembles
title_zh: 使用模型集成改进物理信息神经网络的训练
comment: ef:2023 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
comments: ef:2023 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
abstract: Learning the solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) with a neural network is an attractive alternative to traditional solvers due to its elegance, greater flexibility and the ease of incorporating observed data. However, training such physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) is notoriously difficult in practice since PINNs often converge to wrong solutions. In this paper, we address this problem by training an ensemble of PINNs. Our approach is motivated by the observation that individual PINN models find similar solutions in the vicinity of points with targets (e.g., observed data or initial conditions) while their solutions may substantially differ farther away from such points. Therefore, we propose to use the ensemble agreement as the criterion for gradual expansion of the solution interval, that is including new points for computing the loss derived from differential equations. Due to the flexibility of the domain expansion, our algorithm can easily incorporate measurements in arbitrary locations. In contrast to the existing PINN algorithms with time-adaptive strategies, the proposed algorithm does not need a pre-defined schedule of interval expansion and it treats time and space equally. We experimentally show that the proposed algorithm can stabilize PINN training and yield performance competitive to the recent variants of PINNs trained with time adaptation.
summary: Learning the solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) with a neural network is an attractive alternative to traditional solvers due to its elegance, greater flexibility and the ease of incorporating observed data. However, training such physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) is notoriously difficult in practice since PINNs often converge to wrong solutions. In this paper, we address this problem by training an ensemble of PINNs. Our approach is motivated by the observation that individual PINN models find similar solutions in the vicinity of points with targets (e.g., observed data or initial conditions) while their solutions may substantially differ farther away from such points. Therefore, we propose to use the ensemble agreement as the criterion for gradual expansion of the solution interval, that is including new points for computing the loss derived from differential equations. Due to the flexibility of the domain expansion, our algorithm can easily incorporate measurements in arbitrary locations. In contrast to the existing PINN algorithms with time-adaptive strategies, the proposed algorithm does not need a pre-defined schedule of interval expansion and it treats time and space equally. We experimentally show that the proposed algorithm can stabilize PINN training and yield performance competitive to the recent variants of PINNs trained with time adaptation.
abstract_zh: 使用神经网络学习偏微分方程 (PDE) 的求解是传统求解器的一个有吸引力的替代方案，因为它优雅、更大的灵活性并且易于合并观测数据。然而，训练这种物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 在实践中非常困难，因为 PINN 经常收敛到错误的解决方案。在本文中，我们通过训练 PINN 集合来解决这个问题。我们的方法的动机是观察到各个 PINN 模型在具有目标的点（例如，观察到的数据或初始条件）附近找到类似的解决方案，而远离这些点时它们的解决方案可能会有很大不同。因此，我们建议使用系综一致性作为逐步扩大解区间的标准，即包含新的点来计算微分方程导出的损失。由于域扩展的灵活性，我们的算法可以轻松地将测量合并到任意位置。与现有的具有时间自适应策略的PINN算法相比，所提出的算法不需要预先定义的区间扩展时间表，并且平等地对待时间和空间。我们通过实验表明，所提出的算法可以稳定 PINN 训练，并且产生的性能与最近经过时间自适应训练的 PINN 变体相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过训练多个物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的集成模型，改进其训练稳定性并提升求解偏微分方程的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统PINNs在训练中易收敛到错误解，且单模型在远离目标点（如观测数据或初始条件）时解的差异显著，需通过集成一致性动态扩展求解区间。
AI.method: 基于模型集成的一致性，逐步扩展解的计算区间并动态纳入新点计算微分方程损失，无需预设时间扩展计划，实现时空对称处理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能稳定PINN训练，性能与最新时间自适应PINN变体相当，且可灵活融合任意位置的观测数据。

search_text: Improved Training of Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Model Ensembles 使用模型集成改进物理信息神经网络的训练 Learning the solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) with a neural network is an attractive alternative to traditional solvers due to its elegance, greater flexibility and the ease of incorporating observed data. However, training such physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) is notoriously difficult in practice since PINNs often converge to wrong solutions. In this paper, we address this problem by training an ensemble of PINNs. Our approach is motivated by the observation that individual PINN models find similar solutions in the vicinity of points with targets (e.g., observed data or initial conditions) while their solutions may substantially differ farther away from such points. Therefore, we propose to use the ensemble agreement as the criterion for gradual expansion of the solution interval, that is including new points for computing the loss derived from differential equations. Due to the flexibility of the domain expansion, our algorithm can easily incorporate measurements in arbitrary locations. In contrast to the existing PINN algorithms with time-adaptive strategies, the proposed algorithm does not need a pre-defined schedule of interval expansion and it treats time and space equally. We experimentally show that the proposed algorithm can stabilize PINN training and yield performance competitive to the recent variants of PINNs trained with time adaptation. 使用神经网络学习偏微分方程 (PDE) 的求解是传统求解器的一个有吸引力的替代方案，因为它优雅、更大的灵活性并且易于合并观测数据。然而，训练这种物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 在实践中非常困难，因为 PINN 经常收敛到错误的解决方案。在本文中，我们通过训练 PINN 集合来解决这个问题。我们的方法的动机是观察到各个 PINN 模型在具有目标的点（例如，观察到的数据或初始条件）附近找到类似的解决方案，而远离这些点时它们的解决方案可能会有很大不同。因此，我们建议使用系综一致性作为逐步扩大解区间的标准，即包含新的点来计算微分方程导出的损失。由于域扩展的灵活性，我们的算法可以轻松地将测量合并到任意位置。与现有的具有时间自适应策略的PINN算法相比，所提出的算法不需要预先定义的区间扩展时间表，并且平等地对待时间和空间。我们通过实验表明，所提出的算法可以稳定 PINN 训练，并且产生的性能与最近经过时间自适应训练的 PINN 变体相比具有竞争力。 本文提出通过训练多个物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的集成模型，改进其训练稳定性并提升求解偏微分方程的性能。 Katsiaryna Haitsiukevich,Alexander Ilin cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Juan Vazquez-Rodriguez,Grégoire Lefebvre,Julien Cumin,James L. Crowley
title: Transformer-Based Self-Supervised Learning for Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的情绪识别自监督学习
comment: ef:26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022), Aug 2022, Montreal, Canada
comments: ef:26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022), Aug 2022, Montreal, Canada
abstract: In order to exploit representations of time-series signals, such as physiological signals, it is essential that these representations capture relevant information from the whole signal. In this work, we propose to use a Transformer-based model to process electrocardiograms (ECG) for emotion recognition. Attention mechanisms of the Transformer can be used to build contextualized representations for a signal, giving more importance to relevant parts. These representations may then be processed with a fully-connected network to predict emotions. To overcome the relatively small size of datasets with emotional labels, we employ self-supervised learning. We gathered several ECG datasets with no labels of emotion to pre-train our model, which we then fine-tuned for emotion recognition on the AMIGOS dataset. We show that our approach reaches state-of-the-art performances for emotion recognition using ECG signals on AMIGOS. More generally, our experiments show that transformers and pre-training are promising strategies for emotion recognition with physiological signals.
summary: In order to exploit representations of time-series signals, such as physiological signals, it is essential that these representations capture relevant information from the whole signal. In this work, we propose to use a Transformer-based model to process electrocardiograms (ECG) for emotion recognition. Attention mechanisms of the Transformer can be used to build contextualized representations for a signal, giving more importance to relevant parts. These representations may then be processed with a fully-connected network to predict emotions. To overcome the relatively small size of datasets with emotional labels, we employ self-supervised learning. We gathered several ECG datasets with no labels of emotion to pre-train our model, which we then fine-tuned for emotion recognition on the AMIGOS dataset. We show that our approach reaches state-of-the-art performances for emotion recognition using ECG signals on AMIGOS. More generally, our experiments show that transformers and pre-training are promising strategies for emotion recognition with physiological signals.
abstract_zh: 为了利用时间序列信号（例如生理信号）的表示，这些表示从整个信号中捕获相关信息至关重要。在这项工作中，我们建议使用基于 Transformer 的模型来处理心电图 (ECG) 以进行情绪识别。 Transformer 的注意力机制可用于构建信号的上下文表示，从而更加重视相关部分。然后可以使用完全连接的网络处理这些表示以预测情绪。为了克服带有情感标签的数据集相对较小的问题，我们采用自我监督学习。我们收集了几个没有情感标签的心电图数据集来预训练我们的模型，然后对模型进行微调以在 AMIGOS 数据集上进行情感识别。我们证明，我们的方法在 AMIGOS 上使用 ECG 信号进行情感识别时达到了最先进的性能。更一般地说，我们的实验表明，变压器和预训练是利用生理信号进行情绪识别的有前途的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的自监督学习方法，用于通过心电图（ECG）信号进行情绪识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效捕捉时间序列生理信号的全局信息，且情绪标注数据集规模较小，需利用自监督学习提升模型表现。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模型的注意力机制构建ECG信号的上下文表示，通过无标签ECG数据集进行自监督预训练，再在AMIGOS数据集上微调以识别情绪。
AI.result: 在AMIGOS数据集上达到ECG情绪识别的最先进水平，验证了Transformer与预训练策略在生理信号情绪识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构结合自监督预训练为生理信号情绪识别提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛应用前景。

authors_text: Congcong Liu,Yuejiang Li,Fei Teng,Xiwei Zhao,Changping Peng,Zhangang Lin,Jinghe Hu,Jingping Shao
title: On the Adaptation to Concept Drift for CTR Prediction
title_zh: 关于 CTR 预测的概念漂移适应
abstract: Click-through rate (CTR) prediction is a crucial task in web search, recommender systems, and online advertisement displaying. In practical application, CTR models often serve with high-speed user-generated data streams, whose underlying distribution rapidly changing over time. The concept drift problem inevitably exists in those streaming data, which can lead to performance degradation due to the timeliness issue. To ensure model freshness, incremental learning has been widely adopted in real-world production systems. However, it is hard for the incremental update to achieve the balance of the CTR models between the adaptability to capture the fast-changing trends and generalization ability to retain common knowledge. In this paper, we propose adaptive mixture of experts (AdaMoE), a new framework to alleviate the concept drift problem by statistical weighting policy in the data stream of CTR prediction. The extensive offline experiments on both benchmark and a real-world industrial dataset, as well as an online A/B testing show that our AdaMoE significantly outperforms all incremental learning frameworks considered.
summary: Click-through rate (CTR) prediction is a crucial task in web search, recommender systems, and online advertisement displaying. In practical application, CTR models often serve with high-speed user-generated data streams, whose underlying distribution rapidly changing over time. The concept drift problem inevitably exists in those streaming data, which can lead to performance degradation due to the timeliness issue. To ensure model freshness, incremental learning has been widely adopted in real-world production systems. However, it is hard for the incremental update to achieve the balance of the CTR models between the adaptability to capture the fast-changing trends and generalization ability to retain common knowledge. In this paper, we propose adaptive mixture of experts (AdaMoE), a new framework to alleviate the concept drift problem by statistical weighting policy in the data stream of CTR prediction. The extensive offline experiments on both benchmark and a real-world industrial dataset, as well as an online A/B testing show that our AdaMoE significantly outperforms all incremental learning frameworks considered.
abstract_zh: 点击率 (CTR) 预测是网络搜索、推荐系统和在线广告显示中的一项关键任务。在实际应用中，CTR模型通常服务于高速用户生成的数据流，其底层分布随着时间的推移而快速变化。这些流数据不可避免地存在概念漂移问题，这会导致由于时效性问题而导致性能下降。为了确保模型的新鲜度，增量学习已在现实生产系统中广泛采用。然而，增量更新很难实现CTR模型在捕捉快速变化趋势的适应性和保留公共知识的泛化能力之间的平衡。在本文中，我们提出了自适应专家混合（AdaMoE），这是一种新框架，通过点击率预测数据流中的统计加权策略来缓解概念漂移问题。对基准和真实工业数据集进行的广泛离线实验以及在线 A/B 测试表明，我们的 AdaMoE 显着优于所有考虑的增量学习框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaMoE的新框架，旨在解决点击率（CTR）预测中因概念漂移导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 在CTR预测的实际应用中，数据流的分布会随时间快速变化（概念漂移），导致现有增量学习方法难以平衡模型对新趋势的适应能力与保留通用知识的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过引入统计加权策略，AdaMoE框架在数据流中动态调整专家模型的权重，以适应概念漂移并提升模型的实时性与稳定性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和真实工业数据集上的离线实验以及在线A/B测试均表明，AdaMoE显著优于其他增量学习方法。
AI.conclusion: AdaMoE有效缓解了概念漂移问题，为实时CTR预测提供了更高效且稳定的解决方案。

The extensive offline experiments on both benchmark and a real-world industrial dataset, as well as an online A/B testing show that our AdaMoE significantly outperforms all incremental learning frameworks considered. 点击率 (CTR) 预测是网络搜索、推荐系统和在线广告显示中的一项关键任务。在实际应用中，CTR模型通常服务于高速用户生成的数据流，其底层分布随着时间的推移而快速变化。这些流数据不可避免地存在概念漂移问题，这会导致由于时效性问题而导致性能下降。为了确保模型的新鲜度，增量学习已在现实生产系统中广泛采用。然而，增量更新很难实现CTR模型在捕捉快速变化趋势的适应性和保留公共知识的泛化能力之间的平衡。在本文中，我们提出了自适应专家混合（AdaMoE），这是一种新框架，通过点击率预测数据流中的统计加权策略来缓解概念漂移问题。对基准和真实工业数据集进行的广泛离线实验以及在线 A/B 测试表明，我们的 AdaMoE 显着优于所有考虑的增量学习框架。 本文提出了一种名为AdaMoE的新框架，旨在解决点击率（CTR）预测中因概念漂移导致的模型性能下降问题。 Congcong Liu,Yuejiang Li,Fei Teng,Xiwei Zhao,Changping Peng,Zhangang Lin,Jinghe Hu,Jingping Shao cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Martijn Bos,Silvio Traversaro,Daniele Pucci,Alessandro Saccon
title: Efficient Geometric Linearization of Moving-Base Rigid Robot Dynamics
title_zh: 动基刚性机器人动力学的高效几何线性化
comment: :Primary: 70E55 (Dynamics of multibody systems); 22Exx (Lie groups); 93-xx(Systems theory; control); 65-xx (Numerical analysis)
comments: :Primary: 70E55 (Dynamics of multibody systems); 22Exx (Lie groups); 93-xx(Systems theory; control); 65-xx (Numerical analysis)
abstract: The linearization of the equations of motion of a robotics system about a given state-input trajectory, including a controlled equilibrium state, is a valuable tool for model-based planning, closed-loop control, gain tuning, and state estimation. Contrary to the case of fixed based manipulators with prismatic or rotary joints, the state space of moving-base robotic systems such as humanoids, quadruped robots, or aerial manipulators cannot be globally parametrized by a finite number of independent coordinates. This impossibility is a direct consequence of the fact that the state of these systems includes the system's global orientation, formally described as an element of the special orthogonal group SO(3). As a consequence, obtaining the linearization of the equations of motion for these systems is typically resolved, from a practical perspective, by locally parameterizing the system's attitude by means of, e.g., Euler or Cardan angles. This has the drawback, however, of introducing artificial parameterization singularities and extra derivative computations. In this contribution, we show that it is actually possible to define a notion of linearization that does not require the use of a local parameterization for the system's orientation, obtaining a mathematically elegant, recursive, and singularity-free linearization for moving-based robot systems. Recursiveness, in particular, is obtained by proposing a nontrivial modification of existing recursive algorithms to allow for computations of the geometric derivatives of the inverse dynamics and the inverse of the mass matrix of the robotic system. The correctness of the proposed algorithm is validated by means of a numerical comparison with the result obtained via geometric finite difference.
summary: The linearization of the equations of motion of a robotics system about a given state-input trajectory, including a controlled equilibrium state, is a valuable tool for model-based planning, closed-loop control, gain tuning, and state estimation. Contrary to the case of fixed based manipulators with prismatic or rotary joints, the state space of moving-base robotic systems such as humanoids, quadruped robots, or aerial manipulators cannot be globally parametrized by a finite number of independent coordinates. This impossibility is a direct consequence of the fact that the state of these systems includes the system's global orientation, formally described as an element of the special orthogonal group SO(3). As a consequence, obtaining the linearization of the equations of motion for these systems is typically resolved, from a practical perspective, by locally parameterizing the system's attitude by means of, e.g., Euler or Cardan angles. This has the drawback, however, of introducing artificial parameterization singularities and extra derivative computations. In this contribution, we show that it is actually possible to define a notion of linearization that does not require the use of a local parameterization for the system's orientation, obtaining a mathematically elegant, recursive, and singularity-free linearization for moving-based robot systems. Recursiveness, in particular, is obtained by proposing a nontrivial modification of existing recursive algorithms to allow for computations of the geometric derivatives of the inverse dynamics and the inverse of the mass matrix of the robotic system. The correctness of the proposed algorithm is validated by means of a numerical comparison with the result obtained via geometric finite difference.
abstract_zh: 机器人系统关于给定状态输入轨迹（包括受控平衡状态）的运动方程的线性化是基于模型的规划、闭环控制、增益调整和状态估计的宝贵工具。与具有棱柱或旋转关节的固定基机械臂的情况相反，诸如类人机器人、四足机器人或空中机械臂等移动基机器人系统的状态空间不能通过有限数量的独立坐标来全局参数化。这种不可能性是以下事实的直接结果：这些系统的状态包括系统的全局方向，正式描述为特殊正交群 SO(3) 的一个元素。因此，从实际角度来看，获得这些系统运动方程的线性化通常是通过利用欧拉角或卡丹角等对系统的姿态进行局部参数化来解决的。然而，这具有引入人工参数化奇点和额外导数计算的缺点。在这篇文章中，我们表明实际上可以定义线性化的概念，不需要使用局部参数化来确定系统的方向，从而为基于移动的机器人系统获得数学上优雅的、递归的和无奇点的线性化。特别是，递归性是通过对现有递归算法提出重要修改来获得的，以允许计算机器人系统的逆动力学和质量矩阵的逆的几何导数。通过与几何有限差分结果的数值比较，验证了该算法的正确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需局部参数化的移动基底刚体机器人动力学几何线性化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过欧拉角等局部参数化处理移动基底机器人姿态，导致奇异性及额外导数计算，影响控制精度与效率。
AI.method: 通过改进递归算法直接计算几何导数与质量矩阵逆，避免局部参数化，实现数学优雅且无奇点的线性化。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该方法与几何有限差分结果的一致性，证明其有效性与递归计算的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为移动基底机器人提供了无需局部参数化的线性化方案，提升了模型预测控制与参数调优的可靠性。

authors_text: Theodore R. Sumers,Robert D. Hawkins,Mark K. Ho,Thomas L. Griffiths,Dylan Hadfield-Menell
title: Linguistic communication as (inverse) reward design
title_zh: 语言交流作为（逆）奖励设计
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at Learning from Natural Language Supervision workshop (ACL 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at Learning from Natural Language Supervision workshop (ACL 2022)
abstract: Natural language is an intuitive and expressive way to communicate reward information to autonomous agents. It encompasses everything from concrete instructions to abstract descriptions of the world. Despite this, natural language is often challenging to learn from: it is difficult for machine learning methods to make appropriate inferences from such a wide range of input. This paper proposes a generalization of reward design as a unifying principle to ground linguistic communication: speakers choose utterances to maximize expected rewards from the listener's future behaviors. We first extend reward design to incorporate reasoning about unknown future states in a linear bandit setting. We then define a speaker model which chooses utterances according to this objective. Simulations show that short-horizon speakers (reasoning primarily about a single, known state) tend to use instructions, while long-horizon speakers (reasoning primarily about unknown, future states) tend to describe the reward function. We then define a pragmatic listener which performs inverse reward design by jointly inferring the speaker's latent horizon and rewards. Our findings suggest that this extension of reward design to linguistic communication, including the notion of a latent speaker horizon, is a promising direction for achieving more robust alignment outcomes from natural language supervision.
summary: Natural language is an intuitive and expressive way to communicate reward information to autonomous agents. It encompasses everything from concrete instructions to abstract descriptions of the world. Despite this, natural language is often challenging to learn from: it is difficult for machine learning methods to make appropriate inferences from such a wide range of input. This paper proposes a generalization of reward design as a unifying principle to ground linguistic communication: speakers choose utterances to maximize expected rewards from the listener's future behaviors. We first extend reward design to incorporate reasoning about unknown future states in a linear bandit setting. We then define a speaker model which chooses utterances according to this objective. Simulations show that short-horizon speakers (reasoning primarily about a single, known state) tend to use instructions, while long-horizon speakers (reasoning primarily about unknown, future states) tend to describe the reward function. We then define a pragmatic listener which performs inverse reward design by jointly inferring the speaker's latent horizon and rewards. Our findings suggest that this extension of reward design to linguistic communication, including the notion of a latent speaker horizon, is a promising direction for achieving more robust alignment outcomes from natural language supervision.
abstract_zh: 自然语言是一种向自主代理传达奖励信息的直观且富有表现力的方式。它涵盖了从具体指令到对世界的抽象描述的一切。尽管如此，自然语言的学习往往具有挑战性：机器学习方法很难从如此广泛的输入中做出适当的推论。本文提出了奖励设计的概括，作为基础语言交流的统一原则：说话者选择话语以最大化听者未来行为的预期奖励。我们首先扩展奖励设计，将关于线性强盗设置中未知未来状态的推理纳入其中。然后，我们定义一个说话者模型，根据这个目标选择话语。模拟表明，短视野说话者（主要推理单个已知状态）倾向于使用指令，而长视野说话者（主要推理未知的未来状态）倾向于描述奖励函数。然后，我们定义一个务实的听众，它通过共同推断说话者的潜在视野和奖励来执行逆奖励设计。我们的研究结果表明，将奖励设计扩展到语言交流，包括潜在说话者视野的概念，是通过自然语言监督实现更稳健的对齐结果的一个有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文将语言交流建模为奖励设计的逆问题，通过扩展奖励设计框架并结合说话者与听众模型，实现自然语言监督下更稳健的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 自然语言作为奖励信息的沟通方式具有表达力强的特点，但机器学习方法难以处理其多样性，需建立统一框架解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 扩展奖励设计以处理未知未来状态，构建基于线性带宽的说话者模型与逆向奖励设计的实用听众模型，联合推断潜在地平线与奖励函数。
AI.result: 短地平线说话者倾向使用指令，长地平线说话者倾向描述奖励函数；听众模型能有效联合推断说话者的潜在地平线和奖励目标。
AI.conclusion: 将奖励设计扩展至语言交流领域，特别是引入潜在说话者地平线概念，为自然语言监督下的对齐问题提供了有前景的研究方向。

Our findings suggest that this extension of reward design to linguistic communication, including the notion of a latent speaker horizon, is a promising direction for achieving more robust alignment outcomes from natural language supervision. 自然语言是一种向自主代理传达奖励信息的直观且富有表现力的方式。它涵盖了从具体指令到对世界的抽象描述的一切。尽管如此，自然语言的学习往往具有挑战性：机器学习方法很难从如此广泛的输入中做出适当的推论。本文提出了奖励设计的概括，作为基础语言交流的统一原则：说话者选择话语以最大化听者未来行为的预期奖励。我们首先扩展奖励设计，将关于线性强盗设置中未知未来状态的推理纳入其中。然后，我们定义一个说话者模型，根据这个目标选择话语。模拟表明，短视野说话者（主要推理单个已知状态）倾向于使用指令，而长视野说话者（主要推理未知的未来状态）倾向于描述奖励函数。然后，我们定义一个务实的听众，它通过共同推断说话者的潜在视野和奖励来执行逆奖励设计。我们的研究结果表明，将奖励设计扩展到语言交流，包括潜在说话者视野的概念，是通过自然语言监督实现更稳健的对齐结果的一个有希望的方向。 本文将语言交流建模为奖励设计的逆问题，通过扩展奖励设计框架并结合说话者与听众模型，实现自然语言监督下更稳健的对齐效果。 Theodore R. Sumers,Robert D. Hawkins,Mark K. Ho,Thomas L. Griffiths,Dylan Hadfield-Menell cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Enze Xie,Zhiding Yu,Daquan Zhou,Jonah Philion,Anima Anandkumar,Sanja Fidler,Ping Luo,Jose M. Alvarez
title: M$^2$BEV: Multi-Camera Joint 3D Detection and Segmentation with Unified Birds-Eye View Representation
title_zh: M$^2$BEV：具有统一鸟瞰视图表示的多摄像头联合 3D 检测和分割
abstract: In this paper, we propose M$^2$BEV, a unified framework that jointly performs 3D object detection and map segmentation in the Birds Eye View~(BEV) space with multi-camera image inputs. Unlike the majority of previous works which separately process detection and segmentation, M$^2$BEV infers both tasks with a unified model and improves efficiency. M$^2$BEV efficiently transforms multi-view 2D image features into the 3D BEV feature in ego-car coordinates. Such BEV representation is important as it enables different tasks to share a single encoder. Our framework further contains four important designs that benefit both accuracy and efficiency: (1) An efficient BEV encoder design that reduces the spatial dimension of a voxel feature map. (2) A dynamic box assignment strategy that uses learning-to-match to assign ground-truth 3D boxes with anchors. (3) A BEV centerness re-weighting that reinforces with larger weights for more distant predictions, and (4) Large-scale 2D detection pre-training and auxiliary supervision. We show that these designs significantly benefit the ill-posed camera-based 3D perception tasks where depth information is missing. M$^2$BEV is memory efficient, allowing significantly higher resolution images as input, with faster inference speed. Experiments on nuScenes show that M$^2$BEV achieves state-of-the-art results in both 3D object detection and BEV segmentation, with the best single model achieving 42.5 mAP and 57.0 mIoU in these two tasks, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we propose M$^2$BEV, a unified framework that jointly performs 3D object detection and map segmentation in the Birds Eye View~(BEV) space with multi-camera image inputs. Unlike the majority of previous works which separately process detection and segmentation, M$^2$BEV infers both tasks with a unified model and improves efficiency. M$^2$BEV efficiently transforms multi-view 2D image features into the 3D BEV feature in ego-car coordinates. Such BEV representation is important as it enables different tasks to share a single encoder. Our framework further contains four important designs that benefit both accuracy and efficiency: (1) An efficient BEV encoder design that reduces the spatial dimension of a voxel feature map. (2) A dynamic box assignment strategy that uses learning-to-match to assign ground-truth 3D boxes with anchors. (3) A BEV centerness re-weighting that reinforces with larger weights for more distant predictions, and (4) Large-scale 2D detection pre-training and auxiliary supervision. We show that these designs significantly benefit the ill-posed camera-based 3D perception tasks where depth information is missing. M$^2$BEV is memory efficient, allowing significantly higher resolution images as input, with faster inference speed. Experiments on nuScenes show that M$^2$BEV achieves state-of-the-art results in both 3D object detection and BEV segmentation, with the best single model achieving 42.5 mAP and 57.0 mIoU in these two tasks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 M$^2$BEV，这是一个统一的框架，可以在鸟瞰图~（BEV）空间中通过多相机图像输入联合执行 3D 对象检测和地图分割。与之前大多数单独处理检测和分割的工作不同，M$^2$BEV 使用统一的模型推断这两个任务并提高了效率。 M$^2$BEV 有效地将多视图 2D 图像特征转换为自我汽车坐标中的 3D BEV 特征。这种 BEV 表示很重要，因为它使不同的任务能够共享单个编码器。我们的框架还包含四个有利于准确性和效率的重要设计：（1）高效的 BEV 编码器设计，可减少体素特征图的空间维度。 (2) 动态框分配策略，使用学习匹配来分配带有锚点的真实 3D 框。 (3) BEV 中心重新加权，用更大的权重来增强更远的预测，(4) 大规模 2D 检测预训练和辅助监督。我们表明，这些设计对于缺少深度信息的基于相机的 3D 感知任务有很大好处。 M$^2$BEV 内存效率高，允许输入更高分辨率的图像，推理速度更快。 nuScenes 上的实验表明，M$^2$BEV 在 3D 对象检测和 BEV 分割方面都取得了最先进的结果，最好的单一模型在这两项任务中分别实现了 42.5 mAP 和 57.0 mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出M²BEV框架，通过多摄像头图像输入在鸟瞰图（BEV）空间中联合执行3D目标检测和地图分割。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理检测与分割任务效率低下，且摄像头缺乏深度信息导致3D感知任务困难，需统一模型提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 通过统一BEV表示将多视角2D特征转换为3D特征，包含四部分设计：高效BEV编码器、动态框分配策略、BEV中心性重加权及大规模预训练与辅助监督。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到3D检测42.5 mAP和BEV分割57.0 mIoU的最先进结果，支持高分辨率输入并加速推理。
AI.conclusion: M²BEV通过统一框架有效结合多任务，提升摄像头基3D感知效率，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Wei Liu,Fangyue Liu,Fei Ding,Qian He,Zili Yi
title: XMP-Font: Self-Supervised Cross-Modality Pre-training for Few-Shot Font Generation
title_zh: XMP-Font：用于少样本字体生成的自监督跨模态预训练
abstract: Generating a new font library is a very labor-intensive and time-consuming job for glyph-rich scripts. Few-shot font generation is thus required, as it requires only a few glyph references without fine-tuning during test. Existing methods follow the style-content disentanglement paradigm and expect novel fonts to be produced by combining the style codes of the reference glyphs and the content representations of the source. However, these few-shot font generation methods either fail to capture content-independent style representations, or employ localized component-wise style representations, which is insufficient to model many Chinese font styles that involve hyper-component features such as inter-component spacing and "connected-stroke". To resolve these drawbacks and make the style representations more reliable, we propose a self-supervised cross-modality pre-training strategy and a cross-modality transformer-based encoder that is conditioned jointly on the glyph image and the corresponding stroke labels. The cross-modality encoder is pre-trained in a self-supervised manner to allow effective capture of cross- and intra-modality correlations, which facilitates the content-style disentanglement and modeling style representations of all scales (stroke-level, component-level and character-level). The pre-trained encoder is then applied to the downstream font generation task without fine-tuning. Experimental comparisons of our method with state-of-the-art methods demonstrate our method successfully transfers styles of all scales. In addition, it only requires one reference glyph and achieves the lowest rate of bad cases in the few-shot font generation task 28% lower than the second best
summary: Generating a new font library is a very labor-intensive and time-consuming job for glyph-rich scripts. Few-shot font generation is thus required, as it requires only a few glyph references without fine-tuning during test. Existing methods follow the style-content disentanglement paradigm and expect novel fonts to be produced by combining the style codes of the reference glyphs and the content representations of the source. However, these few-shot font generation methods either fail to capture content-independent style representations, or employ localized component-wise style representations, which is insufficient to model many Chinese font styles that involve hyper-component features such as inter-component spacing and "connected-stroke". To resolve these drawbacks and make the style representations more reliable, we propose a self-supervised cross-modality pre-training strategy and a cross-modality transformer-based encoder that is conditioned jointly on the glyph image and the corresponding stroke labels. The cross-modality encoder is pre-trained in a self-supervised manner to allow effective capture of cross- and intra-modality correlations, which facilitates the content-style disentanglement and modeling style representations of all scales (stroke-level, component-level and character-level). The pre-trained encoder is then applied to the downstream font generation task without fine-tuning. Experimental comparisons of our method with state-of-the-art methods demonstrate our method successfully transfers styles of all scales. In addition, it only requires one reference glyph and achieves the lowest rate of bad cases in the few-shot font generation task 28% lower than the second best
abstract_zh: 对于字形丰富的脚本来说，生成新的字体库是一项非常劳动密集型且耗时的工作。因此需要很少的字体生成，因为它只需要几个字形引用，而无需在测试期间进行微调。现有方法遵循样式-内容解开范式，并期望通过结合参考字形的样式代码和源的内容表示来生成新颖的字体。然而，这些小样本字体生成方法要么无法捕获与内容无关的样式表示，要么采用本地化的组件式样式表示，这不足以对涉及超组件特征（例如组件间间距和“连接笔划”）的许多中文字体样式进行建模。为了解决这些缺点并使风格表示更加可靠，我们提出了一种自监督的跨模态预训练策略和一种基于跨模态变换器的编码器，该编码器共同以字形图像和相应的笔画标签为条件。跨模态编码器以自监督的方式进行预训练，以允许有效捕获跨模态和模内相关性，这有助于所有尺度（笔画级、组件级和字符级）的内容风格解开和建模风格表示。然后将预训练的编码器应用于下游字体生成任务，无需进行微调。我们的方法与最先进的方法的实验比较表明我们的方法成功地转移了所有规模的风格。此外，它只需要一个参考字形，并且在少样本字体生成任务中实现了最低的不良情况率，比第二好的低 28%

AI.tldr: 本文提出XMP-Font方法，通过自监督跨模态预训练实现小样本字体生成，解决现有方法在中文超组件特征建模中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本字体生成方法无法有效捕捉内容无关的全局风格表示，尤其难以建模中文字体中涉及组件间距和连笔等超组件特征的复杂风格。
AI.method: 设计跨模态Transformer编码器，联合处理字形图像和笔画标签，通过自监督预训练学习跨模态关联，实现多尺度（笔画级/组件级/字符级）风格表示的解耦与建模。
AI.result: 在少样本任务中仅需1个参考字形，坏案例率较最佳方法降低28%，成功实现跨尺度风格迁移。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态预训练策略有效提升了风格表示的可靠性，解决了中文复杂字体风格建模难题，显著优于现有方法。
