authors_text: Giovanni Bonetta,Matteo Ribero,Rossella Cancelliere
title: Regularization-based Pruning of Irrelevant Weights in Deep Neural Architectures
title_zh: 深度神经架构中基于正则化的不相关权重修剪
abstract: Deep neural networks exploiting millions of parameters are nowadays the norm in deep learning applications. This is a potential issue because of the great amount of computational resources needed for training, and of the possible loss of generalization performance of overparametrized networks. We propose in this paper a method for learning sparse neural topologies via a regularization technique which identifies non relevant weights and selectively shrinks their norm, while performing a classic update for relevant ones. This technique, which is an improvement of classical weight decay, is based on the definition of a regularization term which can be added to any loss functional regardless of its form, resulting in a unified general framework exploitable in many different contexts. The actual elimination of parameters identified as irrelevant is handled by an iterative pruning algorithm. We tested the proposed technique on different image classification and Natural language generation tasks, obtaining results on par or better then competitors in terms of sparsity and metrics, while achieving strong models compression.
summary: Deep neural networks exploiting millions of parameters are nowadays the norm in deep learning applications. This is a potential issue because of the great amount of computational resources needed for training, and of the possible loss of generalization performance of overparametrized networks. We propose in this paper a method for learning sparse neural topologies via a regularization technique which identifies non relevant weights and selectively shrinks their norm, while performing a classic update for relevant ones. This technique, which is an improvement of classical weight decay, is based on the definition of a regularization term which can be added to any loss functional regardless of its form, resulting in a unified general framework exploitable in many different contexts. The actual elimination of parameters identified as irrelevant is handled by an iterative pruning algorithm. We tested the proposed technique on different image classification and Natural language generation tasks, obtaining results on par or better then competitors in terms of sparsity and metrics, while achieving strong models compression.
abstract_zh: 利用数百万个参数的深度神经网络如今已成为深度学习应用的常态。这是一个潜在的问题，因为训练需要大量的计算资源，并且过度参数化网络可能会损失泛化性能。我们在本文中提出了一种通过正则化技术学习稀疏神经拓扑的方法，该技术识别不相关的权重并选择性地缩小其范数，同时对相关权重执行经典更新。该技术是经典权重衰减的改进，基于正则化项的定义，该正则化项可以添加到任何损失函数中，无论其形式如何，从而产生可在许多不同上下文中利用的统一通用框架。被识别为不相关的参数的实际消除是通过迭代修剪算法来处理的。我们在不同的图像分类和自然语言生成任务上测试了所提出的技术，在稀疏性和指标方面获得了与竞争对手相当或更好的结果，同时实现了强大的模型压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正则化的深度神经网络无关权重剪枝方法，通过识别并压缩非关键参数实现模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络参数量庞大导致计算资源消耗大且可能影响泛化性能，需有效剪枝无关权重以提升效率。
AI.method: 改进经典权重衰减技术，定义可适配任意损失函数的正则化项，并结合迭代剪枝算法消除无关参数。
AI.result: 在图像分类和自然语言生成任务中，模型稀疏性与性能指标达到或超越现有方法，实现高效压缩。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供统一框架有效剪枝无关权重，在保持性能的同时显著压缩模型规模，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Zeev Gutman,Ritvik Vij,Laurent Najman,Michael Lindenbaum
title: Assessing hierarchies by their consistent segmentations
title_zh: 通过一致的细分来评估层次结构
abstract: Current approaches to generic segmentation start by creating a hierarchy of nested image partitions and then specifying a segmentation from it. Our first contribution is to describe several ways, most of them new, for specifying segmentations using the hierarchy elements. Then, we consider the best hierarchy-induced segmentation specified by a limited number of hierarchy elements. We focus on a common quality measure for binary segmentations, the Jaccard index (also known as IoU). Optimizing the Jaccard index is highly non-trivial, and yet we propose an efficient approach for doing exactly that. This way we get algorithm-independent upper bounds on the quality of any segmentation created from the hierarchy. We found that the obtainable segmentation quality varies significantly depending on the way that the segments are specified by the hierarchy elements, and that representing a segmentation with only a few hierarchy elements is often possible. (Code is available).
summary: Current approaches to generic segmentation start by creating a hierarchy of nested image partitions and then specifying a segmentation from it. Our first contribution is to describe several ways, most of them new, for specifying segmentations using the hierarchy elements. Then, we consider the best hierarchy-induced segmentation specified by a limited number of hierarchy elements. We focus on a common quality measure for binary segmentations, the Jaccard index (also known as IoU). Optimizing the Jaccard index is highly non-trivial, and yet we propose an efficient approach for doing exactly that. This way we get algorithm-independent upper bounds on the quality of any segmentation created from the hierarchy. We found that the obtainable segmentation quality varies significantly depending on the way that the segments are specified by the hierarchy elements, and that representing a segmentation with only a few hierarchy elements is often possible. (Code is available).
abstract_zh: 当前的通用分割方法首先创建嵌套图像分区的层次结构，然后从中指定分割。我们的第一个贡献是描述使用层次结构元素指定分段的几种方法，其中大多数是新的。然后，我们考虑由有限数量的层次结构元素指定的最佳层次结构诱导分段。我们专注于二元分割的通用质量度量，即杰卡德指数（也称为 IoU）。优化杰卡德指数非常重要，但我们提出了一种有效的方法来做到这一点。通过这种方式，我们可以获得从层次结构创建的任何分段的质量的独立于算法的上限。我们发现，可获得的分段质量根据层次结构元素指定分段的方式而显着变化，并且仅用几个层次结构元素表示分段通常是可能的。 （代码可用）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过评估层次结构的一致分割来优化图像分割质量，重点研究如何利用有限的层次元素生成高质量分割。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法依赖层次结构生成分割，但如何高效选择层次元素以最大化分割质量（如Jaccard指数）仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出多种基于层次结构的分割指定方法，并设计高效算法优化Jaccard指数，从而获得算法无关的分割质量上界。
AI.result: 发现分割质量显著依赖于层次元素的指定方式，且通常可用少量层次元素实现高质量分割。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为评估层次结构提供了理论依据，证明了通过优化层次元素选择可有效提升分割性能，且代码已开源验证实用性。

search_text: Assessing hierarchies by their consistent segmentations 通过一致的细分来评估层次结构 Current approaches to generic segmentation start by creating a hierarchy of nested image partitions and then specifying a segmentation from it. Our first contribution is to describe several ways, most of them new, for specifying segmentations using the hierarchy elements. Then, we consider the best hierarchy-induced segmentation specified by a limited number of hierarchy elements. We focus on a common quality measure for binary segmentations, the Jaccard index (also known as IoU). Optimizing the Jaccard index is highly non-trivial, and yet we propose an efficient approach for doing exactly that. This way we get algorithm-independent upper bounds on the quality of any segmentation created from the hierarchy. We found that the obtainable segmentation quality varies significantly depending on the way that the segments are specified by the hierarchy elements, and that representing a segmentation with only a few hierarchy elements is often possible. (Code is available). 当前的通用分割方法首先创建嵌套图像分区的层次结构，然后从中指定分割。我们的第一个贡献是描述使用层次结构元素指定分段的几种方法，其中大多数是新的。然后，我们考虑由有限数量的层次结构元素指定的最佳层次结构诱导分段。我们专注于二元分割的通用质量度量，即杰卡德指数（也称为 IoU）。优化杰卡德指数非常重要，但我们提出了一种有效的方法来做到这一点。通过这种方式，我们可以获得从层次结构创建的任何分段的质量的独立于算法的上限。我们发现，可获得的分段质量根据层次结构元素指定分段的方式而显着变化，并且仅用几个层次结构元素表示分段通常是可能的。 （代码可用）。 本文提出通过评估层次结构的一致分割来优化图像分割质量，重点研究如何利用有限的层次元素生成高质量分割。 Zeev Gutman,Ritvik Vij,Laurent Najman,Michael Lindenbaum cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Anita Rau,Binod Bhattarai,Lourdes Agapito,Danail Stoyanov
title: Bimodal Camera Pose Prediction for Endoscopy
title_zh: 内窥镜双模相机姿势预测
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Robotics and Bionics. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/TMRB.2023.3320267
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Robotics and Bionics. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/TMRB.2023.3320267
abstract: Deducing the 3D structure of endoscopic scenes from images is exceedingly challenging. In addition to deformation and view-dependent lighting, tubular structures like the colon present problems stemming from their self-occluding and repetitive anatomical structure. In this paper, we propose SimCol, a synthetic dataset for camera pose estimation in colonoscopy, and a novel method that explicitly learns a bimodal distribution to predict the endoscope pose. Our dataset replicates real colonoscope motion and highlights the drawbacks of existing methods. We publish 18k RGB images from simulated colonoscopy with corresponding depth and camera poses and make our data generation environment in Unity publicly available. We evaluate different camera pose prediction methods and demonstrate that, when trained on our data, they generalize to real colonoscopy sequences, and our bimodal approach outperforms prior unimodal work.
summary: Deducing the 3D structure of endoscopic scenes from images is exceedingly challenging. In addition to deformation and view-dependent lighting, tubular structures like the colon present problems stemming from their self-occluding and repetitive anatomical structure. In this paper, we propose SimCol, a synthetic dataset for camera pose estimation in colonoscopy, and a novel method that explicitly learns a bimodal distribution to predict the endoscope pose. Our dataset replicates real colonoscope motion and highlights the drawbacks of existing methods. We publish 18k RGB images from simulated colonoscopy with corresponding depth and camera poses and make our data generation environment in Unity publicly available. We evaluate different camera pose prediction methods and demonstrate that, when trained on our data, they generalize to real colonoscopy sequences, and our bimodal approach outperforms prior unimodal work.
abstract_zh: 从图像中推断内窥镜场景的 3D 结构非常具有挑战性。除了变形和依赖于视图的照明之外，像结肠这样的管状结构还存在由于其自闭塞和重复的解剖结构而产生的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 SimCol，一种用于结肠镜检查中相机姿态估计的合成数据集，以及一种显式学习双峰分布来预测内窥镜姿态的新方法。我们的数据集复制了真实的结肠镜运动并突出了现有方法的缺点。我们发布了来自模拟结肠镜检查的 18k RGB 图像以及相应的深度和相机姿势，并公开了我们在 Unity 中的数据生成环境。我们评估了不同的相机姿势预测方法，并证明，当对我们的数据进行训练时，它们可以推广到真实的结肠镜检查序列，并且我们的双模方法优于之前的单模工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimCol数据集和双模相机位姿预测方法，用于解决内窥镜图像中结肠结构的3D重建与位姿估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理结肠内窥镜图像中的自遮挡、重复解剖结构及光照变化等挑战，缺乏有效数据集和模型评估体系。
AI.method: 构建包含18k张RGB图像及深度/位姿标注的SimCol数据集，设计基于双模分布学习的相机位姿预测模型，利用Unity模拟真实内窥镜运动场景。
AI.result: 双模方法在模拟数据和真实内窥镜序列上均优于单模方法，验证了数据集有效性及模型对实际场景的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 双模相机位姿预测框架结合专用数据集，为内窥镜3D重建提供了更鲁棒的解决方案，推动了该领域方法的迭代与评估标准建立。

authors_text: Sanjana Sankar,Denis Beautemps,Thomas Hueber
title: Multistream neural architectures for cued-speech recognition using a pre-trained visual feature extractor and constrained CTC decoding
title_zh: 使用预先训练的视觉特征提取器和约束 CTC 解码进行提示语音识别的多流神经架构
comment: ef:ICASSP 2022 - IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing, May 2022, Singapour, Singapore
comments: ef:ICASSP 2022 - IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing, May 2022, Singapour, Singapore
abstract: This paper proposes a simple and effective approach for automatic recognition of Cued Speech (CS), a visual communication tool that helps people with hearing impairment to understand spoken language with the help of hand gestures that can uniquely identify the uttered phonemes in complement to lipreading. The proposed approach is based on a pre-trained hand and lips tracker used for visual feature extraction and a phonetic decoder based on a multistream recurrent neural network trained with connectionist temporal classification loss and combined with a pronunciation lexicon. The proposed system is evaluated on an updated version of the French CS dataset CSF18 for which the phonetic transcription has been manually checked and corrected. With a decoding accuracy at the phonetic level of 70.88%, the proposed system outperforms our previous CNN-HMM decoder and competes with more complex baselines.
summary: This paper proposes a simple and effective approach for automatic recognition of Cued Speech (CS), a visual communication tool that helps people with hearing impairment to understand spoken language with the help of hand gestures that can uniquely identify the uttered phonemes in complement to lipreading. The proposed approach is based on a pre-trained hand and lips tracker used for visual feature extraction and a phonetic decoder based on a multistream recurrent neural network trained with connectionist temporal classification loss and combined with a pronunciation lexicon. The proposed system is evaluated on an updated version of the French CS dataset CSF18 for which the phonetic transcription has been manually checked and corrected. With a decoding accuracy at the phonetic level of 70.88%, the proposed system outperforms our previous CNN-HMM decoder and competes with more complex baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种简单有效的提示语音（CS）自动识别方法，这是一种视觉交流工具，可以帮助听力障碍人士通过手势来理解口语，手势可以唯一地识别说出的音素，作为唇读的补充。所提出的方法基于用于视觉特征提取的预训练手部和嘴唇跟踪器以及基于多流循环神经网络的语音解码器，该多流循环神经网络经过联结时间分类损失训练并与发音词典相结合。所提出的系统在法语 CS 数据集 CSF18 的更新版本上进行评估，该数据集的语音转录已被手动检查和纠正。所提出的系统在语音级别的解码精度为 70.88%，优于我们之前的 CNN-HMM 解码器，并可与更复杂的基线竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练视觉特征提取器和约束CTC解码的多流神经网络架构，用于提高唇语辅助的听障人士手势语音识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN-HMM方法在Cued Speech识别中存在准确率不足的问题，需探索更有效的视觉特征提取与解码策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用预训练手部与嘴唇追踪器提取视觉特征，结合多流循环神经网络与连接时序分类损失函数，并整合发音词典进行约束解码。
AI.result: 在修正后的法语CSF18数据集上实现70.88%的音素级识别准确率，优于作者先前的CNN-HMM方法且接近复杂基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 预训练视觉特征提取与约束CTC解码的结合为视觉语音识别提供了简单有效的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Multistream neural architectures for cued-speech recognition using a pre-trained visual feature extractor and constrained CTC decoding 使用预先训练的视觉特征提取器和约束 CTC 解码进行提示语音识别的多流神经架构 This paper proposes a simple and effective approach for automatic recognition of Cued Speech (CS), a visual communication tool that helps people with hearing impairment to understand spoken language with the help of hand gestures that can uniquely identify the uttered phonemes in complement to lipreading. The proposed approach is based on a pre-trained hand and lips tracker used for visual feature extraction and a phonetic decoder based on a multistream recurrent neural network trained with connectionist temporal classification loss and combined with a pronunciation lexicon. The proposed system is evaluated on an updated version of the French CS dataset CSF18 for which the phonetic transcription has been manually checked and corrected. With a decoding accuracy at the phonetic level of 70.88%, the proposed system outperforms our previous CNN-HMM decoder and competes with more complex baselines. 本文提出了一种简单有效的提示语音（CS）自动识别方法，这是一种视觉交流工具，可以帮助听力障碍人士通过手势来理解口语，手势可以唯一地识别说出的音素，作为唇读的补充。所提出的方法基于用于视觉特征提取的预训练手部和嘴唇跟踪器以及基于多流循环神经网络的语音解码器，该多流循环神经网络经过联结时间分类损失训练并与发音词典相结合。所提出的系统在法语 CS 数据集 CSF18 的更新版本上进行评估，该数据集的语音转录已被手动检查和纠正。所提出的系统在语音级别的解码精度为 70.88%，优于我们之前的 CNN-HMM 解码器，并可与更复杂的基线竞争。 本文提出一种基于预训练视觉特征提取器和约束CTC解码的多流神经网络架构，用于提高唇语辅助的听障人士手势语音识别准确率。 Sanjana Sankar,Denis Beautemps,Thomas Hueber cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hailiang Tang,Tisheng Zhang,Xiaoji Niu,Jing Fan,Jingnan Liu
title: IC-GVINS: A Robust, Real-time, INS-Centric GNSS-Visual-Inertial Navigation System for Wheeled Robot
title_zh: IC-GVINS：用于轮式机器人的稳健、实时、以 INS 为中心的 GNSS 视觉惯性导航系统
abstract: In this letter, we present a robust, real-time, inertial navigation system (INS)-Centric GNSS-Visual-Inertial navigation system (IC-GVINS) for wheeled robot, in which the precise INS is fully utilized in both the state estimation and visual process. To improve the system robustness, the INS information is employed during the whole keyframe-based visual process, with strict outlier-culling strategy. GNSS is adopted to perform an accurate and convenient initialization of the IC-GVINS, and is further employed to achieve absolute positioning in large-scale environments. The IMU, visual, and GNSS measurements are tightly fused within the framework of factor graph optimization. Dedicated experiments were conducted to evaluate the robustness and accuracy of the IC-GVINS on a wheeled robot. The IC-GVINS demonstrates superior robustness in various visual-degenerated scenes with moving objects. Compared to the state-of-the-art visual-inertial navigation systems, the proposed method yields improved robustness and accuracy in various environments. We open source our codes combined with the dataset on GitHub
summary: In this letter, we present a robust, real-time, inertial navigation system (INS)-Centric GNSS-Visual-Inertial navigation system (IC-GVINS) for wheeled robot, in which the precise INS is fully utilized in both the state estimation and visual process. To improve the system robustness, the INS information is employed during the whole keyframe-based visual process, with strict outlier-culling strategy. GNSS is adopted to perform an accurate and convenient initialization of the IC-GVINS, and is further employed to achieve absolute positioning in large-scale environments. The IMU, visual, and GNSS measurements are tightly fused within the framework of factor graph optimization. Dedicated experiments were conducted to evaluate the robustness and accuracy of the IC-GVINS on a wheeled robot. The IC-GVINS demonstrates superior robustness in various visual-degenerated scenes with moving objects. Compared to the state-of-the-art visual-inertial navigation systems, the proposed method yields improved robustness and accuracy in various environments. We open source our codes combined with the dataset on GitHub
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们提出了一种用于轮式机器人的鲁棒、实时、以惯性导航系统（INS）为中心的GNSS-视觉惯性导航系统（IC-GVINS），其中精确的INS在状态估计和视觉过程中都得到了充分利用。为了提高系统的鲁棒性，在整个基于关键帧的视觉过程中都采用了INS信息，并采用了严格的异常值剔除策略。采用GNSS对IC-GVINS进行准确、便捷的初始化，并进一步用于实现大范围环境下的绝对定位。 IMU、视觉和 GNSS 测量紧密融合在因子图优化的框架内。进行了专门的实验来评估轮式机器人上 IC-GVINS 的稳健性和准确性。 IC-GVINS 在具有移动物体的各种视觉退化场景中表现出卓越的鲁棒性。与最先进的视觉惯性导航系统相比，所提出的方法在各种环境下都能提高鲁棒性和准确性。我们将代码与数据集一起开源到 GitHub 上

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向轮式机器人的实时、以惯性导航系统（INS）为核心的GNSS-视觉惯性导航系统（IC-GVINS），通过融合IMU、视觉和GNSS数据提升导航鲁棒性与精度。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉惯性导航系统在视觉退化场景（如动态物体干扰）中易失效，需依赖GNSS和INS增强系统鲁棒性与全局定位能力。
AI.method: 采用因子图优化框架紧耦合IMU、视觉和GNSS测量，在基于关键帧的视觉处理中全程引入INS信息并严格剔除异常值，利用GNSS实现系统初始化与大范围绝对定位。
AI.result: 实验表明IC-GVINS在含动态物体的复杂场景中表现出更优的鲁棒性与定位精度，相较现有视觉惯性系统性能提升显著，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: IC-GVINS通过多传感器紧耦合与INS主导的优化策略，有效解决了轮式机器人在视觉退化环境下的导航难题，为高可靠性自主导航提供了新方案。

authors_text: Adil Erzin,Roman Plotnikov,Ilya Ladygin
title: Constrained Shortest Path and Hierarchical Structures
title_zh: 约束最短路径和层次结构
abstract: The Constraint Shortest Path (CSP) problem is as follows. An $n$-vertex graph is given, each edge/arc assigned two weights. Let us call them "cost" and "length" for definiteness. Finding a min-cost upper-bounded length path between a given pair of vertices is required. The problem is NP-hard even when the lengths of all edges are the same. Therefore, various approximation algorithms have been proposed in the literature for it. The constraint on path length can be accounted for by considering one edge weight equals to a linear combination of cost and length. By varying the multiplier value in a linear combination, a feasible solution delivers a minimum to the function with new weights. At the same time, Dijkstra's algorithm or its modifications are used to construct the shortest path with the current weights of the edges. However, with insufficiently large graphs, this approach may turn out to be time-consuming. In this article, we propose to look for a solution, not in the original graph but specially constructed hierarchical structures (HS). We show that the shortest path in the HS is constructed with $O(m)$-time complexity, where $m$ is the number of edges/arcs of the graph, and the approximate solution in the case of integer costs and lengths of the edges is found with $O(m\log n)$-time complexity. The a priori estimate of the algorithm's accuracy turned out to depend on the parameters of the problem and can be significant. Therefore, to evaluate the algorithm's effectiveness, we conducted a numerical experiment on the graphs of roads of megalopolis and randomly constructed unit-disk graphs (UDGs). The numerical experiment results show that in the HS, a solution close to optimal one is built 10--100 times faster than in the methods which use Dijkstra's algorithm to build a min-weight path in the original graph.

Therefore, various approximation algorithms have been proposed in the literature for it. The constraint on path length can be accounted for by considering one edge weight equals to a linear combination of cost and length. By varying the multiplier value in a linear combination, a feasible solution delivers a minimum to the function with new weights. At the same time, Dijkstra's algorithm or its modifications are used to construct the shortest path with the current weights of the edges. However, with insufficiently large graphs, this approach may turn out to be time-consuming. In this article, we propose to look for a solution, not in the original graph but specially constructed hierarchical structures (HS). We show that the shortest path in the HS is constructed with $O(m)$-time complexity, where $m$ is the number of edges/arcs of the graph, and the approximate solution in the case of integer costs and lengths of the edges is found with $O(m\log n)$-time complexity. The a priori estimate of the algorithm's accuracy turned out to depend on the parameters of the problem and can be significant. Therefore, to evaluate the algorithm's effectiveness, we conducted a numerical experiment on the graphs of roads of megalopolis and randomly constructed unit-disk graphs (UDGs). abstract_zh: 约束最短路径（CSP）问题如下。给出一个 $n$ 顶点图，每个边/弧分配两个权重。为了明确起见，我们将它们称为“成本”和“长度”。需要找到给定顶点对之间的最小成本上限长度路径。即使所有边的长度都相同，该问题也是 NP 困难的。因此，文献中为此提出了各种近似算法。路径长度的约束可以通过考虑一条边权重等于成本和长度的线性组合来解释。通过改变线性组合中的乘数值，可行的解决方案可以为具有新权重的函数提供最小值。同时，使用Dijkstra算法或其修改版以当前边的权重构造最短路径。然而，如果图不够大，这种方法可能会非常耗时。在本文中，我们建议寻找一种解决方案，不是在原始图中，而是在特殊构造的层次结构（HS）中。我们证明了 HS 中的最短路径是用 $O(m)$ 时间复杂度构造的，其中 $m$ 是图的边/弧的数量，并且在整数成本和边长度的情况下的近似解是用 $O(m\log n)$ 时间复杂度找到的。算法准确性的先验估计结果取决于问题的参数，并且可能很重要。因此，为了评估算法的有效性，我们对特大城市的道路图和随机构建的单位圆盘图（UDG）进行了数值实验。数值实验结果表明，在HS中，接近最优解的构建速度比使用Dijkstra算法在原始图中构建最小权重路径的方法快10--100倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层结构（HS）的约束最短路径（CSP）问题求解方法，通过构造特殊分层结构以提高算法效率。
AI.motivation: CSP问题在边权相同的情况下仍为NP难，传统方法（如Dijkstra算法）在大规模图中计算效率低下，需寻找更高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 通过构建特殊分层结构（HS），将原图转换为分层图，利用Dijkstra算法或其改进版在HS中求解，时间复杂度降至O(m)或O(m log n)。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，HS方法在道路网络和随机单位圆盘图（UDG）上构建近似解的速度比传统方法快10-100倍，且误差估计与问题参数相关。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构方法为CSP问题提供了高效近似解，尤其适用于大规模图，在速度与精度间取得良好平衡。

The a priori estimate of the algorithm's accuracy turned out to depend on the parameters of the problem and can be significant. Therefore, to evaluate the algorithm's effectiveness, we conducted a numerical experiment on the graphs of roads of megalopolis and randomly constructed unit-disk graphs (UDGs). The numerical experiment results show that in the HS, a solution close to optimal one is built 10--100 times faster than in the methods which use Dijkstra's algorithm to build a min-weight path in the original graph. 约束最短路径（CSP）问题如下。给出一个 $n$ 顶点图，每个边/弧分配两个权重。为了明确起见，我们将它们称为“成本”和“长度”。需要找到给定顶点对之间的最小成本上限长度路径。即使所有边的长度都相同，该问题也是 NP 困难的。因此，文献中为此提出了各种近似算法。路径长度的约束可以通过考虑一条边权重等于成本和长度的线性组合来解释。通过改变线性组合中的乘数值，可行的解决方案可以为具有新权重的函数提供最小值。同时，使用Dijkstra算法或其修改版以当前边的权重构造最短路径。然而，如果图不够大，这种方法可能会非常耗时。在本文中，我们建议寻找一种解决方案，不是在原始图中，而是在特殊构造的层次结构（HS）中。我们证明了 HS 中的最短路径是用 $O(m)$ 时间复杂度构造的，其中 $m$ 是图的边/弧的数量，并且在整数成本和边长度的情况下的近似解是用 $O(m\log n)$ 时间复杂度找到的。算法准确性的先验估计结果取决于问题的参数，并且可能很重要。因此，为了评估算法的有效性，我们对特大城市的道路图和随机构建的单位圆盘图（UDG）进行了数值实验。数值实验结果表明，在HS中，接近最优解的构建速度比使用Dijkstra算法在原始图中构建最小权重路径的方法快10--100倍。 本文提出了一种基于分层结构（HS）的约束最短路径（CSP）问题求解方法，通过构造特殊分层结构以提高算法效率。 Adil Erzin,Roman Plotnikov,Ilya Ladygin cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Chengze Zhu,Pingge Hu,Xianxu Zeng,Xingtong Wang,Zehua Ji,Li Shi
title: Segmentation Network with Compound Loss Function for Hydatidiform Mole Hydrops Lesion Recognition
title_zh: 具有复合损失函数的分割网络用于葡萄胎积水病变识别
abstract: Pathological morphology diagnosis is the standard diagnosis method of hydatidiform mole. As a disease with malignant potential, the hydatidiform mole section of hydrops lesions is an important basis for diagnosis. Due to incomplete lesion development, early hydatidiform mole is difficult to distinguish, resulting in a low accuracy of clinical diagnosis. As a remarkable machine learning technology, image semantic segmentation networks have been used in many medical image recognition tasks. We developed a hydatidiform mole hydrops lesion segmentation model based on a novel loss function and training method. The model consists of different networks that segment the section image at the pixel and lesion levels. Our compound loss function assign weights to the segmentation results of the two levels to calculate the loss. We then propose a stagewise training method to combine the advantages of various loss functions at different levels. We evaluate our method on a hydatidiform mole hydrops dataset. Experiments show that the proposed model with our loss function and training method has good recognition performance under different segmentation metrics.
summary: Pathological morphology diagnosis is the standard diagnosis method of hydatidiform mole. As a disease with malignant potential, the hydatidiform mole section of hydrops lesions is an important basis for diagnosis. Due to incomplete lesion development, early hydatidiform mole is difficult to distinguish, resulting in a low accuracy of clinical diagnosis. As a remarkable machine learning technology, image semantic segmentation networks have been used in many medical image recognition tasks. We developed a hydatidiform mole hydrops lesion segmentation model based on a novel loss function and training method. The model consists of different networks that segment the section image at the pixel and lesion levels. Our compound loss function assign weights to the segmentation results of the two levels to calculate the loss. We then propose a stagewise training method to combine the advantages of various loss functions at different levels. We evaluate our method on a hydatidiform mole hydrops dataset. Experiments show that the proposed model with our loss function and training method has good recognition performance under different segmentation metrics.
abstract_zh: 病理形态学诊断是葡萄胎的标准诊断方法。作为一种具有恶性潜能的疾病，积水病变的葡萄胎切片是诊断的重要依据。由于病变发展不完全，早期葡萄胎难以区分，导致临床诊断准确率较低。作为一种卓越的机器学习技术，图像语义分割网络已被应用于许多医学图像识别任务中。我们基于新颖的损失函数和训练方法开发了一种葡萄胎水肿病变分割模型。该模型由不同的网络组成，这些网络在像素和病变级别对切片图像进行分割。我们的复合损失函数为两个级别的分割结果分配权重来计算损失。然后，我们提出了一种阶段性训练方法，以结合不同级别的各种损失函数的优点。我们在葡萄胎水肿数据集上评估我们的方法。实验表明，采用我们的损失函数和训练方法的模型在不同的分割指标下具有良好的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于复合损失函数的分割网络，用于识别葡萄胎水肿病变的医学图像。
AI.motivation: 葡萄胎早期病变难以区分导致临床诊断准确率低，传统方法存在局限性，需改进分割模型以提高识别性能。
AI.method: 设计结合像素级和病变级分割的复合损失函数，并采用分阶段训练方法整合多层级损失函数优势。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多种分割指标下均表现出良好的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的复合损失函数与分阶段训练方法有效提升了葡萄胎水肿病变的识别性能，为临床诊断提供支持。

authors_text: P. Žugec,M. Barbagallo,J. Andrzejewski,J. Perkowski,N. Colonna,D. Bosnar,A. Gawlik,M. Sabate-Gilarte,M. Bacak,F. Mingrone,E. Chiaveri
title: Machine learning based event classification for the energy-differential measurement of the $^\text{nat}$C(n,p) and $^\text{nat}$C(n,d) reactions
title_zh: 基于机器学习的事件分类，用于 $^\text{nat}$C(n,p) 和 $^\text{nat}$C(n,d) 反应的能量微分测量
abstract: The paper explores the feasibility of using machine learning techniques, in particular neural networks, for classification of the experimental data from the joint $^\text{nat}$C(n,p) and $^\text{nat}$C(n,d) reaction cross section measurement from the neutron time of flight facility n_TOF at CERN. Each relevant $ΔE$-$E$ pair of strips from two segmented silicon telescopes is treated separately and afforded its own dedicated neural network. An important part of the procedure is a careful preparation of training datasets, based on the raw data from Geant4 simulations. Instead of using these raw data for the training of neural networks, we divide a relevant 3-parameter space into discrete voxels, classify each voxel according to a particle/reaction type and submit these voxels to a training procedure. The classification capabilities of the structurally optimized and trained neural networks are found to be superior to those of the manually selected cuts.
summary: The paper explores the feasibility of using machine learning techniques, in particular neural networks, for classification of the experimental data from the joint $^\text{nat}$C(n,p) and $^\text{nat}$C(n,d) reaction cross section measurement from the neutron time of flight facility n_TOF at CERN. Each relevant $ΔE$-$E$ pair of strips from two segmented silicon telescopes is treated separately and afforded its own dedicated neural network. An important part of the procedure is a careful preparation of training datasets, based on the raw data from Geant4 simulations. Instead of using these raw data for the training of neural networks, we divide a relevant 3-parameter space into discrete voxels, classify each voxel according to a particle/reaction type and submit these voxels to a training procedure. The classification capabilities of the structurally optimized and trained neural networks are found to be superior to those of the manually selected cuts.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了使用机器学习技术（特别是神经网络）对 CERN 中子飞行时间设施 n_TOF 联合 $^\text{nat}$C(n,p) 和 $^\text{nat}$C(n,d) 反应截面测量的实验数据进行分类的可行性。来自两个分段硅望远镜的每对相关的 $ΔE$-$E$ 条带都被单独处理，并提供其自己的专用神经网络。该过程的一个重要部分是根据 Geant4 模拟的原始数据仔细准备训练数据集。我们没有使用这些原始数据来训练神经网络，而是将相关的三参数空间划分为离散体素，根据粒子/反应类型对每个体素进行分类，并将这些体素提交给训练程序。结构优化和训练的神经网络的分类能力被发现优于手动选择的切割。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用机器学习技术（特别是神经网络）对中子时间飞行设施n_TOF上自然碳(n,p)和(n,d)反应截面测量的实验数据进行分类，以实现能量微分测量。
AI.motivation: 传统手动选择的切割方法在处理复杂实验数据时存在效率和准确性不足的问题，需探索更高效的自动化分类方法。
AI.method: 通过Geant4模拟生成训练数据，将三维参数空间划分为离散体素，按粒子/反应类型分类后输入结构优化的神经网络进行训练。
AI.result: 优化后的神经网络分类能力显著优于传统手动切割方法，验证了机器学习在该领域的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法为核反应截面测量提供了高效准确的自动化解决方案，具有推广价值。

authors_text: Kyungjune Baek,Hyunjung Shim
title: Commonality in Natural Images Rescues GANs: Pretraining GANs with Generic and Privacy-free Synthetic Data
title_zh: 自然图像中的共性拯救了 GAN：使用通用且无隐私的合成数据预训练 GAN
abstract: Transfer learning for GANs successfully improves generation performance under low-shot regimes. However, existing studies show that the pretrained model using a single benchmark dataset is not generalized to various target datasets. More importantly, the pretrained model can be vulnerable to copyright or privacy risks as membership inference attack advances. To resolve both issues, we propose an effective and unbiased data synthesizer, namely Primitives-PS, inspired by the generic characteristics of natural images. Specifically, we utilize 1) the generic statistics on the frequency magnitude spectrum, 2) the elementary shape (i.e., image composition via elementary shapes) for representing the structure information, and 3) the existence of saliency as prior. Since our synthesizer only considers the generic properties of natural images, the single model pretrained on our dataset can be consistently transferred to various target datasets, and even outperforms the previous methods pretrained with the natural images in terms of Fr'echet inception distance. Extensive analysis, ablation study, and evaluations demonstrate that each component of our data synthesizer is effective, and provide insights on the desirable nature of the pretrained model for the transferability of GANs.
summary: Transfer learning for GANs successfully improves generation performance under low-shot regimes. However, existing studies show that the pretrained model using a single benchmark dataset is not generalized to various target datasets. More importantly, the pretrained model can be vulnerable to copyright or privacy risks as membership inference attack advances. To resolve both issues, we propose an effective and unbiased data synthesizer, namely Primitives-PS, inspired by the generic characteristics of natural images. Specifically, we utilize 1) the generic statistics on the frequency magnitude spectrum, 2) the elementary shape (i.e., image composition via elementary shapes) for representing the structure information, and 3) the existence of saliency as prior. Since our synthesizer only considers the generic properties of natural images, the single model pretrained on our dataset can be consistently transferred to various target datasets, and even outperforms the previous methods pretrained with the natural images in terms of Fr'echet inception distance. Extensive analysis, ablation study, and evaluations demonstrate that each component of our data synthesizer is effective, and provide insights on the desirable nature of the pretrained model for the transferability of GANs.
abstract_zh: GAN 的迁移学习成功地提高了低样本条件下的生成性能。然而，现有的研究表明，使用单个基准数据集的预训练模型并不能推广到各种目标数据集。更重要的是，随着成员推理攻击的进展，预训练模型可能容易受到版权或隐私风险的影响。为了解决这两个问题，我们受到自然图像的一般特征的启发，提出了一种有效且无偏见的数据合成器，即 Primitives-PS。具体来说，我们利用 1) 频率幅度谱的通用统计数据，2) 基本形状（即通过基本形状组成的图像）​​来表示结构信息，以及 3）先验的显着性的存在。由于我们的合成器只考虑自然图像的通用属性，因此在我们的数据集上预训练的单个模型可以一致地转移到各种目标数据集，甚至在 Fr'echet 起始距离方面优于以前使用自然图像预训练的方法。广泛的分析、消融研究和评估表明，我们的数据合成器的每个组件都是有效的，并为 GAN 可迁移性的预训练模型的理想性质提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然图像通用特性的合成数据预训练方法Primitives-PS，以提升GAN在不同目标数据集上的泛化能力并降低隐私风险。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN预训练模型在目标数据集泛化性不足且易受版权/隐私攻击，需解决跨数据集迁移能力与隐私安全问题。
AI.method: 利用自然图像的频率谱统计、基础形状结构及显著性先验三类通用特性，构建隐私无关的合成数据集进行预训练。
AI.result: 预训练模型在多个目标数据集上FID指标优于传统自然图像预训练方法，且各组件有效性经消融实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 基于通用图像特性的合成数据可提升GAN预训练模型的跨领域迁移能力，为隐私安全的模型训练提供新思路。

search_text: Commonality in Natural Images Rescues GANs: Pretraining GANs with Generic and Privacy-free Synthetic Data 自然图像中的共性拯救了 GAN：使用通用且无隐私的合成数据预训练 GAN Transfer learning for GANs successfully improves generation performance under low-shot regimes. However, existing studies show that the pretrained model using a single benchmark dataset is not generalized to various target datasets. More importantly, the pretrained model can be vulnerable to copyright or privacy risks as membership inference attack advances. To resolve both issues, we propose an effective and unbiased data synthesizer, namely Primitives-PS, inspired by the generic characteristics of natural images. Specifically, we utilize 1) the generic statistics on the frequency magnitude spectrum, 2) the elementary shape (i.e., image composition via elementary shapes) for representing the structure information, and 3) the existence of saliency as prior. Since our synthesizer only considers the generic properties of natural images, the single model pretrained on our dataset can be consistently transferred to various target datasets, and even outperforms the previous methods pretrained with the natural images in terms of Fr'echet inception distance. Extensive analysis, ablation study, and evaluations demonstrate that each component of our data synthesizer is effective, and provide insights on the desirable nature of the pretrained model for the transferability of GANs. GAN 的迁移学习成功地提高了低样本条件下的生成性能。然而，现有的研究表明，使用单个基准数据集的预训练模型并不能推广到各种目标数据集。更重要的是，随着成员推理攻击的进展，预训练模型可能容易受到版权或隐私风险的影响。为了解决这两个问题，我们受到自然图像的一般特征的启发，提出了一种有效且无偏见的数据合成器，即 Primitives-PS。具体来说，我们利用 1) 频率幅度谱的通用统计数据，2) 基本形状（即通过基本形状组成的图像）​​来表示结构信息，以及 3）先验的显着性的存在。由于我们的合成器只考虑自然图像的通用属性，因此在我们的数据集上预训练的单个模型可以一致地转移到各种目标数据集，甚至在 Fr'echet 起始距离方面优于以前使用自然图像预训练的方法。广泛的分析、消融研究和评估表明，我们的数据合成器的每个组件都是有效的，并为 GAN 可迁移性的预训练模型的理想性质提供了见解。 本文提出一种基于自然图像通用特性的合成数据预训练方法Primitives-PS，以提升GAN在不同目标数据集上的泛化能力并降低隐私风险。 Kyungjune Baek,Hyunjung Shim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chengze Zhu,Pingge Hu,Xianxu Zeng,Xingtong Wang,Zehua Ji,Li Shi
title: A Semantic Segmentation Network Based Real-Time Computer-Aided Diagnosis System for Hydatidiform Mole Hydrops Lesion Recognition in Microscopic View
title_zh: 基于语义分割网络的葡萄胎水肿病灶微观实时计算机辅助诊断系统
abstract: As a disease with malignant potential, hydatidiform mole (HM) is one of the most common gestational trophoblastic diseases. For pathologists, the HM section of hydrops lesions is an important basis for diagnosis. In pathology departments, the diverse microscopic manifestations of HM lesions and the limited view under the microscope mean that physicians with extensive diagnostic experience are required to prevent missed diagnosis and misdiagnosis. Feature extraction can significantly improve the accuracy and speed of the diagnostic process. As a remarkable diagnosis assisting technology, computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) has been widely used in clinical practice. We constructed a deep-learning-based CAD system to identify HM hydrops lesions in the microscopic view in real-time. The system consists of three modules; the image mosaic module and edge extension module process the image to improve the outcome of the hydrops lesion recognition module, which adopts a semantic segmentation network, our novel compound loss function, and a stepwise training function in order to achieve the best performance in identifying hydrops lesions. We evaluated our system using an HM hydrops dataset. Experiments show that our system is able to respond in real-time and correctly display the entire microscopic view with accurately labeled HM hydrops lesions.
summary: As a disease with malignant potential, hydatidiform mole (HM) is one of the most common gestational trophoblastic diseases. For pathologists, the HM section of hydrops lesions is an important basis for diagnosis. In pathology departments, the diverse microscopic manifestations of HM lesions and the limited view under the microscope mean that physicians with extensive diagnostic experience are required to prevent missed diagnosis and misdiagnosis. Feature extraction can significantly improve the accuracy and speed of the diagnostic process. As a remarkable diagnosis assisting technology, computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) has been widely used in clinical practice. We constructed a deep-learning-based CAD system to identify HM hydrops lesions in the microscopic view in real-time. The system consists of three modules; the image mosaic module and edge extension module process the image to improve the outcome of the hydrops lesion recognition module, which adopts a semantic segmentation network, our novel compound loss function, and a stepwise training function in order to achieve the best performance in identifying hydrops lesions. We evaluated our system using an HM hydrops dataset. Experiments show that our system is able to respond in real-time and correctly display the entire microscopic view with accurately labeled HM hydrops lesions.
abstract_zh: 葡萄胎（HM）作为一种具有恶性潜能的疾病，是最常见的妊娠滋养细胞疾病之一。对于病理学家来说，水肿病灶的HM切片是诊断的重要依据。在病理科中，HM病灶的镜下表现多样且显微镜下视野有限，需要具有丰富诊断经验的医生，以防止漏诊和误诊。特征提取可以显着提高诊断过程的准确性和速度。计算机辅助诊断（CAD）作为一种卓越的诊断辅助技术，已广泛应用于临床。我们构建了一个基于深度学习的 CAD 系统，可以在显微镜下实时识别 HM 水肿病变。系统由三个模块组成；图像拼接模块和边缘扩展模块对图像进行处理，以改善水肿病灶识别模块的结果，该模块采用语义分割网络、我们新颖的复合损失函数和逐步训练函数，以实现识别水肿病灶的最佳性能。我们使用 HM Hydrops 数据集评估了我们的系统。实验表明，我们的系统能够实时响应并正确显示整个显微视图以及准确标记的 HM 水肿病灶。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义分割网络的实时计算机辅助诊断系统，用于在显微镜下识别葡萄胎水肿病变。
AI.motivation: 葡萄胎（HM）是一种具有恶性潜能的疾病，其显微镜下水肿病变的准确诊断对病理医生至关重要。传统方法因显微镜视野局限和病变表现多样，易导致误诊，需借助特征提取和计算机辅助诊断（CAD）技术提升效率。
AI.method: 系统包含图像拼接模块、边缘扩展模块和语义分割网络模块，结合新型复合损失函数与分步训练策略，优化水肿病变识别性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统可实时响应并准确标注显微镜视野中的HM水肿病变区域。
AI.conclusion: 本研究构建的CAD系统有效提升了HM水肿病变的诊断效率与准确性，为病理分析提供了可靠辅助工具。

authors_text: Yongqiang Mao,Xian Sun,Kaiqiang Chen,Wenhui Diao,Zonghao Guo,Xiaonan Lu,Kun Fu
title: Semantic Segmentation for Point Cloud Scenes via Dilated Graph Feature Aggregation and Pyramid Decoders
title_zh: 通过扩张图特征聚合和金字塔解码器对点云场景进行语义分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation of point clouds generates comprehensive understanding of scenes through densely predicting the category for each point. Due to the unicity of receptive field, semantic segmentation of point clouds remains challenging for the expression of multi-receptive field features, which brings about the misclassification of instances with similar spatial structures. In this paper, we propose a graph convolutional network DGFA-Net rooted in dilated graph feature aggregation (DGFA), guided by multi-basis aggregation loss (MALoss) calculated through Pyramid Decoders. To configure multi-receptive field features, DGFA which takes the proposed dilated graph convolution (DGConv) as its basic building block, is designed to aggregate multi-scale feature representation by capturing dilated graphs with various receptive regions. By simultaneously considering penalizing the receptive field information with point sets of different resolutions as calculation bases, we introduce Pyramid Decoders driven by MALoss for the diversity of receptive field bases. Combining these two aspects, DGFA-Net significantly improves the segmentation performance of instances with similar spatial structures. Experiments on S3DIS, ShapeNetPart and Toronto-3D show that DGFA-Net outperforms the baseline approach, achieving a new state-of-the-art segmentation performance.
summary: Semantic segmentation of point clouds generates comprehensive understanding of scenes through densely predicting the category for each point. Due to the unicity of receptive field, semantic segmentation of point clouds remains challenging for the expression of multi-receptive field features, which brings about the misclassification of instances with similar spatial structures. In this paper, we propose a graph convolutional network DGFA-Net rooted in dilated graph feature aggregation (DGFA), guided by multi-basis aggregation loss (MALoss) calculated through Pyramid Decoders. To configure multi-receptive field features, DGFA which takes the proposed dilated graph convolution (DGConv) as its basic building block, is designed to aggregate multi-scale feature representation by capturing dilated graphs with various receptive regions. By simultaneously considering penalizing the receptive field information with point sets of different resolutions as calculation bases, we introduce Pyramid Decoders driven by MALoss for the diversity of receptive field bases. Combining these two aspects, DGFA-Net significantly improves the segmentation performance of instances with similar spatial structures. Experiments on S3DIS, ShapeNetPart and Toronto-3D show that DGFA-Net outperforms the baseline approach, achieving a new state-of-the-art segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 点云的语义分割通过密集预测每个点的类别来生成对场景的全面理解。由于感受野的单一性，点云的语义分割对于多感受野特征的表达仍然具有挑战性，这带来了具有相似空间结构的实例的错误分类。在本文中，我们提出了一种植根于扩张图特征聚合（DGFA）的图卷积网络 DGFA-Net，以通过金字塔解码器计算的多基聚合损失（MALoss）为指导。为了配置多感受野特征，DGFA 以所提出的扩张图卷积（DGConv）作为其基本构建块，旨在通过捕获具有各种感受区域的扩张图来聚合多尺度特征表示。通过同时考虑以不同分辨率的点集作为计算基础对感受野信息进行惩罚，我们引入了由 MALoss 驱动的金字塔解码器，以实现感受野基础的多样性。结合这两方面，DGFA-Net显着提高了具有相似空间结构的实例的分割性能。在 S3DIS、ShapeNetPart 和 Toronto-3D 上的实验表明，DGFA-Net 的性能优于基线方法，实现了新的最先进的分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩张图特征聚合和金字塔解码器的点云语义分割方法DGFA-Net，以解决多感受野特征表达不足导致的相似结构实例误分类问题。
AI.motivation: 点云语义分割因感受野独特性难以有效表达多尺度特征，导致相似空间结构的实例易被误分类，需设计新型网络结构增强多感受野特征学习能力。
AI.method: 提出扩张图卷积(DGConv)构建多尺度特征聚合模块DGFA，并设计由多基聚合损失(MALoss)驱动的金字塔解码器，通过多分辨率点集联合优化实现多感受野特征表达。
AI.result: 在S3DIS、ShapeNetPart和Toronto-3D数据集上优于基线方法，达到当时最先进的分割性能指标。
AI.conclusion: DGFA-Net通过扩张图特征聚合与金字塔解码器的协同设计，有效提升了点云语义分割中相似结构实例的区分能力，为多感受野特征学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Semantic Segmentation for Point Cloud Scenes via Dilated Graph Feature Aggregation and Pyramid Decoders 通过扩张图特征聚合和金字塔解码器对点云场景进行语义分割 Semantic segmentation of point clouds generates comprehensive understanding of scenes through densely predicting the category for each point. Due to the unicity of receptive field, semantic segmentation of point clouds remains challenging for the expression of multi-receptive field features, which brings about the misclassification of instances with similar spatial structures. In this paper, we propose a graph convolutional network DGFA-Net rooted in dilated graph feature aggregation (DGFA), guided by multi-basis aggregation loss (MALoss) calculated through Pyramid Decoders. To configure multi-receptive field features, DGFA which takes the proposed dilated graph convolution (DGConv) as its basic building block, is designed to aggregate multi-scale feature representation by capturing dilated graphs with various receptive regions. By simultaneously considering penalizing the receptive field information with point sets of different resolutions as calculation bases, we introduce Pyramid Decoders driven by MALoss for the diversity of receptive field bases. Combining these two aspects, DGFA-Net significantly improves the segmentation performance of instances with similar spatial structures. Experiments on S3DIS, ShapeNetPart and Toronto-3D show that DGFA-Net outperforms the baseline approach, achieving a new state-of-the-art segmentation performance. 点云的语义分割通过密集预测每个点的类别来生成对场景的全面理解。由于感受野的单一性，点云的语义分割对于多感受野特征的表达仍然具有挑战性，这带来了具有相似空间结构的实例的错误分类。在本文中，我们提出了一种植根于扩张图特征聚合（DGFA）的图卷积网络 DGFA-Net，以通过金字塔解码器计算的多基聚合损失（MALoss）为指导。为了配置多感受野特征，DGFA 以所提出的扩张图卷积（DGConv）作为其基本构建块，旨在通过捕获具有各种感受区域的扩张图来聚合多尺度特征表示。通过同时考虑以不同分辨率的点集作为计算基础对感受野信息进行惩罚，我们引入了由 MALoss 驱动的金字塔解码器，以实现感受野基础的多样性。结合这两方面，DGFA-Net显着提高了具有相似空间结构的实例的分割性能。在 S3DIS、ShapeNetPart 和 Toronto-3D 上的实验表明，DGFA-Net 的性能优于基线方法，实现了新的最先进的分割性能。 本文提出一种基于扩张图特征聚合和金字塔解码器的点云语义分割方法DGFA-Net，以解决多感受野特征表达不足导致的相似结构实例误分类问题。 Yongqiang Mao,Xian Sun,Kaiqiang Chen,Wenhui Diao,Zonghao Guo,Xiaonan Lu,Kun Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Jieting Luo,Beishui Liao,Dov Gabbay
title: Value-based Practical Reasoning: Modal Logic + Argumentation
title_zh: 基于价值的实践推理：模态逻辑+论证
abstract: Autonomous agents are supposed to be able to finish tasks or achieve goals that are assigned by their users through performing a sequence of actions. Since there might exist multiple plans that an agent can follow and each plan might promote or demote different values along each action, the agent should be able to resolve the conflicts between them and evaluate which plan he should follow. In this paper, we develop a logic-based framework that combines modal logic and argumentation for value-based practical reasoning with plans. Modal logic is used as a technique to represent and verify whether a plan with its local properties of value promotion or demotion can be followed to achieve an agent's goal. We then propose an argumentation-based approach that allows an agent to reason about his plans in the form of supporting or objecting to a plan using the verification results.
summary: Autonomous agents are supposed to be able to finish tasks or achieve goals that are assigned by their users through performing a sequence of actions. Since there might exist multiple plans that an agent can follow and each plan might promote or demote different values along each action, the agent should be able to resolve the conflicts between them and evaluate which plan he should follow. In this paper, we develop a logic-based framework that combines modal logic and argumentation for value-based practical reasoning with plans. Modal logic is used as a technique to represent and verify whether a plan with its local properties of value promotion or demotion can be followed to achieve an agent's goal. We then propose an argumentation-based approach that allows an agent to reason about his plans in the form of supporting or objecting to a plan using the verification results.
abstract_zh: 自主代理应该能够通过执行一系列操作来完成用户指定的任务或实现目标。由于代理可能存在多个可以遵循的计划，并且每个计划可能会在每个操作中提升或降低不同的值，因此代理应该能够解决它们之间的冲突并评估他应该遵循哪个计划。在本文中，我们开发了一个基于逻辑的框架，它将模态逻辑和论证结合起来，用于基于价值的实践推理和计划。模态逻辑被用作一种技术来表示和验证是否可以遵循具有局部价值提升或降级属性的计划来实现代理的目标。然后，我们提出一种基于论证的方法，允许代理使用验证结果以支持或反对计划的形式来推理他的计划。

AI.tldr: 开发结合模态逻辑与论证的框架，解决自主代理在计划执行中的价值冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 自主代理在执行任务时需处理多个可能计划带来的价值冲突，需有效方法评估并选择最优计划。
AI.method: 结合模态逻辑表示计划属性，并利用论证机制进行价值冲突的推理与评估。
AI.result: 提出了一种逻辑框架，能够有效验证计划属性并通过论证机制解决价值冲突，辅助代理决策。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自主代理的价值驱动决策提供了理论基础，有效整合了模态逻辑与论证方法以解决复杂价值冲突。

authors_text: Thomas Kosch,Robin Welsch,Lewis Chuang,Albrecht Schmidt
title: The Placebo Effect of Artificial Intelligence in Human-Computer Interaction
title_zh: 人工智能在人机交互中的安慰剂效应
abstract: In medicine, patients can obtain real benefits from a sham treatment. These benefits are known as the placebo effect. We report two experiments (Experiment I: N=369; Experiment II: N=100) demonstrating a placebo effect in adaptive interfaces. Participants were asked to solve word puzzles while being supported by no system or an adaptive AI interface. All participants experienced the same word puzzle difficulty and had no support from an AI throughout the experiments. Our results showed that the belief of receiving adaptive AI support increases expectations regarding the participant's own task performance, sustained after interaction. These expectations were positively correlated to performance, as indicated by the number of solved word puzzles. We integrate our findings into technological acceptance theories and discuss implications for the future assessment of AI-based user interfaces and novel technologies. We argue that system descriptions can elicit placebo effects through user expectations biasing the results of user-centered studies.
summary: In medicine, patients can obtain real benefits from a sham treatment. These benefits are known as the placebo effect. We report two experiments (Experiment I: N=369; Experiment II: N=100) demonstrating a placebo effect in adaptive interfaces. Participants were asked to solve word puzzles while being supported by no system or an adaptive AI interface. All participants experienced the same word puzzle difficulty and had no support from an AI throughout the experiments. Our results showed that the belief of receiving adaptive AI support increases expectations regarding the participant's own task performance, sustained after interaction. These expectations were positively correlated to performance, as indicated by the number of solved word puzzles. We integrate our findings into technological acceptance theories and discuss implications for the future assessment of AI-based user interfaces and novel technologies. We argue that system descriptions can elicit placebo effects through user expectations biasing the results of user-centered studies.
abstract_zh: 在医学上，患者可以从假治疗中获得真正的好处。这些好处被称为安慰剂效应。我们报告了两个实验（实验 I：N=369；实验 II：N=100），展示了自适应界面中的安慰剂效应。参与者被要求在没有系统或自适应人工智能界面支持的情况下解决文字谜题。所有参与者都经历了相同的单词拼图难度，并且在整个实验过程中没有人工智能的支持。我们的结果表明，接受自适应人工智能支持的信念会增加参与者对自己的任务表现的期望，这种期望在交互后持续存在。正如已解决的单词谜题的数量所示，这些期望与表现呈正相关。我们将我们的研究结果整合到技术接受理论中，并讨论对基于人工智能的用户界面和新技术的未来评估的影响。我们认为，系统描述可以通过用户期望引发安慰剂效应，从而使以用户为中心的研究结果产生偏差。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了人工智能界面中安慰剂效应的存在，即用户对AI支持的信念如何影响其任务表现。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在验证人类在使用AI系统时是否存在类似医学中的安慰剂效应，并探究这种效应如何影响人机交互中的任务表现评估。
AI.method: 通过两项实验（N=369和N=100），参与者被要求在无AI支持或假象AI支持的条件下完成相同难度的字谜任务，对比其表现差异。
AI.result: 实验发现，参与者若相信获得AI支持，其任务表现预期显著提升，且这种预期与实际解题数量呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: 系统描述可诱导用户期望偏差，从而产生安慰剂效应，未来需在AI界面评估中考虑用户期望对结果的影响。

These expectations were positively correlated to performance, as indicated by the number of solved word puzzles. We integrate our findings into technological acceptance theories and discuss implications for the future assessment of AI-based user interfaces and novel technologies. We argue that system descriptions can elicit placebo effects through user expectations biasing the results of user-centered studies. 在医学上，患者可以从假治疗中获得真正的好处。这些好处被称为安慰剂效应。我们报告了两个实验（实验 I：N=369；实验 II：N=100），展示了自适应界面中的安慰剂效应。参与者被要求在没有系统或自适应人工智能界面支持的情况下解决文字谜题。所有参与者都经历了相同的单词拼图难度，并且在整个实验过程中没有人工智能的支持。我们的结果表明，接受自适应人工智能支持的信念会增加参与者对自己的任务表现的期望，这种期望在交互后持续存在。正如已解决的单词谜题的数量所示，这些期望与表现呈正相关。我们将我们的研究结果整合到技术接受理论中，并讨论对基于人工智能的用户界面和新技术的未来评估的影响。我们认为，系统描述可以通过用户期望引发安慰剂效应，从而使以用户为中心的研究结果产生偏差。 该论文探讨了人工智能界面中安慰剂效应的存在，即用户对AI支持的信念如何影响其任务表现。 Thomas Kosch,Robin Welsch,Lewis Chuang,Albrecht Schmidt cs.HC

authors_text: Lizhou Liao,Chunyun Fu,Binbin Feng,Tian Su
title: Optimized SC-F-LOAM: Optimized Fast LiDAR Odometry and Mapping Using Scan Context
title_zh: 优化的 SC-F-LOAM：使用扫描上下文优化快速 LiDAR 里程计和绘图
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 6th CAA International Conference on Vehicular Control and Intelligence (CVCI), Nanjing, China, 28-30 October 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 6th CAA International Conference on Vehicular Control and Intelligence (CVCI), Nanjing, China, 28-30 October 2022
abstract: LiDAR odometry can achieve accurate vehicle pose estimation for short driving range or in small-scale environments, but for long driving range or in large-scale environments, the accuracy deteriorates as a result of cumulative estimation errors. This drawback necessitates the inclusion of loop closure detection in a SLAM framework to suppress the adverse effects of cumulative errors. To improve the accuracy of pose estimation, we propose a new LiDAR-based SLAM method which uses F-LOAM as LiDAR odometry, Scan Context for loop closure detection, and GTSAM for global optimization. In our approach, an adaptive distance threshold (instead of a fixed threshold) is employed for loop closure detection, which achieves more accurate loop closure detection results. Besides, a feature-based matching method is used in our approach to compute vehicle pose transformations between loop closure point cloud pairs, instead of using the raw point cloud obtained by the LiDAR sensor, which significantly reduces the computation time. The KITTI dataset is used for verifications of our method, and the experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms typical LiDAR odometry/SLAM methods in the literature. Our code is made publicly available for the benefit of the community.

To improve the accuracy of pose estimation, we propose a new LiDAR-based SLAM method which uses F-LOAM as LiDAR odometry, Scan Context for loop closure detection, and GTSAM for global optimization. In our approach, an adaptive distance threshold (instead of a fixed threshold) is employed for loop closure detection, which achieves more accurate loop closure detection results. Besides, a feature-based matching method is used in our approach to compute vehicle pose transformations between loop closure point cloud pairs, instead of using the raw point cloud obtained by the LiDAR sensor, which significantly reduces the computation time. The KITTI dataset is used for verifications of our method, and the experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms typical LiDAR odometry/SLAM methods in the literature. Our code is made publicly available for the benefit of the community.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达里程计可以在短行驶里程或小范围环境下实现准确的车辆姿态估计，但在长行驶里程或大范围环境下，由于估计误差的累积，精度会下降。这个缺点需要在 SLAM 框架中包含闭环检测，以抑制累积误差的不利影响。为了提高位姿估计的准确性，我们提出了一种新的基于 LiDAR 的 SLAM 方法，该方法使用 F-LOAM 作为 LiDAR 里程计，使用 Scan Context 进行闭环检测，并使用 GTSAM 进行全局优化。在我们的方法中，采用自适应距离阈值（而不是固定阈值）进行回环检测，从而实现更准确的回环检测结果。此外，我们的方法使用基于特征的匹配方法来计算闭环点云对之间的车辆姿态变换，而不是使用激光雷达传感器获得的原始点云，这显着减少了计算时间。 KITTI数据集用于验证我们的方法，实验结果表明所提出的方法优于文献中典型的LiDAR里程计/SLAM方法。我们的代码是为了社区的利益而公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化的SC-F-LOAM方法，结合F-LOAM里程计、Scan Context回环检测和GTSAM全局优化，提升长距离LiDAR SLAM精度。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR里程计在长距离场景中因累积误差导致精度下降，需通过回环检测抑制误差，但现有方法存在阈值固定、计算效率低等问题。
AI.method: 采用自适应距离阈值改进回环检测，利用特征匹配替代原始点云计算位姿变换，并集成GTSAM进行全局优化。
AI.result: 基于KITTI数据集的实验表明，该方法在定位精度和计算效率上优于典型LiDAR SLAM方法。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的SC-F-LOAM方法有效提升了大尺度环境下的SLAM性能，公开代码有助于推动相关研究。

authors_text: Guocheng Qian,Xuanyang Zhang,Guohao Li,Chen Zhao,Yukang Chen,Xiangyu Zhang,Bernard Ghanem,Jian Sun
title: When NAS Meets Trees: An Efficient Algorithm for Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 当 NAS 遇上树：一种高效的神经架构搜索算法
abstract: The key challenge in neural architecture search (NAS) is designing how to explore wisely in the huge search space. We propose a new NAS method called TNAS (NAS with trees), which improves search efficiency by exploring only a small number of architectures while also achieving a higher search accuracy. TNAS introduces an architecture tree and a binary operation tree, to factorize the search space and substantially reduce the exploration size. TNAS performs a modified bi-level Breadth-First Search in the proposed trees to discover a high-performance architecture. Impressively, TNAS finds the global optimal architecture on CIFAR-10 with test accuracy of 94.37\% in four GPU hours in NAS-Bench-201. The average test accuracy is 94.35\%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/guochengqian/TNAS}.
summary: The key challenge in neural architecture search (NAS) is designing how to explore wisely in the huge search space. We propose a new NAS method called TNAS (NAS with trees), which improves search efficiency by exploring only a small number of architectures while also achieving a higher search accuracy. TNAS introduces an architecture tree and a binary operation tree, to factorize the search space and substantially reduce the exploration size. TNAS performs a modified bi-level Breadth-First Search in the proposed trees to discover a high-performance architecture. Impressively, TNAS finds the global optimal architecture on CIFAR-10 with test accuracy of 94.37\% in four GPU hours in NAS-Bench-201. The average test accuracy is 94.35\%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/guochengqian/TNAS}.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）的关键挑战是设计如何在巨大的搜索空间中进行明智的探索。我们提出了一种新的 NAS 方法，称为 TNAS（NAS with trees），该方法通过仅探索少量架构来提高搜索效率，同时还实现了更高的搜索精度。 TNAS引入了架构树和二元运算树，以分解搜索空间并大幅减少探索大小。 TNAS 在建议的树中执行修改后的双层广度优先搜索，以发现高性能架构。令人印象深刻的是，TNAS 在 CIFAR-10 上找到了全局最优架构，在 NAS-Bench-201 中的四个 GPU 小时内测试准确率达到 94.37%。平均测试准确率为 94.35\%，优于现有技术。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/guo Chengqian/TNAS}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TNAS的高效神经架构搜索方法，通过引入树结构分解搜索空间，显著提升搜索效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS方法在巨大搜索空间中效率低下，难以平衡探索数量与搜索精度，亟需更高效的架构搜索算法。
AI.method: 构建架构树与二元操作树分解搜索空间，结合改进的双层广度优先搜索算法，在树结构中高效定位高性能架构。
AI.result: 在NAS-Bench-201基准上，TNAS在CIFAR-10数据集达到94.37%测试准确率，仅需4个GPU小时，优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: TNAS通过树结构化搜索空间有效降低计算成本，验证了树引导的NAS方法在效率与精度上的双重优势。

search_text: When NAS Meets Trees: An Efficient Algorithm for Neural Architecture Search 当 NAS 遇上树：一种高效的神经架构搜索算法 The key challenge in neural architecture search (NAS) is designing how to explore wisely in the huge search space. We propose a new NAS method called TNAS (NAS with trees), which improves search efficiency by exploring only a small number of architectures while also achieving a higher search accuracy. TNAS introduces an architecture tree and a binary operation tree, to factorize the search space and substantially reduce the exploration size. TNAS performs a modified bi-level Breadth-First Search in the proposed trees to discover a high-performance architecture. Impressively, TNAS finds the global optimal architecture on CIFAR-10 with test accuracy of 94.37\% in four GPU hours in NAS-Bench-201. The average test accuracy is 94.35\%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/guochengqian/TNAS}. 神经架构搜索（NAS）的关键挑战是设计如何在巨大的搜索空间中进行明智的探索。我们提出了一种新的 NAS 方法，称为 TNAS（NAS with trees），该方法通过仅探索少量架构来提高搜索效率，同时还实现了更高的搜索精度。 TNAS引入了架构树和二元运算树，以分解搜索空间并大幅减少探索大小。 TNAS 在建议的树中执行修改后的双层广度优先搜索，以发现高性能架构。令人印象深刻的是，TNAS 在 CIFAR-10 上找到了全局最优架构，在 NAS-Bench-201 中的四个 GPU 小时内测试准确率达到 94.37%。平均测试准确率为 94.35\%，优于现有技术。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/guo Chengqian/TNAS}。 本文提出一种名为TNAS的高效神经架构搜索方法，通过引入树结构分解搜索空间，显著提升搜索效率和准确性。 Guocheng Qian,Xuanyang Zhang,Guohao Li,Chen Zhao,Yukang Chen,Xiangyu Zhang,Bernard Ghanem,Jian Sun cs.AI

authors_text: Han Wu,Haochen Tan,Kun Xu,Shuqi Liu,Lianwei Wu,Linqi Song
title: Zero-shot Cross-lingual Conversational Semantic Role Labeling
title_zh: 零样本跨语言会话语义角色标记
abstract: While conversational semantic role labeling (CSRL) has shown its usefulness on Chinese conversational tasks, it is still under-explored in non-Chinese languages due to the lack of multilingual CSRL annotations for the parser training. To avoid expensive data collection and error-propagation of translation-based methods, we present a simple but effective approach to perform zero-shot cross-lingual CSRL. Our model implicitly learns language-agnostic, conversational structure-aware and semantically rich representations with the hierarchical encoders and elaborately designed pre-training objectives. Experimental results show that our model outperforms all baselines by large margins on two newly collected English CSRL test sets. More importantly, we confirm the usefulness of CSRL to non-Chinese conversational tasks such as the question-in-context rewriting task in English and the multi-turn dialogue response generation tasks in English, German and Japanese by incorporating the CSRL information into the downstream conversation-based models. We believe this finding is significant and will facilitate the research of non-Chinese dialogue tasks which suffer the problems of ellipsis and anaphora.
summary: While conversational semantic role labeling (CSRL) has shown its usefulness on Chinese conversational tasks, it is still under-explored in non-Chinese languages due to the lack of multilingual CSRL annotations for the parser training. To avoid expensive data collection and error-propagation of translation-based methods, we present a simple but effective approach to perform zero-shot cross-lingual CSRL. Our model implicitly learns language-agnostic, conversational structure-aware and semantically rich representations with the hierarchical encoders and elaborately designed pre-training objectives. Experimental results show that our model outperforms all baselines by large margins on two newly collected English CSRL test sets. More importantly, we confirm the usefulness of CSRL to non-Chinese conversational tasks such as the question-in-context rewriting task in English and the multi-turn dialogue response generation tasks in English, German and Japanese by incorporating the CSRL information into the downstream conversation-based models. We believe this finding is significant and will facilitate the research of non-Chinese dialogue tasks which suffer the problems of ellipsis and anaphora.
abstract_zh: 虽然会话语义角色标记（CSRL）已经在中文会话任务中显示出其有用性，但由于缺乏用于解析器训练的多语言 CSRL 注释，它在非中文语言中的探索仍然不足。为了避免昂贵的数据收集和基于翻译的方法的错误传播，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来执行零样本跨语言 CSRL。我们的模型通过分层编码器和精心设计的预训练目标隐式学习与语言无关、会话结构感知和语义丰富的表示。实验结果表明，我们的模型在两个新收集的英语 CSRL 测试集上大幅优于所有基线。更重要的是，我们通过将 CSRL 信息合并到下游基于会话的模型中，确认了 CSRL 对于非中文会话任务的有用性，例如英语的上下文问题重写任务和英语、德语和日语的多轮对话响应生成任务。我们相信这一发现具有重要意义，并将有助于研究存在省略和照应问题的非中文对话任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本跨语言会话语义角色标注方法，旨在解决非中文语言因缺乏多语言标注数据而难以进行会话语义角色标注的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖翻译数据导致成本高且误差传播，而非中文语言缺乏多语言会话语义角色标注（CSRL）的标注数据，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 通过分层编码器和精心设计的预训练目标，模型隐式学习语言无关、结构感知且语义丰富的表示，实现零样本跨语言CSRL。
AI.result: 模型在两个新收集的英文CSRL测试集上显著优于所有基线，并在英文、德文和日文的下游对话任务中提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了CSRL在非中文对话任务中的有效性，尤其对处理省略和回指等挑战具有重要意义，有助于推动相关领域研究。

search_text: Zero-shot Cross-lingual Conversational Semantic Role Labeling 零样本跨语言会话语义角色标记 While conversational semantic role labeling (CSRL) has shown its usefulness on Chinese conversational tasks, it is still under-explored in non-Chinese languages due to the lack of multilingual CSRL annotations for the parser training. To avoid expensive data collection and error-propagation of translation-based methods, we present a simple but effective approach to perform zero-shot cross-lingual CSRL. Our model implicitly learns language-agnostic, conversational structure-aware and semantically rich representations with the hierarchical encoders and elaborately designed pre-training objectives. Experimental results show that our model outperforms all baselines by large margins on two newly collected English CSRL test sets. More importantly, we confirm the usefulness of CSRL to non-Chinese conversational tasks such as the question-in-context rewriting task in English and the multi-turn dialogue response generation tasks in English, German and Japanese by incorporating the CSRL information into the downstream conversation-based models. We believe this finding is significant and will facilitate the research of non-Chinese dialogue tasks which suffer the problems of ellipsis and anaphora. 虽然会话语义角色标记（CSRL）已经在中文会话任务中显示出其有用性，但由于缺乏用于解析器训练的多语言 CSRL 注释，它在非中文语言中的探索仍然不足。为了避免昂贵的数据收集和基于翻译的方法的错误传播，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来执行零样本跨语言 CSRL。我们的模型通过分层编码器和精心设计的预训练目标隐式学习与语言无关、会话结构感知和语义丰富的表示。实验结果表明，我们的模型在两个新收集的英语 CSRL 测试集上大幅优于所有基线。更重要的是，我们通过将 CSRL 信息合并到下游基于会话的模型中，确认了 CSRL 对于非中文会话任务的有用性，例如英语的上下文问题重写任务和英语、德语和日语的多轮对话响应生成任务。我们相信这一发现具有重要意义，并将有助于研究存在省略和照应问题的非中文对话任务。 本文提出了一种零样本跨语言会话语义角色标注方法，旨在解决非中文语言因缺乏多语言标注数据而难以进行会话语义角色标注的问题。 Han Wu,Haochen Tan,Kun Xu,Shuqi Liu,Lianwei Wu,Linqi Song cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Nicolas Ugrinovic,Adria Ruiz,Antonio Agudo,Alberto Sanfeliu,Francesc Moreno-Noguer
title: Permutation-Invariant Relational Network for Multi-person 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于多人 3D 姿态估计的排列不变关系网络
abstract: The recovery of multi-person 3D poses from a single RGB image is a severely ill-conditioned problem due to the inherent 2D-3D depth ambiguity, inter-person occlusions, and body truncations. To tackle these issues, recent works have shown promising results by simultaneously reasoning for different people. However, in most cases this is done by only considering pairwise person interactions, hindering thus a holistic scene representation able to capture long-range interactions. This is addressed by approaches that jointly process all people in the scene, although they require defining one of the individuals as a reference and a pre-defined person ordering, being sensitive to this choice. In this paper, we overcome both these limitations, and we propose an approach for multi-person 3D pose estimation that captures long-range interactions independently of the input order. For this purpose, we build a residual-like permutation-invariant network that successfully refines potentially corrupted initial 3D poses estimated by an off-the-shelf detector. The residual function is learned via Set Transformer blocks, that model the interactions among all initial poses, no matter their ordering or number. A thorough evaluation demonstrates that our approach is able to boost the performance of the initially estimated 3D poses by large margins, achieving state-of-the-art results on standardized benchmarks. Additionally, the proposed module works in a computationally efficient manner and can be potentially used as a drop-in complement for any 3D pose detector in multi-people scenes.
summary: The recovery of multi-person 3D poses from a single RGB image is a severely ill-conditioned problem due to the inherent 2D-3D depth ambiguity, inter-person occlusions, and body truncations. To tackle these issues, recent works have shown promising results by simultaneously reasoning for different people. However, in most cases this is done by only considering pairwise person interactions, hindering thus a holistic scene representation able to capture long-range interactions. This is addressed by approaches that jointly process all people in the scene, although they require defining one of the individuals as a reference and a pre-defined person ordering, being sensitive to this choice. In this paper, we overcome both these limitations, and we propose an approach for multi-person 3D pose estimation that captures long-range interactions independently of the input order. For this purpose, we build a residual-like permutation-invariant network that successfully refines potentially corrupted initial 3D poses estimated by an off-the-shelf detector. The residual function is learned via Set Transformer blocks, that model the interactions among all initial poses, no matter their ordering or number. A thorough evaluation demonstrates that our approach is able to boost the performance of the initially estimated 3D poses by large margins, achieving state-of-the-art results on standardized benchmarks. Additionally, the proposed module works in a computationally efficient manner and can be potentially used as a drop-in complement for any 3D pose detector in multi-people scenes.
abstract_zh: 由于固有的 2D-3D 深度模糊性、人际遮挡和身体截断，从单个 RGB 图像恢复多人 3D 姿势是一个严重的病态问题。为了解决这些问题，最近的研究通过同时对不同的人进行推理已经显示出有希望的结果。然而，在大多数情况下，这是通过仅考虑成对的人交互来完成的，从而阻碍了能够捕获远程交互的整体场景表示。这是通过联合处理场景中所有人的方法来解决的，尽管它们需要将其中一个人定义为参考和预定义的人排序，并对这种选择敏感。在本文中，我们克服了这两个限制，并提出了一种多人 3D 姿态估计方法，可以独立于输入顺序捕获远程交互。为此，我们构建了一个类似残差的排列不变网络，该网络成功地细化了由现成检测器估计的可能损坏的初始 3D 位姿。残差函数是通过 Set Transformer 模块学习的，该模块对所有初始姿势之间的交互进行建模，无论其顺序或数量如何。彻底的评估表明，我们的方法能够大幅提高最初估计的 3D 姿势的性能，在标准化基准上实现最先进的结果。此外，所提出的模块以计算高效的方式工作，并且可以用作多人场景中任何 3D 姿势检测器的直接补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于多人3D姿态估计的排列不变关系网络，通过捕捉长距离交互提升姿态估计性能。
AI.motivation: 多人3D姿态估计面临2D-3D深度模糊、遮挡和躯干截断等问题，现有方法依赖成对交互或预定义顺序，难以建模全局交互且敏感于输入顺序。
AI.method: 构建残差式排列不变网络，利用Set Transformer块建模所有初始姿态间的交互，无需依赖顺序或数量，通过学习残差函数优化初始姿态估计。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中显著提升初始3D姿态估计性能，达到SOTA水平，且计算高效，可作为任意3D姿态检测器的通用模块。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过排列不变设计克服了顺序敏感性和局部交互限制，在多人场景中实现了高效准确的3D姿态估计。

authors_text: Leizhen Dong,Zhimin Li,Kunlun Xu,Zhijun Zhang,Luxin Yan,Sheng Zhong,Xu Zou
title: Category-Aware Transformer Network for Better Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: 类别感知变压器网络可实现更好的人机交互检测
abstract: Human-Object Interactions (HOI) detection, which aims to localize a human and a relevant object while recognizing their interaction, is crucial for understanding a still image. Recently, transformer-based models have significantly advanced the progress of HOI detection. However, the capability of these models has not been fully explored since the Object Query of the model is always simply initialized as just zeros, which would affect the performance. In this paper, we try to study the issue of promoting transformer-based HOI detectors by initializing the Object Query with category-aware semantic information. To this end, we innovatively propose the Category-Aware Transformer Network (CATN). Specifically, the Object Query would be initialized via category priors represented by an external object detection model to yield better performance. Moreover, such category priors can be further used for enhancing the representation ability of features via the attention mechanism. We have firstly verified our idea via the Oracle experiment by initializing the Object Query with the groundtruth category information. And then extensive experiments have been conducted to show that a HOI detection model equipped with our idea outperforms the baseline by a large margin to achieve a new state-of-the-art result.
summary: Human-Object Interactions (HOI) detection, which aims to localize a human and a relevant object while recognizing their interaction, is crucial for understanding a still image. Recently, transformer-based models have significantly advanced the progress of HOI detection. However, the capability of these models has not been fully explored since the Object Query of the model is always simply initialized as just zeros, which would affect the performance. In this paper, we try to study the issue of promoting transformer-based HOI detectors by initializing the Object Query with category-aware semantic information. To this end, we innovatively propose the Category-Aware Transformer Network (CATN). Specifically, the Object Query would be initialized via category priors represented by an external object detection model to yield better performance. Moreover, such category priors can be further used for enhancing the representation ability of features via the attention mechanism. We have firstly verified our idea via the Oracle experiment by initializing the Object Query with the groundtruth category information. And then extensive experiments have been conducted to show that a HOI detection model equipped with our idea outperforms the baseline by a large margin to achieve a new state-of-the-art result.
abstract_zh: 人与物体交互（HOI）检测旨在定位人类和相关物体，同时识别他们的交互，对于理解静态图像至关重要。最近，基于 Transformer 的模型显着推进了 HOI 检测的进展。然而，这些模型的功能尚未得到充分开发，因为模型的对象查询总是简单地初始化为零，这会影响性能。在本文中，我们尝试通过使用类别感知语义信息初始化对象查询来研究推广基于 Transformer 的 HOI 检测器的问题。为此，我们创新性地提出了类别感知变压器网络（CATN）。具体来说，对象查询将通过外部对象检测模型表示的类别先验进行初始化，以产生更好的性能。此外，这种类别先验还可以通过注意力机制进一步用于增强特征的表示能力。我们首先通过 Oracle 实验通过使用真实类别信息初始化对象查询来验证我们的想法。然后进行了大量的实验表明，采用我们的想法的 HOI 检测模型大大优于基线，从而实现了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种类别感知的Transformer网络（CATN），通过利用外部检测模型的类别先验信息初始化Object Query，以提升Human-Object Interaction检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的HOI检测模型因简单使用零初始化Object Query，导致无法充分挖掘类别语义信息，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 设计CATN网络，通过外部目标检测模型获取的类别先验信息初始化Object Query，并结合注意力机制增强特征表示能力。
AI.result: Oracle实验与大量测试表明，该方法显著优于基线模型，在HOI检测任务上达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 类别感知的Object Query初始化策略能有效提升HOI检测性能，未来可进一步优化类别先验的融合方式。

search_text: Category-Aware Transformer Network for Better Human-Object Interaction Detection 类别感知变压器网络可实现更好的人机交互检测 Human-Object Interactions (HOI) detection, which aims to localize a human and a relevant object while recognizing their interaction, is crucial for understanding a still image. Recently, transformer-based models have significantly advanced the progress of HOI detection. However, the capability of these models has not been fully explored since the Object Query of the model is always simply initialized as just zeros, which would affect the performance. In this paper, we try to study the issue of promoting transformer-based HOI detectors by initializing the Object Query with category-aware semantic information. To this end, we innovatively propose the Category-Aware Transformer Network (CATN). Specifically, the Object Query would be initialized via category priors represented by an external object detection model to yield better performance. Moreover, such category priors can be further used for enhancing the representation ability of features via the attention mechanism. We have firstly verified our idea via the Oracle experiment by initializing the Object Query with the groundtruth category information. And then extensive experiments have been conducted to show that a HOI detection model equipped with our idea outperforms the baseline by a large margin to achieve a new state-of-the-art result. 人与物体交互（HOI）检测旨在定位人类和相关物体，同时识别他们的交互，对于理解静态图像至关重要。最近，基于 Transformer 的模型显着推进了 HOI 检测的进展。然而，这些模型的功能尚未得到充分开发，因为模型的对象查询总是简单地初始化为零，这会影响性能。在本文中，我们尝试通过使用类别感知语义信息初始化对象查询来研究推广基于 Transformer 的 HOI 检测器的问题。为此，我们创新性地提出了类别感知变压器网络（CATN）。具体来说，对象查询将通过外部对象检测模型表示的类别先验进行初始化，以产生更好的性能。此外，这种类别先验还可以通过注意力机制进一步用于增强特征的表示能力。我们首先通过 Oracle 实验通过使用真实类别信息初始化对象查询来验证我们的想法。然后进行了大量的实验表明，采用我们的想法的 HOI 检测模型大大优于基线，从而实现了新的最先进的结果。 本文提出一种类别感知的Transformer网络（CATN），通过利用外部检测模型的类别先验信息初始化Object Query，以提升Human-Object Interaction检测性能。 Leizhen Dong,Zhimin Li,Kunlun Xu,Zhijun Zhang,Luxin Yan,Sheng Zhong,Xu Zou cs.CV

authors_text: Roni Paiss,Hila Chefer,Lior Wolf
title: No Token Left Behind: Explainability-Aided Image Classification and Generation
title_zh: 不遗余力：可解释性辅助图像分类和生成
abstract: The application of zero-shot learning in computer vision has been revolutionized by the use of image-text matching models. The most notable example, CLIP, has been widely used for both zero-shot classification and guiding generative models with a text prompt. However, the zero-shot use of CLIP is unstable with respect to the phrasing of the input text, making it necessary to carefully engineer the prompts used. We find that this instability stems from a selective similarity score, which is based only on a subset of the semantically meaningful input tokens. To mitigate it, we present a novel explainability-based approach, which adds a loss term to ensure that CLIP focuses on all relevant semantic parts of the input, in addition to employing the CLIP similarity loss used in previous works. When applied to one-shot classification through prompt engineering, our method yields an improvement in the recognition rate, without additional training or fine-tuning. Additionally, we show that CLIP guidance of generative models using our method significantly improves the generated images. Finally, we demonstrate a novel use of CLIP guidance for text-based image generation with spatial conditioning on object location, by requiring the image explainability heatmap for each object to be confined to a pre-determined bounding box.
summary: The application of zero-shot learning in computer vision has been revolutionized by the use of image-text matching models. The most notable example, CLIP, has been widely used for both zero-shot classification and guiding generative models with a text prompt. However, the zero-shot use of CLIP is unstable with respect to the phrasing of the input text, making it necessary to carefully engineer the prompts used. We find that this instability stems from a selective similarity score, which is based only on a subset of the semantically meaningful input tokens. To mitigate it, we present a novel explainability-based approach, which adds a loss term to ensure that CLIP focuses on all relevant semantic parts of the input, in addition to employing the CLIP similarity loss used in previous works. When applied to one-shot classification through prompt engineering, our method yields an improvement in the recognition rate, without additional training or fine-tuning. Additionally, we show that CLIP guidance of generative models using our method significantly improves the generated images. Finally, we demonstrate a novel use of CLIP guidance for text-based image generation with spatial conditioning on object location, by requiring the image explainability heatmap for each object to be confined to a pre-determined bounding box.
abstract_zh: 图像文本匹配模型的使用彻底改变了零样本学习在计算机视觉中的应用。最著名的例子是 CLIP，它已广泛用于零样本分类和通过文本提示指导生成模型。然而，CLIP 的零样本使用在输入文本的措辞方面不稳定，因此有必要仔细设计所使用的提示。我们发现这种不稳定性源于选择性相似性评分，该评分仅基于语义上有意义的输入标记的子集。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于可解释性的方法，除了采用之前工作中使用的 CLIP 相似性损失之外，该方法还添加了一个损失项，以确保 CLIP 专注于输入的所有相关语义部分。当通过即时工程应用于一次性分类时，我们的方法可以提高识别率，而无需额外的训练或微调。此外，我们还表明，使用我们的方法对生成模型进行 CLIP 指导可以显着改善生成的图像。最后，我们通过要求将每个对象的图像可解释性热图限制在预先确定的边界框中，展示了 CLIP 指导的一种新颖用途，用于基于文本的图像生成，并对对象位置进行空间调节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可解释性的方法，通过改进CLIP模型的相似性计算，提升零样本图像分类和生成任务的稳定性与性能。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型在零样本学习中存在对输入文本表述敏感的不稳定性，传统方法依赖选择性相似性评分导致部分语义信息被忽略。
AI.method: 引入可解释性损失项，强制CLIP关注输入文本中所有相关语义部分，并结合原有相似性损失进行优化，无需额外训练或微调。
AI.result: 在少样本分类任务中识别率提升，生成模型图像质量显著改善，并实现基于文本的带空间约束的图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过增强模型对输入文本语义的全面性利用，有效提升了CLIP在分类和生成任务中的鲁棒性与可控性。
