authors_text: Tianxin Tao,Daniele Reda,Michiel van de Panne
title: Evaluating Vision Transformer Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning from Pixels
title_zh: 评估用于像素深度强化学习的 Vision Transformer 方法
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) have recently demonstrated the significant potential of transformer architectures for computer vision. To what extent can image-based deep reinforcement learning also benefit from ViT architectures, as compared to standard convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures? To answer this question, we evaluate ViT training methods for image-based reinforcement learning (RL) control tasks and compare these results to a leading convolutional-network architecture method, RAD. For training the ViT encoder, we consider several recently-proposed self-supervised losses that are treated as auxiliary tasks, as well as a baseline with no additional loss terms. We find that the CNN architectures trained using RAD still generally provide superior performance. For the ViT methods, all three types of auxiliary tasks that we consider provide a benefit over plain ViT training. Furthermore, ViT reconstruction-based tasks are found to significantly outperform ViT contrastive-learning.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) have recently demonstrated the significant potential of transformer architectures for computer vision. To what extent can image-based deep reinforcement learning also benefit from ViT architectures, as compared to standard convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures? To answer this question, we evaluate ViT training methods for image-based reinforcement learning (RL) control tasks and compare these results to a leading convolutional-network architecture method, RAD. For training the ViT encoder, we consider several recently-proposed self-supervised losses that are treated as auxiliary tasks, as well as a baseline with no additional loss terms. We find that the CNN architectures trained using RAD still generally provide superior performance. For the ViT methods, all three types of auxiliary tasks that we consider provide a benefit over plain ViT training. Furthermore, ViT reconstruction-based tasks are found to significantly outperform ViT contrastive-learning.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 最近展示了变压器架构在计算机视觉方面的巨大潜力。与标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构相比，基于图像的深度强化学习在多大程度上也能从 ViT 架构中受益？为了回答这个问题，我们评估了基于图像的强化学习 (RL) 控制任务的 ViT 训练方法，并将这些结果与领先的卷积网络架构方法 RAD 进行比较。为了训练 ViT 编码器，我们考虑了最近提出的几种被视为辅助任务的自监督损失，以及没有额外损失项的基线。我们发现使用 RAD 训练的 CNN 架构通常仍然提供优越的性能。对于 ViT 方法，我们认为所有三种类型的辅助任务都比普通 ViT 训练有好处。此外，基于 ViT 重建的任务明显优于 ViT 对比学习。

AI.tldr: 评估视觉Transformer（ViT）在图像基于深度强化学习任务中的效果，并与卷积神经网络（CNN）方法RAD进行比较。
AI.motivation: 探索ViT在图像强化学习中的潜力，对比传统CNN方法，以确定其有效性。
AI.method: 采用多种自监督损失作为辅助任务训练ViT编码器，并与RAD方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: CNN在RAD下仍优于ViT，但ViT的三种辅助任务均优于纯ViT训练，其中重建任务显著优于对比学习。
AI.conclusion: 当前CNN方法在图像强化学习中仍占优势，但ViT通过优化辅助任务设计（尤其是重建任务）可提升性能。

We find that the CNN architectures trained using RAD still generally provide superior performance. For the ViT methods, all three types of auxiliary tasks that we consider provide a benefit over plain ViT training. Furthermore, ViT reconstruction-based tasks are found to significantly outperform ViT contrastive-learning. 视觉变压器 (ViT) 最近展示了变压器架构在计算机视觉方面的巨大潜力。与标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构相比，基于图像的深度强化学习在多大程度上也能从 ViT 架构中受益？为了回答这个问题，我们评估了基于图像的强化学习 (RL) 控制任务的 ViT 训练方法，并将这些结果与领先的卷积网络架构方法 RAD 进行比较。为了训练 ViT 编码器，我们考虑了最近提出的几种被视为辅助任务的自监督损失，以及没有额外损失项的基线。我们发现使用 RAD 训练的 CNN 架构通常仍然提供优越的性能。对于 ViT 方法，我们认为所有三种类型的辅助任务都比普通 ViT 训练有好处。此外，基于 ViT 重建的任务明显优于 ViT 对比学习。 评估视觉Transformer（ViT）在图像基于深度强化学习任务中的效果，并与卷积神经网络（CNN）方法RAD进行比较。 Tianxin Tao,Daniele Reda,Michiel van de Panne cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Frank Neumann,Dirk Sudholt,Carsten Witt
title: The Compact Genetic Algorithm Struggles on Cliff Functions
title_zh: 紧凑遗传算法在悬崖函数上的挣扎
abstract: The compact genetic algorithm (cGA) is an non-elitist estimation of distribution algorithm which has shown to be able to deal with difficult multimodal fitness landscapes that are hard to solve by elitist algorithms. In this paper, we investigate the cGA on the CLIFF function for which it has been shown recently that non-elitist evolutionary algorithms and artificial immune systems optimize it in expected polynomial time. We point out that the cGA faces major difficulties when solving the CLIFF function and investigate its dynamics both experimentally and theoretically around the cliff. Our experimental results indicate that the cGA requires exponential time for all values of the update strength $K$. We show theoretically that, under sensible assumptions, there is a negative drift when sampling around the location of the cliff. Experiments further suggest that there is a phase transition for $K$ where the expected optimization time drops from $n^{Θ(n)}$ to $2^{Θ(n)}$.
summary: The compact genetic algorithm (cGA) is an non-elitist estimation of distribution algorithm which has shown to be able to deal with difficult multimodal fitness landscapes that are hard to solve by elitist algorithms. In this paper, we investigate the cGA on the CLIFF function for which it has been shown recently that non-elitist evolutionary algorithms and artificial immune systems optimize it in expected polynomial time. We point out that the cGA faces major difficulties when solving the CLIFF function and investigate its dynamics both experimentally and theoretically around the cliff. Our experimental results indicate that the cGA requires exponential time for all values of the update strength $K$. We show theoretically that, under sensible assumptions, there is a negative drift when sampling around the location of the cliff. Experiments further suggest that there is a phase transition for $K$ where the expected optimization time drops from $n^{Θ(n)}$ to $2^{Θ(n)}$.
abstract_zh: 紧凑遗传算法（cGA）是一种非精英分布估计算法，它已被证明能够处理精英算法难以解决的困难的多模态适应度景观。在本文中，我们研究了 CLIFF 函数上的 cGA，最近表明非精英进化算法和人工免疫系统可以在预期多项式时间内对其进行优化。我们指出，cGA 在求解 CLIFF 函数时面临重大困难，并从实验和理论上研究了其在悬崖周围的动力学。我们的实验结果表明，cGA 对于更新强度 $K$ 的所有值都需要指数时间。我们从理论上证明，在合理的假设下，在悬崖位置周围采样时会出现负漂移。实验进一步表明，$K$ 存在一个相变，其中预期优化时间从 $n^{θ(n)}$ 下降到 $2^{θ(n)}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究紧凑型遗传算法（cGA）在处理CLIFF函数时的困难，分析其动态行为及优化时间表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管非精英进化算法能高效解决CLIFF函数，但cGA在此问题上表现不佳，需探究其根本原因及理论机制。
AI.method: 通过实验与理论分析结合，研究cGA在CLIFF函数附近的采样动态，重点考察更新强度K的影响及漂移现象。
AI.result: 实验表明cGA在所有K值下需指数时间；理论证明存在负漂移，且K存在相变导致优化时间从n^{Θ(n)}降至2^{Θ(n)}。
AI.conclusion: cGA在CLIFF函数上面临显著挑战，突显算法设计对复杂多峰问题的重要性。
